title: PPC (Pay-Per-Click) Specialist
description:
Job Title: PPC (Pay-Per-Click) Specialist



Job Type: Full-Time (Remote)



Salary: To be discussed based on experience



Job Overview:

We are seeking a PPC Specialist to manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns across platforms such as Google Ads and other PPC channels. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, analytical, and experienced in handling campaign performance in a structured and compliant manner.



Responsibilities:



Plan, set up, and manage PPC campaigns across platforms (e.g., Google Ads)

Conduct keyword research and organize campaign structures

Monitor campaign performance and apply regular optimizations

Manage budgets and bidding strategies to improve efficiency

Analyze performance data and prepare reports

Perform A/B testing on ads and landing pages where applicable

Ensure campaigns follow platform policies and guidelines

Identify and resolve campaign-related issues

Collaborate with team members to support marketing goals



Requirements:



Proven experience in PPC or digital advertising

Familiarity with Google Ads or similar PPC platforms

Understanding of keyword research, bidding, and optimization techniques

Basic knowledge of analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics) is a plus

Ability to interpret data and make data-driven decisions

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Good English communication skills



Work Schedule:



Full-time remote position

Flexible working hours with some overlap required for team communication



Compensation & Benefits:



Salary based on experience and skills

Long-term opportunity with potential for growth

Performance-based evaluation and development opportunities



Application Instructions:

To apply, please include:



Your resume or profile with relevant experience

A summary of your PPC or digital advertising experience

Platforms and types of campaigns you have managed

Industries or niches you have worked in

Tools or systems you have used for tracking and reporting

Optional: examples of campaign results or improvements



We are looking for a reliable and responsible individual who can manage campaigns effectively and contribute to consistent performance improvements.

title: HR Manager
description:
Salary: Competitive / TBD (Based on Experience)

Experience: 4–7+ Years (Recruitment Focus)



Role Overview

Are you a recruitment powerhouse who has evolved into a strategic HR leader? We are looking for an experienced HR & Workforce Manager to lead the growth of our high-performing global virtual workforce.



This is a recruitment-driven role designed for a talent acquisition expert who understands how to build sourcing pipelines at scale while managing the full employee lifecycle. You will be the bridge between our operational needs and our talent pool, ensuring our workforce is organized, engaged, and ready to deliver.



Key Responsibilities (Strategic & Operational)

-End-to-End Talent Acquisition: Lead high-volume recruitment for Virtual Assistants and internal staff, managing everything from sourcing strategy to final offer.

-Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO) Strategy: Refine and optimize hiring workflows to reduce Time-to-Hire while maintaining high candidate quality.

-Workforce Planning & Analytics: Partner with leadership to conduct capacity planning and staffing gap analyses. Track HR KPIs such as retention rates, cost-per-hire, and pipeline velocity.

-Onboarding & Employee Experience: Oversee the induction process, ensuring seamless integration and cultural alignment for all remote contractors.

-Contract & Compliance Management: Maintain digital documentation, employment contracts, and records in compliance with remote work standards.

-Offboarding & Lifecycle Management: Manage the full exit process and succession planning to ensure operational continuity.

-Stakeholder Management: Collaborate with Client Operations to align hiring efforts with business growth and client demands.



Required Qualifications

-Education: Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Industrial Psychology, or a related field.

-Experience: Minimum 4 years of HR experience, with a heavy emphasis (6–7 years preferred) on Talent Acquisition or Technical Sourcing.

-Proven Track Record: Experience in high-volume recruitment within staffing agencies, BPOs, or manpower firms is highly preferred.

-Systems Thinker: Ability to build and scale HR systems (ATS, HRIS, or CRM) rather than just executing manual tasks.

-Communication: Exceptional English proficiency with the ability to manage stakeholder expectations across different time zones.

-Mindset: Growth-oriented, proactive, and comfortable in a fast-paced Start-up or Remote-first environment.



Technical Skills

-Sourcing: LinkedIn Recruiter, Boolean Search, Job Board Optimization.

-Tools: Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS), Google Workspace, Slack, HRIS platforms.

-Competencies: Workforce Engagement, Pipeline Management, Performance Metrics, Organizational Development.



How to Apply

Ready to lead our workforce growth? Send your CV and a brief cover letter highlighting your experience in high-volume recruitment and workforce optimization to:



: 

Subject: Application: HR & Workforce Manager - [Your Full Name]

title: Video Editing and Social Media EXPERT
description:
PLEASE READ CAREFULLY: 



I'm looking for an extremely hard-working and communicative assistant to manage my relationship educational social media, and to take long-form YouTube videos and turn them into short-form content that is customized to perform well on each platform. This means choosing the right 
nts and editing them in a way that individually fits Instagram,
 and 
 Shorts. If your approach is to cut one clip and post it everywhere, this is not the right role.



I AM NOT LOOKING FOR BASIC, LAZY, OR TEMPLATE EDITING, WHERE THE SAME CLIP IS USED ON ALL PLATFORMS WITHOUT ANY CHANGES OR STRATEGY. I am looking to build a respectable audience and community with integrity and engagement.



I strongly prefer Descript, but I am open to other editors, but not CapCut.



What you’ll be doing:

* Watch full videos and identify strong, meaningful segments

* Create short clips using Descript or similar

* Adjust pacing, captions, and structure for each platform

* Deliver clean, professional content that reflects a thoughtful educational brand

* Upload and manage the content and platforms, and most importantly, help build the
 list



What I’m looking for:

* Good judgment — you know what’s worth clipping and what isn’t, and have a picture of the larger brand strategy

* Clean editing style — simple, sharp, professional, clean, and intentional

* Reliability — consistent output without chasing you and very communicative

* Strong English — you understand nuance in conversation



Requirements:

* Experience with short-form content (send examples)

* Experience with managing social media,
 and Instagram, with metrics and data to guide progress

* Experience with Descript (preferred) or similar tools

* Ability to follow direction but also think independently, knowing when to ask for guidance



Budget:

Starting at $3–$4/hour, with possible increases as we go.



To Apply:

Please send me:



1. a few examples of short-form clips you created from longer videos

2. A short note explaining your experience with growing an audience on social media

3. Why I should hire you



Applications without examples will not be considered. 

I am really looking forward to hiring a true partner immediately that can help me build something great.

title: Creative Lead for DTC Short-Form Video Ads
description:
Creative Lead for DTC Short Form Video Ads

Remote Philippines

Passion Driven DTC Brands

Pet Brands, Ethical Beauty, Plant Based, Sustainable Lifestyle and Other Purpose Driven Brands

Contract Role

500 USD per client per month

Approx 4 to 5 clients at full capacity, depending on workload

Eloura Creative is a passion based marketing agency operating out of Melbourne, Australia and Vancouver, Canada.



We work with North American passion driven DTC brands, with a focus on pet brands, ethical beauty, plant based products, sustainable lifestyle, and other purpose driven brands that align with Eloura Creative’s mission and values.



We are looking for a highly capable Creative Lead who can grow long term with our company.



This is not a basic video editor role.



We need someone who understands short form video, direct response advertising, hooks, pacing, brand alignment, North American consumer psychology, UGC style content, emotional buying triggers and performance creative.



Our clients care deeply about their brands. They are often founder led, mission driven and sensitive to tone, values and brand fit. Because of this, we need someone who can create content that does not just look good, but actually feels aligned with the brand and the customer.



About Eloura Creative

Eloura Creative is founded by Jason and Megan.

Jason is based in Melbourne, Australia, and brings over twenty years of face to face sales experience, buyer psychology and client communication.



Megan is from Canada and brings a North American perspective to brand alignment, tone, customer sensitivity and client communication.



Together, we are building a creative agency for brands that people genuinely care about.



We also pledge to donate two percent of all revenue to Wildlife Warriors, the legacy foundation of the late Steve Irwin and the Irwin family.



The work they have done for wildlife conservation is incredible. As much as we would love to be out there wrestling crocs ourselves, we think it may be safer helping from the comfort of our office.



The person who joins us in this role will become a real part of that mission.



Our Culture and Long Term Vision

Eloura Creative is not being built as a cold, high pressure agency. We are building a company with purpose, personality, warmth, humour and a genuine passion for the brands we work with.

We want our team to enjoy the work they do. Happiness, work life balance, respect, clear communication and long term growth are extremely important to us.



We believe people do their best creative work when they feel valued, trusted and supported.



For the right person, this is not just another editing contract. This is an opportunity to become the first Creative Lead of a new agency and help shape the creative department from the beginning.



Over time, this role may develop into Head of Creative, where you would help guide editors, maintain creative standards and shape the creative direction of Eloura Creative as the company grows.



Annual compensation reviews will be considered to reflect your value, contribution and growth within the business.



We always want to make sure we are looking after our team properly, not just using people transactionally. If someone helps us build this company, we want them to feel valued, respected and genuinely rewarded for the part they play.



Our goal is to build long term relationships with our team, not churn through freelancers. We want people who feel proud to be part of Eloura Creative and excited about where the company is heading.



The Role

Initially, you will be paid 500 USD per client per month.

We are a new business and are currently in the process of onboarding clients. We are seeking applicants who are comfortable with a one client at a time approach at the beginning, with the goal of growing into a full client schedule.



As Eloura Creative grows, your client portfolio will increase gradually. This may begin with one client, then two, then three, and eventually a full portfolio of around four to five clients per month, depending on workload and complexity.



At full capacity, this means your expected monthly income would be approximately 2000 to 2500 USD per month.



As we grow, we will hire our first editor. At that stage, you will help oversee the editor, maintain creative quality, and continue managing the creative direction across your client portfolio.



Depending on workload, we may also hire a second Creative Lead.



We want this role to be sustainable. We care about work life balance because quality creative work suffers when people are overloaded. Our goal is to build a long term team where people are paid well, treated properly and given room to grow.



This is a contract role. You are free to manage your own projects in your own time, provided client work for Eloura Creative is delivered reliably and to a high standard.



Once a client is onboarded, we would need you available to begin on reasonable notice.



Your Duties

Your role will include:

Reviewing client brands, products, websites, customer reviews, existing ads and social channels.



Understanding the client’s brand voice, customer base, values and emotional buying triggers.



Identifying weak hooks, poor pacing, unclear calls to action, weak product framing and missed creative opportunities.



Developing short form video ad concepts for Meta, TikTok, Instagram and other paid social platforms.



Writing and improving hooks for short form ads.



Creating creative briefs, scripts, ad structures and shot direction.



Editing short form video ads yourself in the early stage when required.



Guiding UGC style ads, product led ads, founder led ads, testimonial ads, problem solution ads and emotionally driven ad formats.



Creating multiple hook variations and creative angles for testing.



Reviewing and improving editor work once editors are hired.



Maintaining creative quality across every client.



Working closely with Jason and Megan to make sure the creative direction is aligned with the client’s goals and brand identity.



Thinking strategically about what will stop the scroll, earn trust and help the client convert more customers.



You Must Be Strong At

Short form video ads.

DTC ecommerce creative.



Meta and TikTok ad formats.



UGC style content.



Direct response creative.



Hook writing.



Storytelling.



Editing for retention and conversion.



Brand alignment.



North American branding and consumer expectations.



Understanding why people buy.



Explaining your creative decisions clearly.



Taking ownership without needing constant instruction.



North American Brand Understanding Is Important

Our clients are North American DTC brands.

Many of them are passion driven brands where the customer cares about values, ethics, identity, lifestyle, pets, health, beauty, sustainability or emotional connection.



This means the creative cannot feel generic.



You must understand how North American brands communicate, what feels authentic to their audience, what feels forced, and how to adapt creative so it feels natural in that market.



Megan, our Canadian co founder, will also be involved in helping guide this area, but we need a Creative Lead who already has a strong instinct for North American branding.



Pay and Growth

This is a contract role.

Initially, you will be paid 500 USD for each client you manage per month, the more clients you manage, the more you earn, we reward you for your creative work, not to micro-manage you by the hour.



As Eloura Creative grows, your client portfolio will increase gradually. We are currently in the process of onboarding clients, so this may begin with one client, then two, then three, and eventually a full portfolio of around four to five clients per month, depending on workload.



At full capacity, this means your expected monthly income would be approximately 2000 to 2500 USD per month.



Once we reach that level, we may hire our first editor. At that stage, you will help oversee the editor, maintain creative standards, and continue managing the creative direction across your client portfolio.



We believe in rewarding strong people. Retention incentives and performance based structures may be introduced as the company grows.



We want our key team members to feel they have the opportunity to maximise their income and have genuine long term upside.



Annual compensation reviews will be considered as the business grows and your value to the company increases.



As we grow, there may also be opportunities to work on premium tier clients, where the workload may be lower in volume but the expectation for strategic quality and results will be higher.



We are not looking for someone who only wants a short term editing job. We are looking for someone who wants to help build something.



Who This Is For

This role may suit you if:

You love short form creative and genuinely care about the quality of your work.



You think like a strategist, not just an editor.



You understand that great creative is not just about making something look nice.



You can explain why a hook works or why it fails.



You understand emotional buying triggers.



You are comfortable working with a new agency as it grows from the ground up.



You like the idea of joining early and growing with the company.



You want to be part of something fun, ambitious and purpose driven.



You care about animals, wildlife, ethical brands, sustainability or brands with a deeper mission.



You want long term opportunity, not just another short term contract.



Application Requirements

Applications without the required task will not be considered.

Please include the following:



Your portfolio of short form video ads.



Your resume or work history.



Your availability.



Your expected turnaround time for client work.



A short introduction explaining why this role interests you.



Any experience you have with DTC ecommerce, pet brands, beauty brands, plant based brands, sustainable brands or North American clients.



Your answer to the application task below.



Application Task

Please choose one existing DTC ecommerce video ad from a pet, beauty, plant based food, wellness, lifestyle or sustainable brand.

Then answer the following:



One. What is the brand and product?



Two. Who do you think the target customer is?



Three. What is the hook in the first three seconds?



Four. Is the hook strong or weak? Explain why.



Five. What emotional trigger is the ad using?



Six. What would you change to make the ad perform better?



Seven. Write three stronger alternative hooks for the same product.



Eight. Outline a better thirty second version of the ad.



Nine. If you were briefing an editor, what would you tell them to focus on?



Ten. Include a link to the original ad if possible.



Demo Video Requirement

Please also record a short two to five minute video introducing yourself.

In the video, please answer:



Why are you interested in this role?



What makes a short form ad perform well?



What is one common mistake you see brands making with video ads?



Why do you think you would be a strong Creative Lead for Eloura Creative?



This does not need to be professionally edited. We are not judging production quality. We simply want to hear how you think, how you communicate and how clearly you can explain creative ideas.



How To Apply

Please send your application with the subject line:

Creative Lead Application, Eloura Creative



Include:



Your portfolio.



Your work history.



Your availability.



Your application task.



Your short demo video.



A short explanation of why you would like to grow with Eloura Creative.



Final Note

We are early in our launch, but we are serious about building this properly.

If you are the sort of person who loves what you do, thinks deeply about creative, wants to grow with a company, and wants to be part of something bigger than ordinary agency work, we would love to hear from you.



If you have any questions, please feel free to contact me anytime at:

title: Technical Support Representative for Security Camear(Wifi camera&4G Camera)

- A team player with a positive attitude

- A university education

- A stable internet connection, reliable power supply, and a quiet environment



What do you get from us?

- Competitive salary

- Double pay on public holidays

- 5 days of annual paid leave

- Additional bonuses

- Work-from-home options (available in any location in the Philippines)

title: Senior Frontend Developer
description:
Company Overview

Ultra Labs is a U.S.-based business incubator/accelerator that focuses on software/tech-based businesses. We are currently seeking a talented Senior Frontend Engineer to join our team and contribute to the development of cutting-edge solutions across multiple complex business applications.



As a Senior Frontend Engineer, you’ll work on sophisticated enterprise applications including MSP management platforms, educational technology systems, and multi-tenant SaaS applications. This role requires both deep technical expertise and the ability to understand complex business domains.



Development Environment Requirements

Platform Preference (Important)

_Preferred: macOS or Linux developers

_Acceptable: Windows developers with demonstrated WSL2 proficiency

_We operate a BYOD (Bring Your Own Device) contractor model. Our team is primarily Mac/Linux-based, and our development workflows are optimized for Unix-like environments.



Required technical comfort:

_SSH configuration and key management (~/.ssh/config)

_SSH tunneling for secure development and database access

_Advanced Git workflows (rebasing, cherry-picking, complex merge strategies)

_Command-line proficiency and shell scripting

_Environment management across multiple projects



For Windows developers specifically:

_Active WSL2 usage (not just installed) with Ubuntu or similar

_Comfortable working between Windows and Linux environments

_Experience with cross-platform development challenges

_Ability to troubleshoot environment-specific issues independently



Technical Stack Overview

Primary Technologies

_React 17/18 with TypeScript and modern hooks patterns

_Redux Toolkit & RTK Query for state management and API integration

_Ant Design with Styled Components for UI development

_AWS Amplify for authentication and cloud services

_Complex build systems (CRACO, Webpack customization)



Integration Requirements

_AWS Services: Cognito, S3, CloudFront

_Payment Processing: Stripe integration

_Maps & Location: Google Maps API

_Third-party APIs: Various business service integrations

_Database connectivity: Multiple backend systems



Project Complexity Examples

_MSP Platform: 1,168+ TypeScript files, complex business workflows

_Educational Platform: Multi-application monorepo architecture

_Enterprise Features: Role-based access, multi-tenant architecture



Core Responsibilities

Frontend Architecture & Development

_Design and implement scalable React applications with TypeScript

_Build and maintain complex Redux state management systems

_Develop responsive, accessible user interfaces using Ant Design

_Optimize application performance for large datasets and real-time updates

_Collaborate with UX/UI designers to implement pixel-perfect, user-friendly interfaces



Integration & API Development

_Work closely with backend developers on Java and Python FastAPI applications

_Integrate frontend components with server-side logic across multiple tech stacks

_Implement secure authentication flows with AWS Cognito

_Build robust error handling and loading states for API interactions



Business Domain Implementation

_Translate complex business requirements into intuitive user interfaces

_Understand and implement domain-specific workflows (MSP, educational management)

_Build sophisticated forms, tables, and data visualization components

_Ensure cross-browser compatibility and optimize for various devices



Code Quality & Collaboration

_Participate in code reviews and maintain high coding standards

_Write comprehensive unit and integration tests

_Document complex components and architectural decisions

_Mentor junior developers on React best practices and business domain knowledge



Required Qualifications

Core Technical Skills

_5+ years of React development experience with hooks, context, and advanced patterns

_Strong TypeScript proficiency - complex type definitions, generics, utility types

_Redux Toolkit expertise - RTK Query, async thunks, normalized state patterns

_Advanced JavaScript/ES6+ - modern language features and best practices

_CSS/Styling mastery - Styled Components, responsive design, CSS-in-JS



Essential Experience

_3+ years with complex business applications - B2B SaaS, enterprise software

_Component library development - reusable, composable architecture

_State management at scale - large applications, performance optimization

_API integration experience - RESTful APIs, error handling, caching

_Testing frameworks - Jest, React Testing Library, unit/integration testing



Development Environment

_Excellent spoken and written English

_Advanced Git proficiency - complex workflows, conflict resolution

_Build tools experience - Webpack, npm/yarn, modern toolchains

_Unix/Linux command line comfort (or WSL2 for Windows users)

_SSH and network configuration - tunnels, key management, config files



Collaboration & Process

_Agile/Scru
thodology experience

_Strong problem-solving skills and debugging abilities

_Excellent time management and ability to meet deadlines consistently

_Fast-paced environment adaptability

_Open to feedback and continuous learning mindset



Strongly Preferred (Polyglot Mindset)

Multi-Language Experience

We highly value polyglot programmers who demonstrate depth across multiple technologies:

_Backend awareness: Understanding of Java Spring Boot or Python FastAPI

_Scripting capabilities: Python for automation, data processing, or tooling

_Full-stack thinking: Ability to work across the entire application stack

_Technology adaptability: Track record of learning new languages/frameworks



Evidence we look for:

_GitHub/portfolio showing multiple programming languages

_Understanding of language-appropriate design patterns

_Ability to choose the right tool for each task

_Experience bridging frontend/backend communication effectively



Advanced Technical Preferences

_AWS ecosystem experience - Amplify, S3, Lambda, infrastructure knowledge

_Performance optimization - bundle analysis, runtime performance, memory management

_Accessibility expertise - WCAG compliance, screen reader support

_Testing strategy - E2E testing (Cypress), visual regression testing

_DevOps awareness - CI/CD pipelines, deployment strategies



Domain Experience (Nice-to-Have)

_MSP/Service Desk knowledge - ticketing systems, time tracking, invoicing workflows

_Educational technology - registration systems, workshop management

_Multi-tenant architecture - organization-specific customization, role-based access

_Payment processing - Stripe integration, subscription management



Experience Level: Senior (5-7+ years)

_This role requires senior-level expertise due to:

_Codebase complexity - Large, interconnected applications with 1000+ components

_Architecture responsibilities - Making decisions that impact multiple applications

_Business domain complexity - Deep understanding of industry-specific workflows

_Integration challenges - Multiple third-party services and backend systems

_Performance requirements - Optimization for enterprise-scale usage



Success Metrics

Technical Delivery

_Ship complex features on schedule with minimal post-release bugs

_Maintain high code coverage and pass all automated quality checks

_Keep bundle sizes optimized and page load times under target thresholds

_Contribute to architectural decisions that improve long-term maintainability



Business Impact

_Deliver intuitive interfaces for complex business workflows

_Become proficient in domain-specific business processes and terminology

_Collaborate effectively with product managers and stakeholders

_Support the team’s ability to scale and take on larger projects



Team Contribution

_Mentor junior developers and contribute to knowledge sharing

_Participate actively in code reviews and architectural discussions

_Help establish and maintain development best practices

_Contribute to tooling and process improvements



What Makes This Role Unique

Technical Challenges:

_Work with multiple complex codebases simultaneously

_Balance performance, maintainability, and feature velocity

_Design applications that are inherently testable - clear component boundaries, predictable state management

_Implement comprehensive testing strategies - unit, integration, and E2E coverage for business-critical workflows

_Navigate the intersection of frontend excellence and business domain expertise

_Solve integration challenges across diverse technology stacks



Growth Opportunities:

_Gain expertise in multiple business domains (MSP, EdTech, SaaS)

_Work with cutting-edge React patterns and architectural approaches

_Influence technical decisions across multiple product teams

_Develop polyglot skills across our Java and Python backend systems



Impact:

_Your work directly enables business success for our portfolio companies

_Build systems that scale to serve thousands of users across multiple organizations

_Contribute to products that solve real-world business problems in growing industries



Application Instructions:

Please apply directly through OnlineJobs.ph. Applications sent via
 will not be considered and will be automatically rejected.



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Hubspot Expert
description:
Ultra Labs is searching for a proactive, highly organized Marketing Manager to support and strengthen our marketing operations across multiple projects and brands. Ultra Labs is a U.S.–based Business Incubator/Accelerator focused on software and tech-driven businesses.



We are searching for a proactive, highly organized HubSpot Expert to support and strengthen our marketing operations across multiple projects and brands. This role goes beyond platform management. You'll take ownership of our HubSpot ecosystem, ensure smooth execution across campaigns, and support data-driven decision making for a portfolio of fast-moving businesses.



The ideal candidate is independent, detail-oriented, and highly accountable, with a strong command of HubSpot's CRM, workflow automation, and reporting capabilities. If you thrive in a dynamic, multi-brand environment and love turning messy processes into clean, scalable systems, we'd love to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities

_CRM Management: Own and maintain the HubSpot CRM across multiple brands, ensuring data integrity, accurate segmentation, and clean contact and company records.

_Workflow & Automation: Design, build, and continuously optimize automated workflows for lead nurturing, deal progression, task assignments, and internal notifications.

_Pipeline Management: Set up and manage sales pipelines, deal stages, and custom properties aligned with each brand's unique sales process.

_Integrations: Configure and manage integrations between HubSpot and third-party tools (e.g., Slack, Zapier,
 platforms, and other MarTech solutions).

_Reporting & Dashboards: Build custom reports and dashboards to track KPIs across marketing, sales, and customer success and translate that data into actionable insights.


 Marketing: Create and manage
 campaigns, sequences, and templates that drive engagement and support funnel progression.

_User Training & Support: Onboard tea
mbers across brands to HubSpot and provide ongoing guidance on best practices and platform updates.

_Process Improvement: Regularly audit existing setups, identify inefficiencies, and implement improvements to keep operations running at peak performance.



Requirements

_3–5 years of hands-on HubSpot experience across Marketing Hub, Sales Hub, and/or Service Hub.

_Proven track record building workflows and automation that drive real business outcomes.

_Strong understanding of CRM best practices, including data hygiene, contact segmentation, and lifecycle stage management.

_Experience managing HubSpot integrations with third-party tools via native connectors or Zapier.

_Ability to build custom reports and dashboards that support strategic, data-driven decisions.

_HubSpot certifications (e.g., HubSpot Marketing Software, CRM, Sales Hub) are a strong plus.

_Solid understanding of sales and marketing funnels in a B2B or SaaS context.

_Strong analytical mindset with excellent problem-solving skills.

_Clear, confident communicator who can collaborate across multiple teams and brands simultaneously.



Nice to Have

_Experience with HubSpot Operations Hub (data sync, custom coded actions).

_Familiarity with HTML/CSS for
 and landing page customization.

_Background in digital marketing, sales operations, or revenue operations (RevOps).

_Prior experience working within an agency, incubator, or multi-brand environment.

title: Webflow Developer / Designer
description:
About ZINT



ZINT is a B2B sales intelligence platform based in London. We help revenue teams identify, score, and prioritise the accounts most likely to convert, using a proprietary methodology called the DIAMOND Framework.

We are repositioning our website to speak to a senior buyer: CROs, VPs of Sales, and Heads of Revenue Operations at mid-market and enterprise companies. The current site was built for individual sales reps evaluating a prospecting tool. The new site needs to position ZINT as a strategic platform that solves an account selection problem, not a lead generation feature set.

This is a meaningful project. The homepage is the front door for our entire go-to-market motion.



The Project



We need a Webflow specialist to rebuild our marketing website (
), starting with the homepage and extending to key pages. The copy, positioning, and section structure have been defined. We need someone who can translate that strategic direction into a production-quality Webflow build.



Phase 1: Homepage rebuild

 • Implement new hero section with problem-led messaging (copy provided)

 • Build section-by-section layout: reframe, CRO dashboard proof point, how-it-works cards, social proof, and CTA

 • Apply ZINT brand system: Midnight Navy, Steel Blue, and Lime palette, geometric sans-serif typography, clean editorial aesthetic

 • Responsive design across desktop, tablet, and mobile

 • Integrate with existing CMS collections where applicable

 • Optimise page speed and Core Web Vitals



Phase 2: Supporting pages (scope TBC)

 • Platform/features page

 • Pricing page refresh

 • DIAMOND Framework landing page

 • Contact/demo booking page



What We Are Looking For



Must have:

 • 3+ years of hands-on Webflow development (not just design, we need someone comfortable with CMS, interactions, and custom code embeds)

 • Strong portfolio of B2B or SaaS marketing sites built in Webflow (send links, not screenshots)

 • Ability to take a written brief with section-by-section copy and translate it into a polished, conversion-focused layout

 • Understanding of responsive design best practices and page performance optimisation

 • Clean, organised Webflow project structure (sensible class naming, reusable components, style guide compliance)

 • Reliable communication in English and comfortable working asynchronously with a UK-based team



Nice to have:

 • Experience with Webflow Localize or multi-language setups

 • Familiarity with analytics and tracking setup (GA4, GTM, conversion pixels)

 • Motion design skills (Webflow interactions, Lottie animations, scroll-triggered effects)

 • Basic graphic design capability for creating section illustrations or data visualisation mockups

 • Experience working with B2B companies selling to enterprise or mid-market buyers



How You Will Work

 • You will report to Josh (CEO) and collaborate closely

 • Briefs will be provided as written documents with section copy, structural direction, and brand guidelines

 • You will have access to the ZINT Brand Book (v3.0) with full colour specs, typography rules, and layout principles

 • Communication via Slack (async daily updates, responsive within UK business hours)

 • Weekly 30-minute check-in call to review progress and align on priorities



How to Apply



Send a message through Onlinejobs.ph with the following:

 • Links to 3 Webflow sites you have built (live URLs, not Behance mockups)

 • A short paragraph explaining which of those sites you are most proud of and why

 • Your availability to start and weekly hours you can commit

 • Your monthly rate expectation in PHP



Applications that do not include portfolio links will not be reviewed. We are looking for builders, not templaters.

This is a remote, part-time position focused on execution, testing, and improving performance over time. You will work closely with the owner and help scale winning products through structured campaigns and strong creatives.



---



About Us  

We run a growing e-commerce brand focused on dog products. Our goal is to build a strong, emotional brand with high-converting creatives and consistent ad performance.



---



Your Responsibilities

- Set up and manage Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns

 & Instagram Ads Manager)

title: Part-Time Remote Technical CAD / CNC Designer — PET Felt Acoustic Products
description:
About AllSfär:

AllSfär designs and manufactures acoustic products for commercial interiors. Our products are mainly made from PET felt board and CNC cut in our UK factory.



Role:

We are looking for a part-time remote Technical CAD / CNC Designer based in the Philippines to support our UK design and production team. The role involves creating accurate cutting files and technical drawings for CNC-machined PET felt products.



Main tasks:

Create CNC-ready cutting files from customer drawings, sketches, or internal briefs.

Produce accurate 2D and 3D CAD drawings, DXF files, and customer approval drawings.

Adapt existing product designs to suit bespoke project requirements.

Check dimensions, quantities, cut types, sheet layouts, and manufacturability.

Work from AllSfär templates and follow our internal design standards.

Raise questions clearly where information is missing or a design is not practical.

Support the UK team with revisions, file updates, and simple technical documentation.



Required skills:

Strong CAD skills using: AutoCAD, Pcon or similar.

Experience creating DXF / CNC cutting files.

Good understanding of sheet materials, nesting, tolerances, and manufacturable design.

Strong attention to detail.

Able to work independently and communicate clearly in English.

Reliable internet connection and ability to overlap with UK working hours.



Useful but not essential:

Experience with CNC knife cutting, router cutting, laser cutting, or sheet-based fabrication.

Experience with furniture, interiors, acoustic products, joinery, signage, or architectural products.

Ability to produce simple 3D visuals or assembly drawings.



Hours

Part-time freelance to start, likely 15–25 hours per week, with scope to increase.



Trial task

Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a paid trial task creating a cutting file and customer approval drawing from a sample brief.



To apply please send:

CV or profile

Examples of CNC / DXF / CAD work

Software used

Hourly rate

Availability and preferred working hours

title: Ecommerce Executive (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Manage Seller Center)
description:
Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.



Key Responsibilities:



- Oversee day-to-end e-commerce operations (catalog, price checks, campaign execution, inventory management, shipping, logistics, customer service and returns) for the Seller Center Stores and the international House of Hur accounts across Singapore, Malaysia, Taiwan, and Vietnam.

- Manage product listings across online platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop), ensuring accuracy, quality, and completeness (basic photo editing and product research).

- Monitor pricing strategies within Margin Chart, Platform Ads (Shopee, Lazada, Tiktok Seller Center) and campaign promotions (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Payday Sales) to drive sales growth performance.

- Analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management with business insights and clear strategies.

- Maintain overall e-commerce account health, coordinating with teams to resolve customer service issues, refunds, returns, and fraud cases.

- Collaborate with team and provide ad-hoc support for special events and projects.



Qualifications:



- 2–4 years of hands-on experience managing e-commerce operations on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Seller Centre or Bigseller Account, or similar is required.

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.





Benefits:

- Stable full time with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Opportunity to be part of a growing team and Korean Beauty Brands.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore during events.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as the Philippines.

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.







We appreciate your interest and look forward to hearing from you!

title: GoHighLevel Expert
description:
Zen Companies Inc. is Hiring: GoHighLevel (GHL) Expert – Office-Based in Cagayan de Oro



Location: Cagayan de Oro City

Employment Type: Full-time (On-site)

Schedule: Monday to Friday



About Us

Zen Companies Inc. is a U.S.-based company with a growing and talented team here in the Philippines. We’re expanding our operations in Cagayan de Oro City and looking for a dedicated GoHighLevel (GHL) Expert to join our in-house marketing automation team.



About the Role

We are looking for a full-time, skilled GoHighLevel (GHL) Expert in the Philippines to set up, manage, optimize our CRM and marketing automation systems, and scale our white-label agency operations. This role requires the candidate to work on-site at our clubhouse office located in Cagayan de Oro City, Philippines.



Key Responsibilities

title: Customer Success Manager
description:
IMPORTANT: Applications that do not follow our instructions below (7 steps) will not be reviewed.



About the role:



You'll manage our Skool community day-to-day — engaging with current members and new members, running onboarding calls, and guiding members to the right resources. Your primary success metric is retention: helping new clients feel supported, stay engaged, and get real results. When direct support is needed, you'll schedule calls with the community owner on their behalf.



Responsibilities:



- Engage with current members and new students daily inside the Skool community

- Conduct onboarding calls for new members and identify their sticking points in conversation and social skills

- Guide members to the right resources and escalate to the owner when needed

- Build and maintain clear SOPs for this role so it can be trained and replicated as the community grows

- Help cultivate a positive, fun, and engaging community environment



Requirements:



- Fluent in English (spoken and written).

- Strong communicator — comfortable managing different types of clients and personalities.

- Able to create clear, replicable SOPs.

- Comfortable working in the self-improvement / dating and social skills space.

- Skool platform experience is a plus, but not required — it's easy to learn.



How to apply:

Note: Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



1.
 your application to 

2. Use subject line: CSM - [Your Name] - [Date]  ·  e.g. CSM - Michelle - April
. Include a brief intro about yourself and why you'd be a great fit.

4. Experience with Skool platform is a bonus so let us know if you have any

5. What is your expected monthly salary?

6. Answer: How would you handle a client who feels overwhelmed by the amount of content and doesn't know where to start ?

7. Optional: include a video or voice recording introducing yourself — this helps us assess your communication style and client-interaction skills.

title: Paid Ads Manager
description:
Job description:



Position Overview



We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Paid Ads Manager / Agency Manager to oversee our law firm’s paid marketing efforts. This role is responsible for managing relationships with external advertising agencies, monitoring performance metrics, and ensuring all paid campaigns align with ethical standards and business objectives. The ideal candidate has strong experience in paid digital advertising, agency coordination, and KPI-driven performance management.



Key Responsibilities



Agency Oversight:

Supervise all paid advertising agencies (Google Ads,
/Meta, LinkedIn, etc.)

Conduct regular check-ins and strategy sessions with agency partners

Ensure agencies have the resources, assets, and information they need to succeed

Performance Monitoring:

Track and analyze key performance indicators (KPIs), including:

Cost per Lead (CPL)

Cost per Opportunity (CPO)

Cost per Deal (CPD)

Evaluate campaign effectiveness and ensure metrics are meeting targets or trending positively

Prepare performance reports and present key findings to the Director of Marketing

Creative Review and Compliance:

Review and approve all ad creatives and copy before launch

Ensure all advertising materials comply with legal marketing ethics and internal protocols

Collaborate with legal and compliance teams when necessary

Strategic Input:

Provide insights and recommendations to improve ad performance and ROI

Stay up-to-date with platform changes, advertising trends, and regulatory requirements

Contribute to the overall growth strategy of the firm’s marketing department

Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Advertising, Communications, or related field

3+ years of experience managing paid ad campaigns (law firm or professional services experience preferred)

Experience working with or managing marketing agencies

Proficient in paid media platforms (Google Ads, Meta Business Suite, LinkedIn Ads, etc.)

Strong analytical skills with experience using reporting tools (Google Analytics, Looker Studio, etc.)

Excellent communication and project management skills

Familiarity with legal advertising rules and ethical guidelines is a plus

Preferred Skills



Experience with CRM and lead tracking tools (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce)

Ability to manage budgets and allocate spend for maximum ROI

Knowledge of A/B testing, landing page optimization, and retargeting strategies

WHY JOIN ASHOORI LAW



Work for one of the top-rated U.S. immigration law firms



Fully remote work environment



Be part of a mission-driven, diverse, and supportive team



Opportunities for growth and professional development



Competitive compensation and performance incentives

, SMS, pipelines, reminders)

Monitoring, Troubleshooting & Optimization

title: media manager marketer
description:
(Media + Growth Operations Unit — Elevate Today Ecosystem)

Location: Remote / Global

Type: Full-time

Level: Senior / Lead (Multi-Brand Growth Architect)

???? About the Role



We are seeking a Head of Media & Growth to own the entire attention, narrative, and conversion architecture across a multi-brand ecosystem including:



Elevate Today (media engine)

Elevate Today Club (identity + subscription layer)

PPF (high-ticket transformation offers)

Synergy Labs (product authority layer)

Labs 18 (experimental/product storytelling layer)



This is not a content management role.



This is a systems-level growth position responsible for designing and controlling how attention is converted into revenue across multiple brands and funnels.



You will operate at the intersection of media strategy, behavioural psychology, funnel engineering, and performance analytics.



???? Core Responsibilities

1. Cross-Brand Narrative Architecture

Design and maintain unified narrative systems across all brands

Ensure strict separation of messaging between identity, product, and transformation layers

Control how each brand interacts with different audience stages

2. Funnel & Conversion System Design

Build end-to-end conversion systems (attention ?
 ? offer ? purchase ? retention)

Architect funnel pathways based on audience intent and behaviour

Optimise CTA sequencing and landing page conversion logic

3. Content System Engineering

Design structured content ecosystems across:

Short-form (TikTok / Reels)

Authority content (YouTube / podcast)

Conversion content 
 / landing pages)

Retention content 
 / community systems)

Ensure all content serves measurable funnel outcomes

4. Performance & Revenue Analytics

Analyse CAC, LTV, CTR, retention, and funnel performance

Identify high-performing traffic sources and eliminate inefficiencies

Translate behavioural data into strategic decisions

5. Offer Positioning & Value Engineering

Shape product perception across all tiers:

Identity entry offers (Club)

Transformation systems (PPF)

Utility/performance products (Synergy Labs)

Improve conversion through positioning and framing

6. Cross-Channel Growth Coordination

Align messaging and execution across:

Social media platforms

 systems (CRM)

 distribution layers

Landing pages and checkout flows

Ensure unified revenue direction across all touchpoints

7. System Optimisation & Feedback Loops

Use performance data to continuously refine funnels

Identify drop-off points and conversion bottlenecks

Implement rapid iteration cycles for growth improvement

???? Required Skills

Advanced understanding of funnel architecture and conversion systems

Strong grasp of performance marketing metrics (CAC, LTV, ROAS, CRO)

Experience in multi-brand positioning or ecosystem design

High-level understanding of consumer psychology and decision-making triggers

Ability to design or direct content systems, not just content creation

Proficiency in interpreting analytics and behavioural data

Strong copywriting and conversion optimisation awareness

Experience working across multi-channel digital ecosystems

???? Ideal Candidate Profile

Thinks in systems, not posts

Understands revenue flows, not engagement metrics

Comfortable operating across strategy, analytics, and execution oversight

Can separate and manage multiple brand identities simultaneously

Highly analytical with strong creative-commercial balance

Obsessed with optimisation, conversion, and scalability

???? What This Role Is NOT

Not a social media manager

Not a content scheduler

Not a basic marketing role

Not engagement-focused

Not limited to platform-specific execution

???? Why This Role Exists



This role exists to engineer and control the entire growth system, ensuring that every piece of media, content, and communication directly contributes to measurable revenue outcomes across a multi-brand ecosystem.

title: CONSTRUCTION BOOKKEEPER & AP/AR SPECIALIST
description:
CONSTRUCTION BOOKKEEPER & AP/AR SPECIALIST

Confidential — Luxury Residential Construction Company (Los Angeles, CA)About UsWe are a family-owned luxury custom home builder based in Los Angeles, California. We build high-end homes in some of the most desirable neighborhoods in the city, with project values in the $1M–$3M+ range. We are growing fast — we currently have multiple active builds and a strong pipeline of upcoming projects.We treat our team like family, we pay fairly, and we reward performance with bonuses. The right person here will grow with us for years — this is a long-term role, not a short-term gig.The RoleYou will be our dedicated Construction Bookkeeper & AP/AR Specialist — the financial backbone of our operations. You will own the day-to-day bookkeeping, accounts payable, accounts receivable, and financial documentation for every active project and the company overall.You will work closely with our outside CPA (who handles tax strategy, monthly close review, and year-end filings) and our office manager. You will be the person who makes sure every dollar in and every dollar out is accurately recorded, every invoice is collected on time, and every vendor is paid correctly.This role requires absolute accuracy, discretion, and reliability. You will see all of our financial data — contracts, payments, vendor pricing, profit margins, payroll. A signed NDA will be required before onboarding.Work Schedule

Hours: 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM Pacific Standard Time (PST), Monday through Friday (40 hours/week, with a 1-hour unpaid break)

For you in the Philippines: approximately 10:00 PM – 7:00 AM the following day (Manila time)

Why this schedule: You need real-time overlap with our office manager, our CPA, and US banking systems. Most US banks, vendors, and clients respond during 8 AM – 5 PM PST.

Live overlap: Full overlap with our team in California during their workday.

This schedule is non-negotiable. We need someone whose body clock can adapt to a true overnight Manila shift long-term — please do not apply if you cannot commit to this.What You Will DoDaily Bookkeeping



Enter every invoice (vendor, subcontractor, supplier) into QuickBooks Online and our internal Google Sheets system within 24 hours of receipt

Categorize every expense correctly to the right job, cost code, and account

Enter every client payment, deposit, and progress payment as it's received

Match every credit card transaction to its receipt and categorize correctly

Maintain the company's chart of accounts cleanly and consistently

Accounts Payable



Manage the full AP process — receive invoices, verify against POs and contracts, route for approval, schedule payment

Coordinate with the Estimator/Purchasing Manager and Project Manager to verify work completion before payments are released

Maintain the AP aging report — never let a vendor go unpaid past terms

Track all vendor payment terms (Net 15, Net 30, etc.) and capture early payment discounts whenever available

Process check runs, ACH payments, and wires as approved by management

Accounts Receivable



Generate and send client invoices on schedule per each contract's billing schedule

Track every invoice from issuance through payment

Run a weekly AR aging report and chase overdue invoices proactively (drafting follow-up
s for the CEO to send)

Apply payments to invoices correctly — partial payments, retainage, mobilization fees, deposits

Maintain a clean AR ledger per project

Job Cost Accounting & WIP



Track every dollar spent against every job's budget — labor, materials, subs, permits, soft costs

Maintain real-time job cost reports per project

Calculate and maintain Work-in-Progress (WIP) reporting for every active job — earned revenue, billed-to-date, costs-to-date, percent complete

Flag any job trending over budget early so management can intervene

Coordinate monthly with the CPA to ensure WIP is correctly reflected in financials

Reconciliation & Month-End Close



Reconcile every bank account weekly

Reconcile every credit card statement weekly

Coordinate with the CPA on monthly close — ensure all transactions are entered, categorized, and reconciled by the 5th of each month

Prepare monthly P&L and balance sheet summaries for management review

Maintain clean financial records for year-end tax prep

Compliance & Documentation



Maintain a clean digital filing system in Google Drive — every invoice, receipt, contract, and payment record stored and searchable

Track and maintain vendor W9s, COIs, business licenses, and contractor licenses

Prepare annual 1099s for every contractor and vendor that requires one

Track sales tax, use tax, and any applicable local tax obligations

Coordinate with our CPA on quarterly estimated tax payments

Reporting



Send a daily end-of-shift summary
 to the CEO covering: (a) invoices entered, (b) payments processed, (c) AR collected, (d) AR overdue and follow-up sent, (e) bank balances, (f) any anomalies or red flags

Send a weekly Friday financial report covering: cash position, AR aging, AP aging, weekly cash flow summary, and any issues requiring CEO attention

Send a monthly close report by the 5th of each month covering: P&L, balance sheet, job cost summary, WIP report

Requirements

3+ years bookkeeping or accounting experience. You must have prior experience as a bookkeeper, AP/AR specialist, or staff accountant. Experience in construction, real estate, or project-based industries strongly preferred.

QuickBooks Online expertise. You must be fluent in QBO — chart of accounts, classes, items, jobs, projects, reports. We will test this in the interview.

Construction accounting knowledge (strongly preferred). Experience with job costing, WIP accounting, retainage, progress billing, AIA-style invoicing, lien waivers, and contractor 1099s is a major plus.

Excel/Google Sheets fluency. You must be able to build and maintain complex spreadsheets — pivot tables, SUMIF formulas, lookups, conditional formatting. We use Google Sheets heavily alongside QBO.

Excellent written English. You will be drafting AR follow-up
s, vendor inquiries, and client communications. Your writing must be professional and clear. We will test this.

Numerical accuracy. Bookkeeping mistakes are not acceptable. One miscategorized expense or misapplied payment cascades into bigger problems. Attention to detail is non-negotiable.

Discretion and trustworthiness. You will see all of our financial data — every contract, every margin, every vendor cost, every payment, payroll. NDA required. We do background checks.

Reliable workspace. Stable high-speed internet, backup power, quiet workspace, working webcam, modern computer with dual monitors strongly preferred.

Schedule commitment. You must be able to consistently work 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM PST (overnight in Manila) long-term. Confirm in your application that this works for you.

Available immediately. We are hiring for an immediate start.

Bonus Points

Prior bookkeeping experience for a U.S. construction company or general contractor

Familiarity with Buildertrend, CompanyCam, or Procore financial modules

Experience with mechanic's lien processes and California lien waiver requirements

Background in accounting (degree, CPA, or equivalent certification)

Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) for drafting and analysis

What We Offer

Competitive hourly pay (we will discuss based on experience — senior construction bookkeepers earn at the top of our range)

Performance-based bonuses tied to: (a) clean monthly closes by the 5th, (b) AR collected within terms, (c) zero accounting errors per quarter, (d) cost savings identified

Long-term, stable role with a rapidly growing company

Real career growth — as our company scales, this role grows into a Controller or Finance Manager position

Direct mentorship from the CEO and our outside CPA

A respectful, family-owned culture that treats remote tea
mbers like real teammates

How to ApplyTo be considered, your application must include all of the following:

A short paragraph explaining why this role fits you and why you can handle the 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM PST schedule (overnight in Manila) long-term

A list of companies you have done bookkeeping for, the industry, the company size, and your specific role

A short paragraph describing your experience with QuickBooks Online — what features you use most, what you find tricky, and your favorite reports to run

A short paragraph describing your experience (if any) with construction accounting, job costing, or WIP — even basic exposure counts

A short paragraph describing one time you caught a financial error before it cost a company money

Confirmation that you understand the schedule and can commit to it long-term

Your expected hourly rate in USD

Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed. We are looking for someone meticulous, accurate, and trustworthy — your application is the first test.We look forward to meeting you and growing together.

title: OUTBOUND SALES RESEARCHER & LEAD GENERATION VA
description:
OUTBOUND SALES RESEARCHER & LEAD GENERATION VA

Confidential — Luxury Residential Construction Company (Los Angeles, CA)



About Us

We are a family-owned luxury custom home builder based in Los Angeles, California. We build high-end homes in some of the most desirable neighborhoods in the city, with project values in the $1M–$3M+ range. We are growing fast — we currently have multiple active builds and a strong pipeline of upcoming projects.

We treat our team like family, we pay fairly, and we reward performance with bonuses. The right person here will grow with us for years — this is a long-term role, not a short-term gig.



The Role

You will be our Outbound Sales Researcher & Lead Generation specialist — the engine that fills our sales pipeline with high-quality referral partners and prospects.

You will spend your days researching, building, and personalizing outreach lists across LA's luxury real estate ecosystem: agents, architects, interior designers, real estate attorneys, lenders, and family office contacts. You will also monitor public building permit data daily to identify homeowners who are about to start a custom build — and help us reach them through the right channels.

This is a research-and-outreach role, not a closing role. You build the pipeline. The CEO and Sales Coordinator handle the calls and closes.

A signed NDA will be required before onboarding.



Work Schedule



Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Standard Time (PST), Monday through Friday (40 hours/week, with a 1-hour unpaid break)

For you in the Philippines: approximately 11:00 PM – 8:00 AM the following day (Manila time)

Why this schedule: You will be researching US-based contacts and sending
s during US business hours for best response rates.

Live overlap: Full overlap with our team in California during their workday.



This schedule is non-negotiable. We need someone whose body clock can adapt to a true overnight Manila shift long-term — please do not apply if you cannot commit to this.



What You Will Do

List Building & Research



Build and maintain curated lists of high-value referral partners across Los Angeles, including:



Luxury residential real estate agents (focus: Compass, The Agency, Coldwell Banker Global Luxury, Hilton & Hyland, Sotheby's, Douglas Elliman) specializing in $3M+ listings in Malibu, Pacific Palisades, West LA, Beverly Hills, Bel Air, Brentwood, Santa Monica

Luxury residential architects and architecture firms designing $2M+ custom homes

High-end interior designers serving the LA luxury market

Real estate and construction attorneys

Mortgage brokers and lenders specializing in jumbo and construction loans

Wealth managers and family offices in West LA





Research each contact deeply — recent listings, recent projects, awards, social media presence, mutual connections — so every outreach feels personal, not generic



Public Permit & Records Monitoring



Daily monitoring of City of Los Angeles, Malibu, Beverly Hills, and surrounding municipalities' building permit databases

Flag every new SFR (single-family residence) permit pulled in our target neighborhoods

Identify the architect, owner, and contractor on each permit

Build a weekly "active builds intelligence" report for the CEO



Outreach Personalization



For every contact, draft a personalized first-line opener referencing their specific recent work (recent listing, recent project, recent press)

Use approved
 templates as the body, but every
 must have a custom personalization line — no generic blasts

Send 30–50 outreach
s per day from our dedicated outbound domain through our outreach platform (Instantly, Smartlead, or similar — we will set this up)

Manage replies — flag warm/positive replies for the CEO and Sales Coordinator to take over the conversation



LinkedIn Support



Manage LinkedIn outreach to high-value architects, designers, and agents

Send connection requests with personalized notes

Engage thoughtfully with target contacts' posts (likes, comments) to warm them up before outreach

Track every LinkedIn touchpoint per contact



CRM Management



Maintain our GoHighLevel CRM (or HubSpot) with every contact, every touchpoint, every reply, every status change

Set follow-up reminders so no contact ever falls through the cracks

Build automated
 sequences for cold, warm, and re-engagement campaigns

Generate weekly outreach metrics:
s sent, open rates, reply rates, meetings booked



Reporting



Send a daily end-of-shift summary
 to the CEO covering: (a) lists built/updated, (b)
s sent, (c) replies received, (d) permits flagged, (e) any high-value warm leads

Send a weekly Friday outreach report covering: total outreach volume, open/reply rates, top warm leads, list health, and recommendations for next week's focus





Requirements



2+ years experience in B2B lead generation, sales research, or outbound SDR work. You must have prior experience building lists and running personalized cold outreach. Tell us specifically what industries you've targeted.

Excellent written English. Your personalization lines and
s will go out to luxury real estate professionals who notice every word. Your writing must read like a native English speaker. We will test this in the interview.

Strong research skills. You should be comfortable digging through Compass, Zillow, Redfin, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, ZoomInfo, Apollo, Clay, public permit databases, and architectural firm websites.

Tech fluency. Gmail, Google Sheets, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo or ZoomInfo (or similar), Instantly or Smartlead (or similar outbound tools), GoHighLevel or HubSpot CRM.

Detail orientation. Bad data in your lists wastes everyone's time. Good data wins deals.

Discretion. You will see our pipeline, contacts, and outreach strategy. NDA required.

Reliable workspace. Stable high-speed internet, backup power, quiet workspace, working webcam, modern computer.

Schedule commitment. You must be able to consistently work 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST (overnight in Manila) long-term. Confirm in your application that this works for you.

Available immediately. We are hiring for an immediate start.





Bonus Points



Experience targeting U.S. real estate, construction, or luxury services industries

Familiarity with Los Angeles real estate market or California property records

Background in marketing, journalism, or research

Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Clay, etc.) to research and personalize at scale





What We Offer



Competitive hourly pay (we will discuss based on experience)

Performance-based bonuses tied to: (a) outreach volume, (b) reply rates, (c) qualified meetings booked for the CEO, (d) closed deals attributable to your outreach

Long-term, stable role with a rapidly growing company

Real career growth — as our pipeline scales, this role grows into a Sales Operations Manager or Head of Outreach position

Direct mentorship from the CEO

A respectful, family-owned culture that treats remote tea
mbers like real teammates





How to Apply

To be considered, your application must include all of the following:



A short paragraph explaining why this role fits you and why you can handle the 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST schedule (overnight in Manila) long-term

A list of companies you have done lead generation or sales research for, the industry, and the type of contacts you targeted

A sample personalized cold
 opener — pick a real Los Angeles luxury real estate agent (Google one, doesn't matter who), research them for 15 minutes, and write the first 2 sentences of an
 you would send them on behalf of a luxury custom home builder

Confirmation that you understand the schedule and can commit to it long-term

Your expected hourly rate in USD



Applications missing any of the above — especially the sample cold
 opener — will not be reviewed. The opener IS the test for this role. We are looking for someone who can research and write at a level that earns replies from busy luxury professionals.



We look forward to meeting you and growing together.

title: Customer Service Supervisor (On-site | Cebu) – High Earning Potential
description:
Job Opening: Customer Service Supervisor (Customer Service + Technical Support)



Location: Philippines Cebu 

Position Type: Full-Time



Job Summary



Manage a combined team including Sales Customer Service, and After-Sales Team.

Responsible for customer satisfaction, sales inquiry performance, order receiving, after-sales issue handling, and technical support for DTF printers.

Coordinate closely with the China team for troubleshooting, parts replacement, and optimal solutions.



Key Responsibilities



1. Team Management



        •        Manage and supervise the Sales Customer Service, and After-Sales tech support teams.



        •        Set daily/weekly/monthly targets and ensure team performance meets company standards.



        •        Monitor workload, assign tasks, and ensure all tea
mbers follow company rules and processes.



2. Sales & Customer Service



        •        Oversee customer inquiries via phone calls, live chat, and messages.



        •        Be responsible for inquiry-to-sales conversion and sales performance.



        •        Follow up on customer calls, track customer needs, and ensure high service quality.



3. After-Sales Support



        •        Handle customer after-sales complaints, requests, and issues.



        •        Analyze customer problems and assign appropriate cases to technical support.



        •        Ensure issues are tracked and closed properly.



4. Technical Support (for DTF Printer)



        •        Provide basic to intermediate technical diagnosis for DTF printer issues (printing problems, nozzle issues, software errors, machine malfunctions).



        •        Arrange parts replacement and component shipping based on fault diagnosis.



        •        Communicate and coordinate with the China technical team to find the best and fastest solutions.



        •        Record technical cases and summarize common issues for process improvement.



6. SOP & Documentation



        •        Organize daily workflow and build and update SOPs for customer service, receiving, after-sales, and technical support.



        •        Standardize scripts, reply templates, and troubleshooting guides.



7. Recruitment & Training



        •        Conduct interviews and hiring for customer service, receiving, and after-sales roles.



        •        Provide onboarding training and regular skill training for the team.



8. Quality Inspection & Supervision



        •        Check daily work of all tea
mbers to ensure compliance with company policies and standards.



        •        Monitor service quality, response time, and work efficiency.



Requirements



        •        Fluent in English (spoken & written); 



        •        Experience managing customer service, receiving, or after-sales teams in the Philippines.



        •        Familiarity with DTF printers, printing equipment, or similar technical products is highly preferred.



        •        Ability to perform technical troubleshooting, diagnose machine problems, and arrange parts replacement.



        •        Experience coordinating with overseas (China) teams is a strong advantage.



        •        Able to create SOPs, train tea
mbers, and manage performance.

title: Expert Digital Marketing Specialist
description:

About the Role

We are looking for a senior digital marketing specialist to manage paid advertising, sales funnels and marketing automation for a growing Australian professional services firm. This is a part-time, ongoing role (10–20 hours per week) suited to someone who can operate autonomously with minimal direction.



You will own the full digital marketing function, from ad strategy and execution through to lead nurture and conversion. We need someone who can think strategically, move quickly and deliver results without hand-holding (And get results!)



Core Requirements

You must have proven, expert-level experience across all of the following:

-
/Meta Ads management (campaign setup, audience targeting, retargeting, optimisation and reporting) - this will be the primary job

- Google Ads management (Search, Display and YouTube campaigns)

- Sales funnel build and management (landing pages, lead magnets, opt-in flows)

- GoHighLevel (GHL) setup, workflow automation, pipeline management and integrations

 sequences

-
 campaign management and automation within GHL

What We Expect

- You communicate proactively. Weekly updates, flagging issues early and recommending next steps without being asked.

To Apply

 Ads, Google Ads and GHL specifically
