Generic applications will not be considered. We are looking for genuine expertise, not generalists.

title: MARKETING & CONTENT COORDINATOR
description:
MARKETING & CONTENT COORDINATOR

Confidential — Luxury Residential Construction Company (Los Angeles, CA)



About Us

We are a family-owned luxury custom home builder based in Los Angeles, California. We build high-end homes in some of the most desirable neighborhoods in the city, with project values in the $1M–$3M+ range. We are growing fast — we currently have multiple active builds and a strong pipeline of upcoming projects.

We treat our team like family, we pay fairly, and we reward performance with bonuses. The right person here will grow with us for years — this is a long-term role, not a short-term gig.



The Role

You will be our Marketing & Content Coordinator — the brand engine for our company. You will own the day-to-day execution of our content marketing across every platform: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, our
 newsletter, and our case study library.

You will work closely with our outside content partner (who handles photography, videography, and Meta ads) and the CEO. Your job is to make sure every piece of content we produce gets maximally repurposed, properly captioned in our voice, scheduled, posted, and converted into pipeline.

This is an execution-heavy role, not a creative-strategy role. The strategy is set with the CEO. You execute relentlessly.

A signed NDA will be required before onboarding.



Work Schedule



Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Standard Time (PST), Monday through Friday (40 hours/week, with a 1-hour unpaid break)

For you in the Philippines: approximately 11:00 PM – 8:00 AM the following day (Manila time)

Why this schedule: You will be coordinating with our US-based content partner, monitoring social media engagement during US peak hours, and engaging with leads in real time.

Live overlap: Full overlap with our team and content partner in California during their workday.



This schedule is non-negotiable. We need someone whose body clock can adapt to a true overnight Manila shift long-term — please do not apply if you cannot commit to this.



What You Will Do

Content Calendar Management



Maintain a master content calendar across all platforms — Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn,
, Pinterest

Plan content themes weekly and monthly aligned with our active projects, completed homes, and CEO's brand priorities

Brief our content partner (photographer/videographer) on what we need captured each week from active jobsites



Content Repurposing



Take every long-form video our content partner produces and chop it into 8–10 platform-specific pieces — Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn videos, carousel posts, story content

Edit short-form video using CapCut, Descript, or similar — captions, b-roll, music, hooks

Pull stills from videos for static social posts

Maintain a master content library in Google Drive — every raw asset, every edited piece, every published version



Caption Writing & Voice



Write every caption in the CEO's voice (we will train you on this — expect heavy revisions in the first 2 weeks)

Tailor caption length and tone per platform — short and punchy on TikTok, longer and more thoughtful on LinkedIn, conversational on Instagram

Always include relevant hashtags, location tags, and CTAs



Social Media Management



Schedule all content using Buffer, Later, or Metricool

Monitor DMs across every platform — respond to fan engagement, route legitimate leads to the Sales Coordinator and CEO

Engage thoughtfully on behalf of our brand — respond to comments, like and comment on relevant industry accounts (architects, designers, agents, past clients)

Track competitor activity and flag content trends worth jumping on



Case Study Library



For every completed project, build a polished case study — project overview, timeline, design highlights, before/after photos, client testimonial, key challenges solved

Maintain the library in Google Drive and on our website

Repurpose case studies into multi-week content series across platforms



 Newsletter



Build and grow our
 list of past clients, agents, architects, designers, and prospects

Send a monthly company newsletter — recent projects, design tips, market insights, CEO commentary

Maintain segmentation (past clients, referral partners, prospects) for targeted campaigns

Track open rates, click rates, and reply rates per send



Reviews & Testimonials



After every project completion, coordinate with the Client Concierge (or directly with the client) to capture a Google Review, written testimonial, and short video testimonial

Manage our presence on Google, Yelp, Houzz, and any other relevant review platforms

Build a testimonial library in multiple formats — text, video, image-overlay social posts



PR & Brand Building



Identify guest podcast opportunities, local press features, and industry award submissions for the CEO

Coordinate submissions for awards (NAHB, Houzz Pro, Best of LA, etc.)

Maintain a press kit with CEO bio, company overview, project highlights, and high-resolution photos



Reporting



Send a daily end-of-shift summary
 to the CEO covering: (a) content posted, (b) engagement highlights, (c) DMs responded to, (d) leads routed, (e) any platform issues

Send a weekly Friday marketing report covering: post performance, follower growth, engagement metrics, top content, lead attribution from social

Send a monthly performance review covering: overall growth across platforms, what's working, what's not, recommendations





Requirements



3+ years social media or content marketing experience. You must have prior experience managing brand social accounts. Tell us specifically what brands or industries you've worked with.

Strong portfolio of social content. Provide links to social accounts you've personally managed or content you've produced. We will evaluate your taste and execution.

Video editing fluency. You must be comfortable with CapCut, Adobe Premiere Rush, Descript, or similar tools to chop long-form video into short-form social content.

Excellent written English. Your captions will represent our brand to thousands of luxury prospects. Your writing must be sharp, native-fluent, and adapt to multiple platform tones. We will test this in the interview.

Design eye. While you're not designing from scratch, you should have a strong sense of luxury aesthetics — what reads as high-end vs. what reads as cheap.

Tech fluency. All major social platforms, Buffer/Later/Metricool, CapCut/Premiere/Descript, Canva, Google Drive, Google Sheets,
 marketing tools (Mailchimp, ConvertKit, GoHighLevel), and ideally Adobe Photoshop and Lightroom basics.

Detail orientation. Typos in captions, wrong tags, broken links — all kill the brand. Mistakes are not acceptable.

Discretion. You will see our marketing strategy, client information, and project data. NDA required.

Reliable workspace. Stable high-speed internet, backup power, quiet workspace, working webcam, modern computer.

Schedule commitment. You must be able to consistently work 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST (overnight in Manila) long-term. Confirm in your application that this works for you.

Available immediately. We are hiring for an immediate start.





Bonus Points



Experience marketing for U.S. luxury brands, real estate, construction, or design industries

Photography or videography skills (you'd direct our content partner more effectively)

Experience running paid social ads (Meta Ads, Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads)

Background in journalism, copywriting, or branding

Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, ElevenLabs) to produce content faster





What We Offer



Competitive hourly pay (we will discuss based on experience)

Performance-based bonuses tied to: (a) follower growth across platforms, (b) engagement rate, (c) leads attributed to social/content, (d) consistent on-time content delivery

Long-term, stable role with a rapidly growing company

Real career growth — as our brand scales, this role grows into a Marketing Director position

Direct mentorship from the CEO

A respectful, family-owned culture that treats remote tea
mbers like real teammates





How to Apply

To be considered, your application must include all of the following:



A short paragraph explaining why this role fits you and why you can handle the 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST schedule (overnight in Manila) long-term

Links to 2–3 social media accounts you have personally managed (or content you've personally produced) — we want to see your work, not your resume

A list of brands or companies you have done social/content work for, the industry, and your specific role

A sample Instagram caption you would write for this hypothetical post: a behind-the-scenes video of a framing crew working on a $2.5M Pacific Palisades custom home. Write the caption in a confident, founder-driven voice — not corporate.

A short paragraph describing one social campaign you ran that you're most proud of and the results

Confirmation that you understand the schedule and can commit to it long-term

Your expected hourly rate in USD



Applications missing any of the above — especially the sample caption — will not be reviewed. The caption IS the test. Anyone can list software they know. The caption shows us your taste, voice, and brand judgment.



We look forward to meeting you and growing together.

title: SALES COORDINATOR & PIPELINE MANAGER
description:
SALES COORDINATOR & PIPELINE MANAGER

Confidential — Luxury Residential Construction Company (Los Angeles, CA)



About Us

We are a family-owned luxury custom home builder based in Los Angeles, California. We build high-end homes in some of the most desirable neighborhoods in the city, with project values in the $1M–$3M+ range. We are growing fast — we currently have multiple active builds and a strong pipeline of upcoming projects.

We treat our team like family, we pay fairly, and we reward performance with bonuses. The right person here will grow with us for years — this is a long-term role, not a short-term gig.



The Role

You will be our Sales Coordinator & Pipeline Manager — the operational engine that keeps every prospect, every proposal, and every relationship moving forward.

You are NOT a salesperson. The CEO does the selling. Your job is to make sure no warm lead ever cools off because of a missed follow-up, no proposal sits unread for 30 days, and no warm relationship gets dropped because the CEO got busy on a job.

You will own the sales pipeline operationally — from the 
nt a qualified lead lands in our CRM through the 
nt a contract is signed and handed off to the project team.

A signed NDA will be required before onboarding.



Work Schedule



Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Standard Time (PST), Monday through Friday (40 hours/week, with a 1-hour unpaid break)

For you in the Philippines: approximately 11:00 PM – 8:00 AM the following day (Manila time)

Why this schedule: You will be coordinating with US-based prospects and our CEO's calendar. Most luxury client conversations happen during US business hours.

Live overlap: Full overlap with our team and prospects in California during their workday.



This schedule is non-negotiable. We need someone whose body clock can adapt to a true overnight Manila shift long-term — please do not apply if you cannot commit to this.



What You Will Do

Lead Qualification & Triage



Review every inbound lead within 4 business hours of arrival — referrals, social DMs, website inquiries, partner introductions, outbound responses

Send the standard pre-qualifying questionnaire to every new lead — budget range, lot status, timeline, location, design direction, decision-makers

Score leads on fit before they hit the CEO's calendar — only qualified leads get scheduled

Politely decline or refer out leads that aren't a fit (too small budget, no lot, unrealistic timeline)



Calendar Coordination



Schedule discovery calls, jobsite walks, and proposal presentations on the CEO's calendar

Send calendar invites with dial-in info, addresses, and prep materials

Send 24-hour and 1-hour reminders to every client meeting

Reschedule aggressively when conflicts arise — never let a lead lose interest because we missed a window



Proposal Coordination



Once the CEO drafts a proposal (or our Estimator drafts a 70% version), you finalize formatting, branding, and assembly

Send proposals to clients with a personalized cover
 and clear next steps

Track every proposal sent — date sent, status, last touch, next follow-up due

Follow up on every proposal at 3 days, 7 days, 14 days, and 30 days with personalized check-ins drafted in the CEO's voice



CRM Management (GoHighLevel)



Maintain a clean, current pipeline in GoHighLevel — every lead, every contact, every touchpoint, every stage change

Build automated
 sequences for cold, warm, and re-engagement leads

Generate weekly pipeline reports — leads by stage, deal value, conversion rate, time-in-stage

Flag stalled deals for the CEO's attention before they go cold



Referral Partner Nurture



Maintain a separate "referral partner" pipeline in CRM — agents, architects, designers, past clients, repeat referrers

Send quarterly check-in
s to every referral partner — even if they haven't sent a lead in months

Send thank-you gifts and notes when referrals convert (you handle ordering and delivery)

Track which partners send the most leads so the CEO can nurture top referrers personally



Pre-Construction Handoff



Once a contract is signed, run the formal sales-to-build handoff: package contract, scope, allowances, plans, design selections, and client preferences for the Project Manager and Estimator

Schedule the kickoff meeting between the client, CEO, PM, and Designer

Update CRM with the closed-won status and project info



Reporting



Send a daily end-of-shift summary
 to the CEO covering: (a) new leads received, (b) leads qualified and disqualified, (c) meetings scheduled, (d) proposals sent, (e) follow-ups sent, (f) status changes, (g) any urgent items

Send a weekly Friday pipeline report covering: total pipeline value, deals by stage, conversion rates, top opportunities, stalled deals needing CEO attention, referral partner activity

Send a monthly pipeline review covering: closed deals, lost deals (with reasons), pipeline velocity, and recommendations for next month





Requirements



2+ years sales operations, sales coordinator, or SDR experience. You must have prior experience managing a B2B or high-ticket sales pipeline. Tell us specifically what industries you've worked in.

Excellent written English. Your follow-up
s will go out under the CEO's name to luxury clients. Your writing must read like a confident, polished American professional. We will test this in the interview.

Verbal English fluency. You may join client calls occasionally to take notes. Clear, confident spoken English is required.

CRM expertise. You must be fluent in GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce, or Pipedrive — building pipelines, automations, reports, and workflows.

Tech fluency. Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Sheets, Calendly, Zoom, GoHighLevel, Loom, and ideally e-signature tools like DocuSign.

Detail orientation. Sales coordination is 100?out not dropping balls. One missed follow-up costs us a $2M deal.

Process-driven mindset. You love checklists, follow-up sequences, and clean pipelines.

Discretion. You will see every deal, every margin, every client conversation. NDA required.

Reliable workspace. Stable high-speed internet, backup power, quiet workspace, working webcam, modern computer.

Schedule commitment. You must be able to consistently work 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST (overnight in Manila) long-term. Confirm in your application that this works for you.

Available immediately. We are hiring for an immediate start.





Bonus Points



Prior experience supporting a U.S. founder, executive, or sales team

Experience in real estate, construction, luxury services, or high-ticket B2B sales

Background in customer success or account management

Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to draft and personalize follow-ups faster





What We Offer



Competitive hourly pay (we will discuss based on experience)

Performance-based bonuses tied to: (a) qualified meetings booked for the CEO, (b) proposal conversion rate, (c) pipeline velocity, (d) closed deals attributable to your follow-up

Long-term, stable role with a rapidly growing company

Real career growth — as our pipeline scales, this role grows into a Sales Operations Manager or Director of Sales position

Direct mentorship from the CEO

A respectful, family-owned culture that treats remote tea
mbers like real teammates





How to Apply

To be considered, your application must include all of the following:



A short paragraph explaining why this role fits you and why you can handle the 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST schedule (overnight in Manila) long-term

A list of companies you have done sales operations or sales coordination for, the industry, and the type of pipeline you managed

A sample 14-day follow-up
 — pretend a luxury client received our $2.4M custom home proposal 14 days ago and hasn't responded. Write the follow-up
 you would send on behalf of the CEO. Make it warm, professional, and effective.

A short paragraph describing one time you saved a deal that was about to go cold by being proactive

Confirmation that you understand the schedule and can commit to it long-term

Your expected hourly rate in USD



Applications missing any of the above — especially the sample follow-up
 — will not be reviewed. The follow-up
 IS the test. We are looking for someone whose writing wins replies from busy luxury clients.



We look forward to meeting you and growing together.

title: Property Sourcer — Real Estate Experience Required | 28th Street Agency
description:
Who We Are

28th Street Agency is a B Corp certified buyer's agency helping Australians buy strategically — not emotionally. We specialise in borderless property investing, targeting high-growth markets across Australia, often before deals reach public listings.

We assess every suburb across 105+ data points. Every deal we close funds real change — through our EmpowerHER initiative and our support of Catherine House women's shelter. Standards are non-negotiable here.



The Role

This is not a passive data-entry role. You will be the engine behind our sourcing pipeline — identifying opportunities, matching properties to active briefs, maintaining our off-market database, and keeping our agent network warm through regular outreach and mailouts.

You will work directly with the buyer's agents. The pace is fast, the expectations are high, and the work genuinely matters.



What You'll Do

* Source on-market, pre-market, and off-market listings and match them to active client briefs with precision.

* Conduct property-level due diligence — overlays, flood and fire risk, zoning, flight paths, comparable sales, and rental appraisals.

* Prepare suburb reports covering yield, days on market, vacancy rates, infrastructure pipelines, and growth indicators using HTAG, Archistar, Pricefinder, and Microburbs.

* Maintain clean, fully documented records in 
 across all active properties and briefs.

* Build and manage our agent relationship database and coordinate the weekly off-market mailout to our broker network.



What You Bring

* Two or more years in Australian real estate, property sourcing, or a buyer's agency environment.

* Hands-on experience with Pricefinder, HTAG, Microburbs, Domain, and REA.

* Strong written and spoken English — you represent the business in every communication.

* The ability to run multiple active briefs simultaneously without losing accuracy or 
ntum.

* A systems mindset — clean data, tight processes, zero dropped balls.



The Conditions

* Full-time, fully remote. Philippines-based candidates strongly preferred.

* Adelaide business hours required (ACST) — this is a real-time role, not async.

* Leave entitlements provided to Australian standards.

* Your birthday off, paid. Natural disaster leave included.

* Clear KPIs. Direct access to leadership. No bureaucracy.



To Apply

Send your CV and a short cover note — tell us what you bring to a high-output sourcing role and why 28th Street appeals to you. Generic applications go straight to the bin.

title: Senior Google Ads Specialist (E-commerce)
description:
About the job:

Kranis B.V. is seeking an experienced and results-driven Google Ads specialist to fully manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns for multiple Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) websites.



Key responsibilities:

 - Develop, present, and implement a clear Google Ads strategy with defined milestones (ROAS, CPA, etc.)

 - Daily management, optimization, and performance reporting.

 - Independently identify opportunities, proactively communicate missing assets or requirements, and resolve them ahead of time.

Required experience:

 - Minimum of 5 years direct Google Ads experience (No general VAs, No Amazon-focused advertisers).

title: Sound Designer (Part-time)
description:
About Us

We are looking for a part-time Sound Designer for our YouTube channels:

• 

• 

We make documentary-style videos that explain complex stories in a clear and engaging way.



Role Overview

This role focuses on creating immersive, cinema-quality sound design for our videos. You will design, record, and mix audio elements, including foley, ambient sounds, and original compositions, to bring military operations and technical machinery to life. You will work on 3 videos per week, each 12–20 minutes long, delivering final audio within 24 hours of receiving AAF files.



Key Responsibilities

• Design and implement advanced soundscapes that match scripts and visuals

• Create and integrate custom foley for realistic environmental sounds

• Compose original audio elements and musical cues to enhance storytelling

• Mix dialogue, music, effects, and ambient sounds into cohesive final tracks

• Work with AAF files from video editors and return audio in stems format

• Maintain consistent audio quality and style across all channel content

• Collaborate closely with editors and producers; share WIPs and incorporate feedback

• Track tasks and deliverables in team management tools



Minimum Requirements

• 5+ years of professional sound design experience

• Expert-level proficiency in Pro Tools and advanced skills in Adobe Audition

• Expert understanding of sound design principles, mixing, and mastering

• Experience with foley recording and implementation

• Ability to compose original audio elements and musical cues

• Proven track record with documentary, film, or high-end YouTube content

• Experience with military, action, or technical content (preferred)

• Strong communication and time management skills to meet 24-hour turnaround requirements



Nice to Have

• Home studio setup for professional sound recording

• Knowledge of authentic military audio and technical machinery sounds

• Interest in defense, aviation, or military history



Contract & Hours

• Part-time contractor (20 hours per week)

• Fully remote

• Daily overlap with Cyprus business hours

• Must deliver 3 videos per week with 24-hour turnaround

• Potential to transition to full-time with fixed salary and increased video volume



Compensation

• Base Salary: $400 USD per month

• Performance Bonuses: Up to $300 USD per month

title: E-Commerce Marketing & Video Editing Assistant for German Market Ads
description:
We are Media Mega Commerce LLC, an e-commerce company looking for a reliable and creative part-time assistant to support us with marketing, video editing, and ad creation for the German market.



Your main responsibilities will include:



- Editing short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 Ads, and other social media platforms

- Creating engaging video ads for e-commerce products

- Creating and adapting ads for the German market

- Writing or adapting German ad hooks, captions, subtitles, and marketing angles

- Using ChatGPT, translation tools, or your own preferred workflow to make German ads sound natural and suitable for German-speaking customers

- Helping with basic marketing tasks such as competitor research, product research, content ideas, and ad angle research

- Supporting our team with creative ideas for new campaigns

- Organizing files, creatives, and marketing assets

- Working with clear instructions and delivering tasks on time



We are looking for someone who is detail-oriented, creative, reliable, and willing to learn. Experience with e-commerce brands, TikTok-style videos, dropshipping, Shopify, Canva, CapCut, Premiere Pro,
 Ads, TikTok Ads, or similar tools is a plus.



It is important to us that you are able to create ads for the German market. You do not need to be a native German speaker, but you should be comfortable adapting video ads, captions, hooks, subtitles, and marketing angles for German-speaking customers. You can use ChatGPT, translation tools, or your own preferred workflow, as long as the final result is natural, clear, and suitable for the German market.



This is a long-term opportunity if the collaboration works well.



Requirements:



- Good English communication skills

- Experience with video editing

- Basic understanding of social media marketing

- Ability to create and adapt ads for the German market

- Comfortable using ChatGPT, translation tools, or another workflow to create German ad texts, captions, hooks, and creatives

- Reliable internet connection

- Ability to follow instructions carefully

- Willingness to learn and improve



When applying, please include:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your previous video editing or marketing experience

3. Examples of videos or creatives you have made

4. The tools you use for editing

5. Your experience with creating ads for international or German-speaking markets

6. Your expected hourly rate

title: MSP Service Delivery and Operations Lead
description:
Hi there!



We're searching for a highly motivated and detail-oriented MSP Service Delivery & Operations Lead to join our remote team. 



This remote position offers an exciting opportunity for you to contribute to our client's success while enjoying the freedom and flexibility of a work-from-home lifestyle.



If you're passionate about helping others succeed and want to grow your career in a dynamic and supportive environment, then read on…







== WHY WORK WITH US ==



Make a Difference at Pro Sulum: An Award-Winning Company Where You Matter.



We're not just about accolades (like being on the Inc. 5000 list) - we're about empowering our team to create real impact. At Pro Sulum, your contributions matter, and your unique talents are valued. Join a company that fosters personal growth, celebrates individuality, and champions success for all.





-> Benefits:

 * Competitive salary (Php 30,000 to Php 40,000) depending on experience

 * Pay Increase Opportunity Every 6 Months

 * Weekly Pay

 * Paid Service Incentive Leaves

 * Monthly Incentives

 * Referral Incentives

 * Virtual Company Events

 * Dynamic, fun, and supportive team

 * Full-time role as an independent contractor (not BPO)

 * Long-term opportunity with career growth and advancement





== THE POSITION ==



As the MSP Service Delivery & Operations Lead for a consultancy and strategic partner company, you’ll play a key role in keeping daily operations running smoothly and ensuring high-quality service delivery.



Your primary focus will include managing ticket workflows, enforcing SLA standards, handling client escalations, and maintaining clear, accurate documentation. You’ll also support executive operations, coordinate across teams, and assist with basic reporting and operational tracking.



You’ll work closely with leadership, clients, and internal teams to ensure accountability, clear communication, and consistent execution. If you’re organized, proactive, and confident in managing operations in a fast-paced environment, this role offers strong growth potential.





-> Requirements:

• Strong operations or service delivery experience, ideally within a managed services, IT, or similar environment.

• Proven ability to manage workflows, enforce processes, and make independent operational decisions.

• Excellent communication skills with the ability to handle escalations, set expectations, and coordinate across teams and clients.

• Experience with PSA tools (e.g., Autotask) and general familiarity with ticketing systems and SLA management.

• High level of organization, accountability, and attention to detail in fast-paced environments.

• Ability to analyze operational and basic financial data and surface insights to leadership.

• Technically proficient enough to understand and triage IT, networking, or service-related issues.

• Available to work full-time (40 hrs/wk).

• Can work during standard US business hours.

• Fast, stable internet connection (Minimum download speed 10 Mbps).

• Working computer/laptop (Minimum Requirement: Processor - Intel i5 or equivalent, RAM - 8GB).

• Backup power source or work location for power outages.





-> Nice to Have:

• Experience with tools such as Autotask, QuickBooks, MS Excel, Slack, and other service or project management platforms.

• Background in managed IT services, cybersecurity, or ISP-related environments.

• Experience supporting executives, managing calendars, inboxes, or client communications.

• Familiarity with basic financial reporting, reconciliation, and vendor coordination.





-> Responsibilities:

Duties and Responsibilities include but are not limited to:

• Oversee PSA and ticket operations, ensuring proper prioritization, SLA adherence, documentation quality, and overall workflow discipline

• Act as the primary escalation point for service and customer issues, ensuring timely resolution and clear communication

• Provide operational leadership and guidance to service coordination, balancing priorities, capacity, and client expectations

• Monitor performance trends, identify workflow or resourcing issues, and recommend improvements to leadership

• Support operational and financial tracking, including basic reporting, data reconciliation, and vendor or order coordination

• Manage executive support functions such as calendar, inbox, reporting, and client/vendor communication

• Ensure consistent follow-through on tasks, deadlines, and deliverables across teams

• Coordinate logistics, assets, and documentation to support smooth day-to-day operations across the business





-> About You:

For this position, the successful candidate will have/be:

* High Attention to Detail: You are accurate, consistent, and thorough in your work. 

* Dependable & Trustworthy: You complete tasks on time and follow through on your commitments.

* Resourceful & Proactive: You tackle challenges head-on and solve problems independently.

* Great Communicator: You excel in both written and verbal English communication.





== HOW TO APPLY ==



Ready to join us? Apply now and unlock your future with Pro Sulum!



If you are interested in this position and believe you have the qualities listed above to be successful, please complete this Google Form and FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS carefully.



APPLY HERE >>>



 - Due to the high volume of applications we receive, only candidates selected for further consideration will be contacted to move forward in the hiring process.

 - If you're a good fit for the role, you'll receive an
 from the Pro Sulum Recruitment Team within 1-2 weeks.



Congratulations on taking the first step towards a rewarding career with Pro Sulum! We're excited to learn more about you and explore the possibility of you joining our team.

title: Web Agency General Manager - Full Time
description:
Role: Full-Time General Manager (Web & App Agency)

Company: Dorset Tech (
 )

Working Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM UK Time (4pm - midnight Manilla Time), Monday to Friday (40 hours per week)

Location: Remote



The Role

We are seeking a highly capable and commercially minded General Manager to run the day-to-day operations of our agency. You will be the owner's right-hand person, taking full ownership of the company's daily functions so the owner can focus exclusively on product and project development.



This is a senior leadership role. You will manage the remote team (including our Project Managers, Developers, and Designers), handle all customer escalations, and ensure the financial health of the business. Because you will be the face of the company for many of our UK clients, exceptional English communication skills and a talent for sales and negotiation are essential.



Key Responsibilities

• Day-to-Day Leadership: Run the daily operations of the agency, ensuring all departments (development, design, SEO, support) are functioning efficiently and meeting targets.

• Team Management & Training: Manage the entire remote team, including conducting performance reviews, identifying skill gaps, and delivering or coordinating staff training.

• Customer Relations: Act as the highest point of escalation for customer complaints, resolving issues swiftly and professionally to maintain our excellent reputation.

• Sales & Enquiries: Handle incoming sales enquiries, pitch our services (web design, app development, SEO, hosting), and close deals. A strong commercial mindset is crucial here.

• Financial Oversight: Manage day-to-day cashflow, monitor profitability on projects, and ensure the agency remains financially healthy.

• Reporting: Provide the owner with clear, concise, and accurate reports on company performance, sales metrics, and operational bottlenecks.



Requirements

• Executive Experience: Proven experience as a General Manager, Operations Director, or similar senior leadership role, preferably within a digital agency, web development, or tech environment.

• Commercial Acumen: You must be comfortable with sales. You don't need to be a high-pressure salesperson, but you must be able to confidently discuss technical solutions with clients and close inbound leads.

• Financial Literacy: Experience managing cashflow, budgets, and basic financial reporting.

• Exceptional English: Great spoken and written English. You must be highly articulate and persuasive when speaking with UK clients and handling sensitive complaints.

• Availability: Must be available to work from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM UK time (which is 4:00 PM to 12:00 AM / Midnight in the Philippines), Monday through Friday.

• Leadership Skills: A natural leader who can inspire, train, and hold a remote team accountable.



About Dorset Tech

We are Dorset's number one web design agency, and we are on a mission to disrupt the web design industry. We pride ourselves on offering the lowest rates in the country without compromising on quality, serving over 2,000 active support customers. We build everything from budget pay-monthly sites to full custom Laravel systems and Flutter mobile apps.



Beyond our technical expertise, we are a social enterprise and a carbon-negative company. We power our office with solar energy, drive electric cars, and plant a tree for every review we receive. If you want to lead a company that genuinely cares about its community and the planet, while delivering top-tier digital solutions, Dorset Tech is the place for you.



How to Apply

Please apply with your CV and a cover letter detailing your experience running day-to-day business operations and handling sales. Important: Please include a short audio or video recording introducing yourself and explaining why you are the right person to lead Dorset Tech.

title: HIRING Full-Time Video Editor for 7 Figures Supplement Brand
description:
About Us

We’re a fast-growing DTC brand in the health supplement space, scaling to 30K days with performance-driven creatives. Every ad we launch is backed by data and crafted to convert. We’re looking for a video editor who not only edits but also thinks like a marketer - someone who wants to grow, push limits, and create winning ads at scale.



The Role

We’re hiring a Video Editor who can consistently deliver high-performing Meta video ads (30–120s). This is a long-term, remote role with $4 start salary which increase if hit rate is on target. Also introducing performance bonuses in 2nd month.



What You’ll Do

- Edit high-converting ads for Meta & Google (30–120s)

- Apply strong hooks, pacing, captions, and transitions

- Work with UGC, b-roll, and AI-generated content (Heygen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana and VEO3)

- Test UGC-style videos, TikTok-style ads, AI visuals, and VSLs

- Analyze performance data & iterate quickly based on KPIs (hook rate, hold rate, CVR)

- Collaborate closely with the Creative Manager + other editors to push volume

- Source raw footage & voiceovers to bring concepts to life

- Experiment with new formats, trends, and storytelling angles



You Need

- Experience editing performance-driven Meta ads (UGC/direct response)

- Proven portfolio of short-form, direct response ads

- Strong creative eye and ability to deliver 15 ad concepts per week

- Understanding of marketing psychology, hooks, and consumer behavior

- Hunger to grow — willing to test, fail, and iterate fast



What You’ll Get

- Base salary: $4 per hour (start salary that increases if performance is on target) + performance bonuses

- Fully remote role

- Direct collaboration with a high-performing editors, strategists and Founder

- Managed under a dedicated Creative Manager who oversees editors and strategy



How to Apply

Send us a link to your portfolio or past performance ads

title: Creator Operations Coordinator — Build a 100-Creator UGC Machine (WITH HUGE PERFORMANCE BONUS)
description:
Hi! We are looking for one incredible person to take over a critical part of our business: building and managing a network of 80–100 UGC creators from scratch.



We run a portfolio of digital products including AI apps and physical products. We're launching a viral UGC program based on a proven playbook that has already scaled similar apps with 85 creators generating over 1 billion views.



Your role is to be the operational brain behind the creator machine. I've already built all the systems, SOPs, templates, scoring rubrics, and a custom dashboard. Your job is to execute the playbook daily and keep the pipeline full.





THIS IS A GREAT FIT FOR YOU IF:



You love systems and process — following a checklist gives you dopamine

You're naturally organized and can track 100 people without anything falling through

You write well in English and can send 50–100 professional messages per day

You're comfortable with social media platforms (Reddit,
, TikTok, 
)

You've managed people before (freelancers, remote teams, virtual assistants, creators)

You don't need hand-holding — you read the SOP, understand it, execute it

You're available 8 hours/day, Monday–Friday (flexible on which hours)



THIS IS NOT A FIT IF:



You want a creative role (this is operations, not content creation)

You need constant supervision or direction

You don't like repetitive daily tasks

You can't commit to full-time for at least 3 months



YOUR DAILY TASKS (5 hours active, 3 hours monitoring):

Morning (sourcing + screening):



Post recruitment ads on 
 and
 groups

Send 20 cold DMs to TikTok creators

Review new applications using our AI screening dashboard

Accept or reject applicants based on our proven criteria



Afternoon (management + onboarding):



Onboard new creators via 
 (send welcome message, format brief, trial schedule)

Answer creator questions in 
 within 4 hours

Track daily video submissions in our dashboard

Celebrate milestone wins (20K, 100K, 500K, 1M views)



Evening (check-ins):



Daily check-ins with trial creators at a consistent time

Grade trial creators on Day 5 using our scorecard (3 criteria, 1–10 each)



Friday:



Calculate weekly payouts using our built-in calculator

Process payments via Wise, PayPal, or ACH

Send weekly recap to founder



WHAT WE PROVIDE YOU:



14-chapter onboarding guide written at a simple level — no experience needed

9 SOP documents covering every possible scenario

Custom dashboard with Trello-style creator pipeline, templates, scorecard, payout calculator, and KPI tracking

Copy-paste recruitment templates (Reddit,
, TikTok DMs)

Copy-paste onboarding
s and 
 messages

AI-powered applicant screening

Daily support fro
 during your first 2 weeks



SUCCESS METRICS (how I measure your performance):



Week 1: All systems set up, first 10–20 applications coming in

Week 2: 20-30 creators in trial

Month 1: 20–25 graduated creators in the full program

Month 2: 40–60 active creators posting daily

Month 3: 80–100 active creators, 2–3 million daily views



COMPENSATION:



Competitive monthly salary (discuss in interview based on experience)

Performance bonuses when you hit creator milestones (40, 60, 80, 100 active creators)

Long-term position with growth potential

Fully remote, work from anywhere



Salary:  You can double or triple your salary with a performance bonus.



TO APPLY:

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Client Experience & Operations Coordinator — Remote  | 28th Street Agency
description:
Who We Are

28th Street Agency is a B Corp certified buyer's agency helping Australians buy strategically — not emotionally. We specialise in borderless property investing, targeting high-growth markets across Australia, often before deals reach public listings.

Every engagement we take on funds real change — through our EmpowerHER initiative supporting women into homeownership, and our ongoing commitment to Catherine House women's shelter. Standards are non-negotiable here.



The Role

At 28th Street, our reputation is built on two things — exceptional client experience and airtight operations. This role is responsible for both.

You will be the person our clients hear from, the person who makes sure nothing is missed, and the person who keeps the engine running behind the scenes. From the 
nt a client signs with us to long after settlement, you own that journey. You also own the inbox, the systems, the social presence, and the detail that holds everything together.

This is not a role for someone who needs to be told what to do next. It is a role for someone who already knows — and has done it before they were asked.



What This Looks Like Day to Day

You start the morning by clearing the Managing Director's inbox and checking the Go High Level chatbot for any inbound lead activity — every enquiry gets a response, nothing sits.

You manage client boards in 
, maintain and occasionally adjust existing automations, and make sure every client touchpoint — onboarding, milestones, settlement, post-settlement — is tracked, personalised, and executed on time.

You draft communications that sound human and considered, not templated. You coordinate gifts, flag upcoming milestones, and make clients feel genuinely looked after.

You publish one to two social posts per week across Instagram,
, LinkedIn, and TikTok — suburb reports, just purchased announcements, business updates — using Canva templates and your own eye for what looks right. You respond to comments and keep engagement active, executing content once approved.

You keep the WordPress website current — testimonials, services, and case studies updated without being asked.

You support broker outreach, assist with the referral strategy, and contribute to the B Corp certification process when it comes around.

Every single day, the detail is your responsibility.



You Are the Right Person If

* You have operated in a fast-paced remote role before and you did not drop the ball.

* Your written English is exceptional — clients will read what you write and form an opinion of this business based on it.

* You know 
 well enough to build boards and navigate automations confidently.

* You are comfortable across Go High Level, Canva, WordPress, and Google Workspace.

* You understand social media well enough to post consistently and on-brand, executing content once approved.

* You notice things other people miss. That is not a soft skill here — it is the job.



The Conditions

* Full-time, fully remote. Philippines-based candidates strongly preferred.

* Adelaide business hours required (ACST) — you are working in real time with the Managing Director.

* Leave entitlements provided to Australian standards.

* Your birthday off, paid. Paid natural disaster leave included.

* Clear KPIs. Direct access to leadership. No bureaucracy.



To Apply

Send your CV and a short cover note — tell us what you bring to a high-trust operations role and why 28th Street appeals to you. Generic applications go straight to the bin.

title: Outbound Sales Representative - Part-time
description:
The Role

We are looking for a hungry, resilient, and highly articulate Outbound Sales Representative to join our remote team on a part-time basis. Your primary goal will be to generate new business leads and book qualified appointments for our agency by reaching out to UK-based businesses.



You will be the first point of contact for potential clients, pitching our web design, app development, and SEO services. Because you will be speaking directly with UK business owners and decision-makers, a neutral accent, exceptional English, and a confident phone manner are absolutely essential.



Key Responsibilities

• Outbound Prospecting: Identify and research potential B2B clients in the UK who could benefit from a new website, app, or improved SEO.

• Cold Calling &
ing: Execute high-volume outbound campaigns (cold calls,
s, and LinkedIn outreach) to introduce Dorset Tech's services.

• Lead Qualification: Ask the right questions to qualify prospects based on their budget, timeline, and technical needs.

• Appointment Setting: Book qualified discovery calls and consultations for our senior team to close (or, if you have the experience, close them yourself).

• CRM Management: Keep meticulous records of all calls,
s, and follow-ups in our CRM system.



Requirements

• B2B Sales Experience: Proven track record in outbound sales, cold calling, or appointment setting, preferably within the tech, SaaS, or digital agency space.

• Exceptional English: Flawless spoken and written English with a neutral or easily understood accent. You must be comfortable navigating conversations with UK business owners.

• Resilience: You must be comfortable with rejection and possess the drive to keep dialing and following up.

• Tech-Savvy: A basic understanding of web design (WordPress), SEO, and app development so you can speak credibly about our services.

• Availability: Must be available to work from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM UK time (which is 4:00 PM to 8:00 PM in the Philippines), Monday through Friday.



About Dorset Tech

We are Dorset's number one web design agency, and we are on a mission to disrupt the web design industry. We pride ourselves on offering the lowest rates in the country without compromising on quality, serving over 2,000 active support customers. We build everything from budget pay-monthly sites to full custom Laravel systems and Flutter mobile apps.



Beyond our technical expertise, we are a social enterprise and a carbon-negative company. We power our office with solar energy, drive electric cars, and plant a tree for every review we receive. If you want to sell a product you can genuinely believe in, for a company that cares about its community and the planet, Dorset Tech is the place for you.



How to Apply

Please apply with your CV and a brief cover letter detailing your previous cold calling or B2B sales experience. Important: Please include a short audio or video recording introducing yourself and giving us a 30-second "mock pitch" of a web design service. Applications without a recording will not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant (Full-Time, Remote) - Music Release Operations
description:
We’re a new electronic music project built by experienced producers, releasing a new track every ~6.5 weeks (8 releases per year). We’re looking for a full-time Virtual Assistant to become the operational backbone of every release.

This is a long-term role working directly with the founder (Sydney-based), an international design/video team, and AI tools like Claude. The artist is incognito — the brand is visual and system-driven, not personality-led.

You don’t need music industry experience. You do need to be reliable, detail-oriented, and comfortable using AI tools daily.



The Role

You will manage the execution of each release from start to finish across a structured 6-week cycle.



Key responsibilities include:

• Uploading releases via DistroKid and managing metadata (ISRC, UPC, lyrics)

• Setting up pre-save links and download gates (Feature.fm, Hypeddit)

• Scheduling and publishing social content across IG, TikTok, YouTube Shorts

• Running paid campaigns via Meta Ads and YouTube (Google Ads)

• Sending playlist pitches via Groover and SubmitHub

• Managing DJ promo coordination and logging feedback

• Building and scheduling
 campaigns in Mailchimp

• Creating static visuals using AI tools (Claude), Adobe InDesign, or Canva (asset packs, EPKs, supporter cards)

• Updating website content for each release

• Tracking performance data and compiling weekly reports

• Maintaining a simple financial tracker (training provided)

You will use AI (Claude/ChatGPT) heavily — it drafts, you execute.



Tools You’ll Use

DistroKid, Spotify for Artists, Apple Music for Artists, YouTube Studio

Feature.fm, Hypeddit, Linktree

Groover, SubmitHub

Mailchimp

Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads

Claude / ChatGPT

Canva or Adobe InDesign

Notion (task and workflow management)

Google Drive, Slack



Must-Have Skills

• Strong written English

• High attention to detail (no metadata or link errors)

• Reliability — deadlines are fixed around release day

• Comfortable using AI tools daily

• Solid spreadsheet skills (basic formulas, tracking, organisation)

• Able to work with at least 3 hours overlap with Sydney time

• Fast learner across new tools

• Comfortable creating static visuals using templates and AI support



Nice to Have

• Interest in music or electronic music culture

• Experience with Notion

• Basic SEO understanding (YouTube titles, descriptions)



What You’re NOT Responsible For

• Creative direction or strategy decisions

• Music selection or artistic input

• Video editing (handled by external team)

• Contracts, negotiations, or financial approvals

• Acting as a public spokesperson



How We Work

• Mostly remote and flexible — work is done via Slack and shared documents

• Limited meetings — communication is clear and written

• Weekly check-ins, plus full attention on release day

• Clear systems and documented workflows

• AI is a core part of the workflow — not optional



Compensation

• $5 USD/hour

• 40 hours/week (full-time, consistent workload)

• ~$200 USD/week (~$800/month)

• 6-week paid trial (one full release cycle), then ongoing



How to Apply

A short note on why this role suits you

A link to something you’ve managed (social page, project, community, etc.)

A 100-word caption for an atmospheric electronic release

(you can use AI — show how you direct it)

title: Supply Chain Supervisor
description:
Job Title: Supply Chain Supervisor (Amazon, Shopify, B2B, Cin7) 

Location: Philippines 

Employment Type: Full-time 

Reports To: Supply Chain Manager 



 



Job Summary 



The Supply Chain Supervisor is responsible for overseeing and executing end-to-end supply chain operations across multiple sales channels, including Amazon (FBA/FBM), Shopify (B2C), and distributor (B2B) networks. 



This role ensures accurate demand forecasting, optimal inventory levels, and efficient order fulfillment from procurement through final delivery. The position requires strong operational leadership, system proficiency, and the ability to manage supply chain activities in a fast-paced, multi-channel environment. 



 



Key Responsibilities:



1. Demand Planning & Inventory Management 

-Lead demand forecasting activities and ensure alignment with sales trends, historical data, and business objectives  

-Translate forecasts into actionable replenishment and purchasing plans  

-Maintain optimal inventory levels across Amazon (FBA/FBM), Shopify (B2C), and distributor (B2B) channels  

-Monitor stock health, including stockouts, overstock, and inventory turnover  



2.Operations & Execution 

-Oversee end-to-end supply chain execution, including purchasing, inbound shipments, inventory control, order fulfillment, and delivery coordination  

-Manage daily operations within Cin7, ensuring system accuracy across all channels  

-Ensure timely and accurate processing of orders across Amazon, Shopify, and B2B platforms  

-Coordinate with logistics and warehouse partners to ensure efficient inbound and outbound operations  



3.Distributor & B2B Fulfillment 

-Oversee distributor order management, including bulk allocations, scheduling, and fulfillment coordination  

-Ensure accuracy and timeliness of large-volume orders and deliveries  

-Maintain strong coordination with external partners and stakeholders  



4.Performance Monitoring & Reporting 

-Track, analyze, and report key supply chain metrics, including inventory levels, order fulfillment rates, and delivery performance  

-Identify risks, inefficiencies, and improvement opportunities, and implement corrective actions  



5.Team Leadership 

-Supervise and support supply chain tea
mbers in daily operations  

-Assign responsibilities, manage workloads, and ensure adherence to timelines and accuracy standards  

-Provide guidance, coaching, and performance feedback  

-Escalate operational risks and issues to the Supply Chain Manager with clear recommendations  



Qualifications :

-Bachelor’s degree in Industrial Engineering, Supply Chain Management, Logistics, or a related field  

-Minimum of 5 years of relevant supply chain experience, with at least 3 years in a supervisory or leadership role  

-Advanced proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets  

-Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills  

-Excellent communication skills and a proactive, solutions-oriented mindset  



Preferred Qualifications :

-Hands-on experience with Amazon Seller Central (FBA/FBM) and Shopify (B2C and B2B)  

-Strong working knowledge of Cin7 (inventory and order management systems)  

-Proven experience in demand forecasting, replenishment planning, and inventory control  

-Experience managing distributor or wholesale operations, including bulk order fulfillment

title: Video Editor
description:
READ THIS FIRST

We hire based on execution, not resumes.

You will start with a paid test video ($5) using a script we already know performs.



ABOUT US

We run an eCommerce brand in the skincare space focused on performance-driven advertising on Meta.

We already have proven scripts, B-roll assets, and clear direction.

We need someone who can turn this into high-converting ads.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

Create and edit AI UGC ads, VSL-style videos, and product + B-roll creatives for Meta

Turn proven scripts into high-converting video ads

Source and use relevant visuals to strengthen the final output

Create variations and improve winning creatives

Optimize for hook strength, pacing, retention, and conversion



HOW WE WORK

You are expected to have your own editing software and tools you are comfortable with

We give clear direction and proven scripts, but we also value your creative input

You are expected to source relevant content yourself when needed

You have the freedom to bring your own style, as long as the output performs

We communicate clearly and treat people with respect



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Strong understanding of direct response editing

Experience with UGC, VSL-style ads, and B-roll driven creatives

Ability to take a script and turn it into a compelling video

Good taste in pacing, structure, and visual clarity

Ability to execute quickly without hand-holding



COMPENSATION

Start part-time

Fixed salary based on skill level

Performance bonuses based on ad performance and winning creatives

Strong performance leads to full-time opportunity



TEST VIDEO

You will receive a script, reference ad, and a small set of base assets

You are expected to source most of the B-roll yourself and build a high-converting video

Paid test: $5

After that we evaluate your execution, set your rate, and d
 on long-term collaboration



HOW TO APPLY

Send your portfolio (UGC, VSL-style, or similar ads)

Answer the following:

What tools do you use?

How do you approach the first 3 seconds of a video?

title: Automotive Service Estimating Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Own the estimate-to-approval-to-route workflow:

*Create and submit estimates

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Ensure routes are realistic and efficient; confirm techs are prepped and ready

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments



2. Scheduling & Productivity Tracking

*Maintain the daily technician schedule, making updates as needed

*Monitor tech productivity; flag idle time, reschedules, or delays

*Track time logs and coordinate with bookkeeper for payroll



3. Customer Communication

*Respond to incoming texts, WhatsApp messages, and system inquiries in a timely, professional manner

*Follow up with clients as needed to resolve open issues or gather job-related info

*Escalate concerns appropriately and promptly



4. Admin & Reporting

*Submit a detailed Daily Recap covering completed work, pending tasks, blockers, and KPIs

*Keep Trello and other tools up-to-date with accurate job and task statuses

*Track inventory needs and coordinate ordering of parts, oil, and supplies

*Monitor A/R and follow up on past-due fleet invoices



5. Marketing & Content Support

*Publish our monthly newsletter in MailChimp with content from marketing team

*Coordinate publishing of content to Instagram /
 / Google My Business

*Other light admin support as needed for the marketing team



What Success Looks Like

*All work orders, estimates, approvals, and tech routes are handled with zero dropped balls

*You identify blockers or problems before they become fires

*Communication is clear, timely, and professional — with both customers and internal team

*The business runs like a machine — nothing gets missed or delayed

*You take full ownership of your responsibilities and require very little follow-up



Who You Are

*A natural systems thinker who thrives on clarity, organization, and ownership

*Extremely proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

*Excellent at written and verbal English communication

*Comfortable in the automotive world and eager to learn the details

*Sharp and reliable — you retain info, spot gaps, and follow through



Experience & Skills Required

*3+ years of experience in a remote automotive: coordinator, dispatcher, operations role

*Demonstrated responsibility for keeping things moving without handholding

*Excellent written and spoken English

*Experience with dispatch, route planning, or technician scheduling

*Familiar with tools like Slack, Google Docs, Trello (or similar), CRM/invoicing platforms

*Experience working with U.S.-based field service, auto, or fleet companies

*Bonus: Familiarity with AutoIntegrate, Housecall Pro, Element, or LeasePlan platforms



Required Software Experience

*Slack

*WhatsApp

*Trello (or similar)

*Google Workspace

*CRM / invoicing tools (Housecall Pro, AutoIntegrate)

* Monday . com (plus)



TECH REQUIREMENTS:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Dual monitor setup is required to ensure efficiency in managing multiple applications simultaneously.

*Location: Remote (Philippines)

*Schedule: Part-time or Full-time, US hours



*Part-time Schedule

**Tuesday 1-5 pm

**Wednesday 1-5 pm

**Friday 8:30 - 7:30 pm

**Saturday 10-4 pm

**Sunday 2-5 pm



*Full-time Schedule

**Monday to Friday 9:30AM -6:30PM

Pay: Php288.46 - Php432.69 hourly rate

Fill out this form:

title: Influencer Outreach Specialist – TCG & E-commerce (TikTok + IG)
description:
The Opportunity

We are a high-growth e-commerce brand specializing in Trading Card Game (TCG) accessories. We are rapidly expanding across Amazon and TikTok Shop, and we need a high-energy, detail-oriented Outreach Engine to scale our creator partnerships.



If you are a pro at navigating TikTok Shop, love the "hunt" of finding the perfect influencer, and can manage high-volume outreach without losing the personal touch, we want you.



Your Daily Mission

1. TikTok Shop Creator Pipeline (50%)



Source & Vet: Identify US-based creators (5K–150K followers) in the TCG niche daily.



Quality Control: Manually verify engagement rates and content style to ensure a brand fit.



Outreach: Send affiliate invitations and manage the entire sequence from "Hello" to "Samples Sent."



Accountability: Be the "nudge" that ensures affiliates post their videos on schedule.



2. Instagram Micro-Influencer Growth (50%)



Identify: Find micro-influencers (3K–100K) who live and breathe trading cards.



Engagement: Perform "account warm-ups" (likes/comments) to ensure our brand is recognized before the pitch.



Collaboration: Pitch product collaborations and manage the follow-up flow.



Tracking: Ensure every product sent results in high-quality content deliverables.



3. Data & Reporting



Maintain our master tracking spreadsheet with 100?curacy.



Consistently hit daily sourcing and outreach targets (KPIs).



Submit a concise End-of-Day (EOD) report via 
/WhatsApp.



Who You Are

Experienced: You’ve successfully managed influencer outreach or TikTok Shop affiliate programs before.



TCG Savvy: You know your way around Pokemon, Magic: The Gathering, or Yu-Gi-Oh (this is a massive plus!).



A Human Communicator: You write excellent English and know how to talk to creators like a real person, not a template bot.



Platform Expert: You are proficient with Google Sheets, TikTok Creative Center, and Instagram.



Reliable: You have a stable, high-speed internet connection and a "no-excuses" approach to daily targets.



How to Apply (Follow Carefully)

We value attention to detail above all else. To be considered:



Send a message here with the subject line: "Your Outreach Engine is Ready - [Your Name]"



Fill out our official application form here: 



Applications that do not follow these instructions or do not complete the Google Form will not be reviewed.

title: CONTENT RESEARCH EXPERT (CRE): $800 a month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible time

- Salary: $800 a month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise. (direct to your bank account, almost no fees, no waiting for payday!)

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- A young, supportive team that values your output without micromanagement

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role

- Join our international team working with established content creators and brands

- Work with the latest AI tools and social media platforms



TASKS



TASK #1: Research and Curate Viral Content



- Research 30-50 viral short-form videos on Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Strategically select content ideas that will help specific clients go viral

- Organize all content ideas in the "Client Master Sheet"

- Copy/paste links to each content piece

- Write out the hook of each content piece

- Categorize content (Hero Story, Educational, Entertaining, Promotional)

- Add precise video instructions on how each piece can be replicated



TASK #2: Provide Strategic Content Direction



- Analyze client information (niche, target audience, personality, content style)

- Identify and recommend 3 inspirational accounts for clients to follow in their niche

- Create detailed instructions for content replication tailored to the client's abilities

- Think strategically about what will help each client succeed



TASK #3: Administrative Responsibilities



- Maintain a content library categorized by niche for efficient future use

- Complete daily End-of-Day Reports (EOD)

- Attend multiple meetings with your manager each week

- Continuously improve content recommendations based on what works



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above - non-negotiable!)

- Previous experience in content creation is a MUST

- Experience in content research and trend analysis

- Strong understanding of what makes content go viral

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts features

- Strategic thinking and attention to detail

- Ability to provide clear, actionable instructions

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

- 100% say-do ratio and commitment to deadlines



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Complete our application form and record a personal introduction:



Fill out the form: 
/to/QRoz4WLV



Note: Put "CRE" + [Your Name & Family Name] in the "Name" field in the form.



Record a 3-minute Loom video introducing yourself (instructions in form)



Important: Please provide genuine, personal responses (no AI-written answers). We want to get to know YOU!



ROUND 2: Qualified candidates will be invited for an interview.



MORE ABOUT US



We've been in the industry since 2019 and have worked with over 3000 clients. We currently receive around 80-100 new clients per month. We provide an "80% done-for-you content & monetization system" that helps creators go viral and turn views into income using short-form content, AI, and proven strategies.



MORE ABOUT US



- About Young Publisher:

title: Accounting Manager
description:
Job Summary



The Accounting Manager is responsible for overseeing the daily operations of the accounting department, ensuring accurate financial reporting, compliance with company policies, and adherence to applicable accounting standards and government regulations. The role includes managing financial records, supervising accounting staff, and supporting management in financial planning and decision-making.



Key Duties and Responsibilities



Manage and supervise the day-to-day operations of the accounting department.

Prepare and review monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements and reports.

Ensure timely and accurate recording of all financial transactions.

Monitor accounts payable, accounts receivable, payroll, and general ledger activities.

Oversee bank reconciliation and cash flow management

Ensure compliance with tax requirements, statutory reporting, and government remittances.

Prepare documents and schedules for internal and external audits.

Develop and implement accounting policies, procedures, and internal controls.

Analyze financial data and provide recommendations to management.

Assist in budget preparation, forecasting, and financial planning.

Supervise, train, and evaluate accounting staff performance and ensure confidentiality and security of financial records.



Skills and Attributes



Strong leadership and team management skills

Analytical and critical thinking ability

Good communication skills

Ability to meet deadlines and work under pressure

High level of integrity and confidentiality



Qualifications



Graduate of a Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

At least 4-6 years of experience in accounting, with 2 years in a supervisory or managerial role

Strong knowledge of accounting principles, taxation, and financial reporting

Strong analytical, leadership, and problem-solving skills

Excellent communication and organizational skills

title: Photo Editor (Photoroom)
description:
ABOUT US

Ald Fryslan is a fast-growing auction house based in the Netherlands. We sell about 12.000 objects every year— including art, antiques, jewelry, and collectibles. High-quality product images are essential for our auctions, and we are looking for a reliable photo editor to support our workflow.



THE JOB

We are looking for a Photo Editor experienced with Photoroom (or similar tools) to process large batches of images efficiently.



Your tasks:

- Download images from iCloud

- Remove backgrounds using Photoroom (centre, add shadow etc.)

- Apply basic editing (alignment, cropping, brightness, contrast)

- Ensure consistency across all images

- Upload or organize finished images (if needed)



VOLUME & WORKFLOW

- Approximately 10,000 images every 3 months

- Clear instructions and examples will be provided

- We provide software licenses (Photoroom, etc.)



REQUIREMENTS 

- Experience with Photoroom or similar background removal tools

- Fast and efficient workflow (this is high-volume work)

- Strong attention to detail



WHAT WE OFFER

- Long-term collaboration

- Stable and consistent workload

- Clear instructions and structured workflow

- Opportunity to grow with our company

- hourly rate

title: Instagram Content Creator (Short-Form Videos)
description:

This role is perfect for someone who is constantly on Reels, notices trends early, studies viral content without even realizing it, and has a strong instinct for what performs online.



You’ll help create engaging Instagram content designed to drive views, engagement, and audience growth. We’re not just looking for someone who can post content — we want someone who understands pacing, hooks, storytelling, aesthetics, and what keeps people watching.



If you’re passionate about content creation and want to turn your creativity into a real career, keep reading.





What You’ll Be Doing:



* Create and edit short-form Instagram Reels

* Brainstorm content ideas based on trends, formats, and viral concepts

* Help develop engaging visual content that aligns with brand direction

* Research trending audios, hooks, editing styles, and internet culture

* Reliable, self-motivated, and open to feedback

Experience is great, but we care more about:

* Creativity

Why You’ll Love This Role:

* Supportive, creative team environment
