title: Intermediate Australian Tax Accountant
description:
About the Role



We are seeking an experienced tax accountant with a strong background in Australian taxation and proficiency in Xero. The ideal candidate will have at least four years of experience in Australian tax and accounting and will be responsible for preparing financial statements and tax returns for various entity types, including companies, trusts, partnerships, and individuals.



Key Responsibilities



• Prepare financial statements and tax returns for companies, trusts, partnerships, individuals and SMSFs.

• Ensure compliance with Australian tax laws, including income tax, GST, and BAS reporting.

• Reconcile accounts and manage general ledger entries.

• Work with Xero & BGLSF360 (optional) to process transactions, maintain records, and generate reports.

• Assist in tax planning strategies and provide general tax advice as required.

• Communicate with the team to ensure deadlines and client expectations are met.

• Looking at implementing and providing Advisory information to the Director

• Assist the Director with initial reviews of financial statements, tax returns, and supporting workpapers.

• Identify basic errors, inconsistencies, and missing information prior to final review.

• Support the team by helping improve accuracy and completeness of work before submission to the Director.



Key Requirements



• Minimum 4 years of experience in Australian tax and accounting.

• Strong English literacy and speaking skills

• Proficiency in Xero & BGLSF360 (negotiable) and cloud-based accounting software.

• Strong knowledge of Australian taxation, including company tax, trust distributions, BAS, IAS, and GST.

• Experience preparing tax returns and financial statements for various entity structures.

• Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and manage workloads efficiently.

• Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

• Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.





What We Offer



• Competitive salary based on experience.

• Flexible remote working environment.

• Opportunity to work with a growing Australian accounting firm.

• Ongoing training and development to enhance your skills.

• Long-term career growth potential.



If you meet the qualifications and are looking for a long-term opportunity in an Australian accounting firm, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Meta Media Buyer
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Media Buyer to own our paid advertising performance across platforms, with a primary focus on Meta 
 & Instagram Ads). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelance or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is data-driven, detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with creatives to improve ad performance through clear insights and testing.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Launch, manage, and optimize ad campaigns primarily on Meta Ads. Support campaigns on Google, TikTok, or other platforms where relevant.

- Plan and execute structured tests (angles, creatives, offers, landing page) to improve cost per acquisition and ROAS.

- Manage budgets, audiences, and campaign structures based on performance

- Analyze ad performance to identify winning and underperforming ads

- Communicate clear performance insights to the creative team

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve creatives based on data

- Analyze Shopify sales data to identify scaling opportunities, conversion bottlenecks and product-level performance

- Monitor competitors’ ads, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC industry trends and platform updates to ensure best practices.

- Providing administrative support, as and when needed to the manager.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong comfort working with numbers and data

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain performance clearly to non-technical teammates

- Highly organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently

- Willing to learn quickly and adapt as the business grows



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Meta Media Buyer – (Your Name)”. Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Describe your most recent job: your job overview, and how long did you work there?

2) What challenges did you face, and why did you leave the job?

3) Describe one (or more) test/experiment you tried that didn't work as expected? What did you learn, and what would you do differently now?

4) Submit your portfolio. If you don’t have relevant DTC experience, submit your best work. Strong portfolios outside this role may be considered for other roles.

5) Pick one project from the attached portfolio in question (4) that you are most proud of and answer the questions below. You may pick more than one project.

- What was the project?

- Your contribution?

- Why you approached it this way?

- Results (provide metrics if possible)?

title: GHL & Marketing Automation Specialist
description:
Overview 

We are looking for a GHL & Marketing Automation Specialist to take ownership of our CRM and marketing infrastructure across our ecosystem. This role acts as the operational backbone of our marketing systems, ensuring that our CRM, automation workflows, and campaign infrastructure are properly configured, maintained, and continuously optimized. You will work closely with founders and the marketing team to build scalable systems that support lead generation, nurturing, and conversion.





Work Structure & Requirements

Timezone: UK Timezone - 20 hours per week



Key Responsibilities

• Configure, manage, and optimize Go High Level (GHL) as the central CRM.

• Build and maintain
 automation workflows, funnels, and lifecycle sequences.

• Set up and manage voice AI automations.

• Support newsletter automation and campaign execution.

• Integrate paid advertising channels into CRM workflows.

• Centralize and manage multi-channel marketing touchpoints including
, social, and ads.

• Build and maintain reporting dashboards and performance tracking systems.

• Ensure clean data, segmentation, and pipeline visibility within the CRM.

• Continuously improve automation systems to increase efficiency and performance.



Ideal Candidate Profile

• Hands-on experience working with Go High Level (GHL).

• Background in marketing automation, CRM systems, or SaaS environments.

• Strong understanding of funnels, lifecycle marketing, and lead management.

• Comfortable owning systems end-to-end without heavy oversight.

• Strong attention to detail and systems thinking.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself.



Looking forward to receiving your profile!

title: Outreach & Sales Support Executive
description:
Overview 



We are seeking a highly organized, proactive Outreach & Sales Support Executive to support growth within contract catering and adjacent channels. The core of this role is manual, high-attention outreach. Unlike high-volume automated campaigns, this work requires careful handling of contacts, thoughtful outbound communication, and strong follow-up discipline. You will be reaching out to site managers across large contract catering groups, coordinating sampling sessions, and ensuring no warm lead falls through the cracks.



Timezone: UK Timezone - 10 hrs / week



Key Responsibilities

• Reach out to site managers and decision-makers via
 and LinkedIn in small, manual batches.

• Personalize outreach while maintaining professional, upbeat, and commercially effective messaging.

• Keep the CRM fully updated with contact details, outreach status, notes, and next steps.

• Manage follow-up sequences across a high volume of contacts without losing track of timing or context.

• Write and adapt outbound sales
s that feel human; use AI tools for drafting while ensuring final output is not robotic.

• Coordinate sample drops and tasting sessions, confirming dates, sites, addresses, and materials.

• Follow up before and after sessions to maximize conversion and 
ntum.



Ideal Candidate Profile

• Strong written English and confident communication over
 and LinkedIn.

• Proven ability to write outreach that actually gets responses.

• Highly organized and comfortable managing a large volume of contacts and follow-ups.

• Experience using a CRM and keeping pipelines clean and up to date.

• Confident using AI tools as drafting support, while keeping final output human and on-brand.

• Knowledge of food, beverage, FMCG, or hospitality is a plus.

• Previous experience in sales support, lead generation, or SDR roles preferred.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself. In your video, please describe how you manage a high volume of manual follow-ups to ensure no lead is missed. (candidates who submitted their resume and loom will be prioritized)

title: Operations Manager
description:
Overview

We are a fast-growing "better-for-you" snack brand redefining indulgence with clean-label candied nuts and organic dried fruit. We are scaling quickly across retail, distribution, and e-commerce and are building the operational backbone to support that growth.



This is a high-ownership operations role with a direct impact on revenue. You will ensure product moves efficiently from production to shelf while continuously improving how the business operates. This role is for a problem-solver who moves fast and defaults to automation over manual work.



Key Responsibilities

Order Execution & Fulfillment

Own the end-to-end purchase order flow across retail, wholesale, and e-commerce channels.

Ensure all orders are processed, shipped, and delivered accurately and on time.

Manage critical documentation, including invoices, BOLs, routing guides, and labels.

Proactively resolve fulfillment issues before they impact the customer experience.



Sales Operations & Account Readiness

Support new item setups across various retailers and distributors.

Maintain accurate pricing, product data, and sales materials.

Track deductions, trade spend, and promotional activity.

Ensure operational readiness for all new accounts and upcoming product launches.



Supply Chain & Inventory Management

Coordinate production runs directly with co-packers and suppliers.

Manage inventory across warehouses and major distributors, such as UNFI and KeHE.

Monitor stock levels to prevent out-of-stocks or excess inventory.

Track inbound and outbound shipments, resolving any delays immediately.



Systems & AI Automation

Identify inefficiencies and implement scalable systems to improve speed and accuracy.

Use AI tools to automate repetitive tasks across reporting and order management.

Build processes that improve visibility and replace manual work with scalable solutions.



Required Skills & Experience

3–5+ years in operations, supply chain, or logistics.

Experience within the US CPG ecosystem, ideally working with distributors like UNFI or KeHE.

Strong systems mindset with comfort in ERPs, CRMs, spreadsheets, and AI productivity tools.

High attention to detail, ability to move quickly, and capacity to operate independently.



To Apply:

Please send your resume and short loom intro video via messages. Thanks!

title: E - Commerce Outbound Sales Representative
description:
Overview

We are seeking a high-energy, execution-focused Outbound Sales Representative to join the team. Based in New York City, we are a "better-for-you" snack brand offering clean-label candied nuts and organic dried mangoes to major distributors and retail partners.



This is a pure execution role with high activity, clear metrics, and no fluff. You will be responsible for high-volume prospecting to engage cold leads, re-activate stalled accounts, and drive reorders from existing customers.



Work Structure & Requirements

Location: Remote (Must have a quiet, professional calling environment).

Schedule: Full-time, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST.

Requirement: Candidates must not have a concurrent full-time job to ensure total focus on hitting daily activity targets.

Tech Needs: Reliable high-speed internet and strong computer literacy to multitask across sales tools.



Key Responsibilities

Outbound Outreach: Execute high-volume outbound
s and daily cold calls to prospects and warm leads.

Account Management: Follow up with inactive accounts and call current customers to facilitate reorders, expansion, or reactivation.

Lead Response: Respond promptly to all inbound calls and
 inquiries.

CRM Discipline: Log all activity accurately in Salesforce, maintaining clean data and clear next steps for every lead.

Performance: Consistently hit daily activity targets and monthly pipeline goals.



Required Skills & Experience

Sales Background: Prior experience in outbound sales, inside sales, or lead generation.

Communication: Fluent English (reading, writing, and speaking) with the ability to write concise, non-spammy cold
s.

Phone Presence: Confident, natural delivery on the phone—no monotone script reading.

Resilience: Comfortable handling objections, basic discovery, and repetitive outreach.

Efficiency: Fast typing skills and high attention to detail.



Traits We Value

Metrics-Driven: Comfortable being measured by clear KPIs and pipeline creation.

Coachable: Open to feedback and a direct communicator who strictly follows the established sales process.

Reliable: Consistent and self-disciplined in a remote work setting.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video introducing yourself.

title: Freelance Meta Ads Editor (VSL + UGC + Static Creatives)
description:
Hi there,

We’re looking for a freelance editor who can create high-converting Meta ad creatives 
 & Instagram). You’ll edit both direct response / VSL-style videos and UGC-style ads, plus static variations.



What you’ll do



- Edit Meta video ads (Feed, Stories, Reels placements)



- Create VSL-style / direct response ads (strong hook, clear structure, CTA)



- Edit UGC-style creatives (fast pacing, captions, pattern interrupts)



- Produce multiple variations (hooks, text, pacing, CTAs, angles)



- Create/adapt static ad creatives (image variations)



Requirements



- Proven experience with Meta performance creatives



- Strong understanding of direct response editing (retention + conversion focus)



- Skilled in Premiere Pro / After Effects / CapCut / DaVinci



- Basic static design skills (Canva / Photoshop / Figma = plus)



- Fluent in English + reliable turnaround



To apply



Send:



- Your portfolio or 3–5 Meta ad examples (VSL/UGC preferred)



- Your availability (hours/week + timezone)



If you’re fast, structured, and performance-driven, we’d love to work with you.

title: AI Video Editor
description:
Looking for full time video editor for AI videos to market products.



You will be editing and making AI videos using AI tools like Veo3, Gemini, Higgsfield, Heygen, and ElevenLabs. You will be generating video clips / AI characters talking and editing them with Capcut.



You will be trained extensively on how to do it, previous experience using CapCut is required but the other tools you don't need any experience in. It'll be mostly just providing scripts to an AI tool and then playing with the prompts to get a good outcome of the video. It's quite easy once you get the hang of it, which we'll train you to do!



Starting pay is $3.3 US dollars per video - This is just to start, for people who make good, high quality videos we will increase the pay per video if we see that you're trying your best. 



Requirements:



- Attention to detail

- STRONG English

- Strong internet connection

- Previous experience with Capcut

- Good working with a team

- Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

- Availability for 6-8h a day (never more, sometimes less)

- Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever needed as long as mostly consistent)

- Can take payments through Wise

- PH or similar time zone

title: Customer Service Specialist – Strong Attention to Detail
description:
We are seeking a highly dependable and detail-oriented Customer Service with solid experience in fashion dropshipping. This is a long-term position for someone who can work independently, communicate effectively, and consistently deliver accurate, high-quality results. A major part of the role involves coordinating with suppliers, monitoring order fulfillment, and ensuring smooth end-to-end operations. Many customer replies will be supported by AI tools.



Key Responsibilities:

•Use internal spreadsheets and documents to manage daily workflows and maintain accurate operational records.

•Respond to HelpScout tickets promptly (expected output: 30–40 tickets per hour).

•Follow return policy procedures, including offering discounts, issuing refunds, and providing return instructions.

•Report damaged or incorrect items to suppliers (via 
 or CJ) and secure replacements or refunds.

•Coordinate closely with suppliers regarding shipment updates, replacements, cancellations, and all fulfillment-related concerns.

•Oversee order fulfillment, ensuring all unfulfilled Shopify orders are followed up, and resolve issues regarding size, color, inventory availability, and address verification.

•Proven experience with CJ Dropshipping is mandatory.

•Collaborate with both Customer Service and Supply Chain teams to keep operations running smoothly.



Qualifications required: 

•Proven experience in fashion dropshipping and supply chain/order fulfillment (applications without this will not be reviewed).

•Proven knowledge on the ins and outs in CJ Dropshipping in terms of order fulfillment.

•Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

•Experience with Zendesk, Gorgias, HelpScout, Shopify, and, add the word sky in the subject line, other customer service or fulfillment tools.

•Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple responsibilities independently.

•Detail-oriented with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

•Comfortable giving feedback and proposing improvements to operational processes.



What We Offer:

Competitive salary + KPI-based bonuses

Long-term, work-from-home setup

Flexible schedule within agreed hours

Strong opportunities for career growth as the company expands



How to Apply:

-Your resume

-A cover letter detailing your fashion dropshipping, supplier coordination, and order fulfillment experience, and explaining why you are an ideal fit for this role.

-Provide a loom video [less than a minute] explaining how you organize your day

description:

Who thrives in a fast-paced environment, works independently, and consistently delivers accurate, high-quality results. This role plays a critical part in ensuring smooth day-to-day operations, from customer communication to supplier coordination and order fulfillment. • Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks independently

• Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving and analytical abilities

• Proactive mindset with the confidence to suggest improvements to workflows and processes



What We Offer

• Competitive salary + performance-based (KPI) bonuses

• Fully remote, long-term position

• Flexible schedule within agreed working hours

• Opportunities for growth and advancement as the company scales



How to Apply - please submit the following:

• Your CV/Resume

• provide a Loom video [less than 1minute] explaining how you organize your day

• A cover letter outlining your experience in fashion dropshipping, supplier coordination, and order fulfillment, and why you’re a strong fit for this role

title: Influencer Marketing Specialist
description:
Bhumi Organic Cotton | Global Role with US Focus



At Bhumi, we are redefining sustainable living through thoughtfully crafted organic essentials. As we continue to scale globally, we are looking for an Influencer Marketing Specialist to drive high-impact creator partnerships, with a strong focus on the US market.



This is a fully remote role, offering the opportunity to work flexibly while contributing to the growth of a purpose-led, global brand.



Key Responsibilities:



Creator Sourcing & Partnerships

- Identify, source, and onboard high-quality creators at scale, with a primary focus on the US market

- Build and manage a strong pipeline of influencers across TikTok, Instagram, and emerging platforms

- Establish long-term relationships with creators aligned to Bhumi’s values of sustainability, wellness, and conscious living



Campaign Execution & Scaling

- Launch and manage multiple concurrent influencer campaigns across key product categories

- Leverage Upfluence to efficiently scale collaborations and streamline outreach, gifting, and tracking

- Drive a high volume of creator content across multiple geographies



Content Strategy & Performance

- Guide creators on content structure to maximise engagement and conversion

- Ensure content aligns with Bhumi’s brand aesthetic while being optimised for paid amplification

- Analyse performance data to refine creator selection and campaign direction



US Market Expansion

- Lead influencer growth within the US market, identifying creators with strong audience alignment and conversion potential

- Adapt campaigns to resonate with US audiences while maintaining brand consistency



Campaign Optimisation & Reporting

- Track campaign performance across content output, engagement, and conversions

- Provide insights to improve efficiency, scalability, and ROI



What We’re Looking For:



- Experience in influencer marketing with a strong performance mindset

- Experience using platforms like Upfluence or similar

- Ability to manage and scale a high volume of creator collaborations

- Strong understanding of social-first content that drives engagement and sales

- Alignment with sustainability, wellness, and conscious living values





Success in This Role:



- Consistently locking in and managing a high volume of creator partnerships

- Strong and consistent content output across campaigns

- Clear contribution to brand growth, engagement, and revenue

- Successful expansion into the US market





This is an opportunity to work remotely while playing a key role in scaling a global, purpose-led brand through impactful creator partnerships.

title: Betting Operations Assistant
description:
I’m looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Bookkeeping VA / Accounts & Admin Assistant to help organise accounts, transactions, balances, statements, and financial records.



The main goal of this role is to keep my accounts organised and up to date. You will help maintain spreadsheets, reconcile transactions, categorise deposits and withdrawals, check balances, organise receipts/statements, and prepare simple weekly reports.



This role is best suited to someone who is very accurate with numbers, organised, trustworthy, and comfortable working with financial records.

title: Meta / Facebook Performance Marketing Ads Expert
description:
About Bhumi



At Bhumi (
), we’re rewriting the story of luxury — one that feels good on the skin and even better on the soul. We create timeless, sustainable home essentials and basics from the finest organic cotton, ethically crafted and Fairtrade certified. Based in Melbourne, we’re passionate about raising the standard in conscious living and building a global brand that honours both people and the planet.



With a strong foundation in Australia and rapidly growing presence in the United States and Europe, we’re entering an exciting phase of expansion and product innovation — and we’re looking for a true Meta Ads expert to be at the heart of that growth.



The Role



We’re seeking a seasoned Meta/Facebook Performance Marketing Expert — not an intermediate or aspiring candidate, but a proven, elite-level operator. You’ll work directly with our Founder, Dushyant, to strategically scale our Meta account with laser-sharp performance marketing focus, driving consistent daily growth in revenue, brand visibility, and customer acquisition across AU, US, and EU markets.



You must thrive in fast-paced environments and have hands-on experience managing significant ad budgets ($100K+/month), ideally within the lifestyle, fashion, or sustainable product space.



???? Work directly with me Dushyant Baravkar | Immediate Start |  No fluff, no guesswork — this is about precise, data-driven, disciplined execution.



???? Focus: Australia, US & Europe starting with Netherlands) 



???? What I am Looking For:



> A true performance marketer with proven success managing 6-figure monthly ad spend across Meta platforms.



> Someone who can hit the ground running — no hand-holding, no trial runs — just solid results from Day 1.



> You understand the nuances of DTC growth, have scaled lifestyle brands (bonus if sustainability-focused), and know how to convert clicks into loyal customers.



> You're as comfortable in Ads Manager as you are collaborating on creative and messaging that connects deeply with conscious consumers.



???? Key Responsibilities:



> Scale high-performing campaigns across
 & Instagram

> Own strategy, creative input, audience segmentation, retargeting & conversion funnels

> Optimise daily based on data, ROAS, CPA, AOV & LTV

> Drive growth across AU, US & EU — especially heading into the critical Q3/Q4 holiday season

> Work directly with me to execute on a vision with huge growth potential



???? Required Experience:



> 5+ years of direct Meta Ads experience, at the expert level

> Proven track record of managing 6-figure+ per month ad budgets

> Experience scaling eComm / DTC lifestyle brands (bonus: ethical or sustainable products)

> Highly analytical with strong reporting and decision-making ability

Immediate availability — ready to plug into a working system and go



? Why Bhumi?



> Work with a brand that’s leading the way in conscious consumerism

> Huge runway for growth with new ranges launching in coming weeks

> Remote flexibility with global impact

> Mission-driven, transparent, values-aligned team



???? Sound like you?



Please include the below in your application to be considered:



> Examples of accounts you’ve scaled

> Campaign results + budget scope



A short note on why you're the expert we're looking for.



Let’s build something powerful — and sustainable — together. ????

title: Automotive Operations Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Own the estimate-to-approval-to-route workflow:

*Create and submit estimates

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Ensure routes are realistic and efficient; confirm techs are prepped and ready

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments



2. Scheduling & Productivity Tracking

*Maintain the daily technician schedule, making updates as needed

*Monitor tech productivity; flag idle time, reschedules, or delays

*Track time logs and coordinate with bookkeeper for payroll



3. Customer Communication

*Respond to incoming texts, WhatsApp messages, and system inquiries in a timely, professional manner

*Follow up with clients as needed to resolve open issues or gather job-related info

*Escalate concerns appropriately and promptly



4. Admin & Reporting

*Submit a detailed Daily Recap covering completed work, pending tasks, blockers, and KPIs

*Keep Trello and other tools up-to-date with accurate job and task statuses

*Track inventory needs and coordinate ordering of parts, oil, and supplies

*Monitor A/R and follow up on past-due fleet invoices



5. Marketing & Content Support

*Publish our monthly newsletter in MailChimp with content from marketing team

*Coordinate publishing of content to Instagram /
 / Google My Business

*Other light admin support as needed for the marketing team



What Success Looks Like

*All work orders, estimates, approvals, and tech routes are handled with zero dropped balls

*You identify blockers or problems before they become fires

*Communication is clear, timely, and professional — with both customers and internal team

*The business runs like a machine — nothing gets missed or delayed

*You take full ownership of your responsibilities and require very little follow-up



Who You Are

*A natural systems thinker who thrives on clarity, organization, and ownership

*Extremely proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

*Excellent at written and verbal English communication

*Comfortable in the automotive world and eager to learn the details

*Sharp and reliable — you retain info, spot gaps, and follow through



Experience & Skills Required

*3+ years of experience in a remote automotive: coordinator, dispatcher, operations role

*Demonstrated responsibility for keeping things moving without handholding

*Excellent written and spoken English

*Experience with dispatch, route planning, or technician scheduling

*Familiar with tools like Slack, Google Docs, Trello (or similar), CRM/invoicing platforms

*Experience working with U.S.-based field service, auto, or fleet companies

*Bonus: Familiarity with AutoIntegrate, Housecall Pro, Element, or LeasePlan platforms



Required Software Experience

*Slack

*WhatsApp

*Trello (or similar)

*Google Workspace

*CRM / invoicing tools (Housecall Pro, AutoIntegrate)

* Monday . com (plus)



TECH REQUIREMENTS:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Dual monitor setup is required to ensure efficiency in managing multiple applications simultaneously.

*Location: Remote (Philippines)

*Schedule: Part-time or Full-time, US hours



*Part-time Schedule

**Tuesday 1-5 pm

**Wednesday 1-5 pm

**Friday 8:30 - 7:30 pm

**Saturday 10-4 pm

**Sunday 2-5 pm



*Full-time Schedule

**Monday to Friday 9:30AM -6:30PM

Pay: Php288.46 - Php432.69 hourly rate



Application Instructions:

Fill out this form: 
/appqNAvkEQ10YFlc3/pagrX4PvZe0xsKHWT/form

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

 & Instagram)

title: Digital Marketer (SEO, Social Media, Website Management & GoHighLevel CRM) - Remote
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview

We are seeking a creative and results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to join our dynamic team. This role focuses on enhancing our online presence, managing multi-platform social media campaigns, and driving lead generation through strategic digital marketing initiatives. The successful candidate will be responsible for improving website visibility, creating engaging content, and managing targeted advertising campaigns across various platforms to expand our reach and grow our client base.



Key Responsibilities

SEO & Website Optimization



Search Engine Optimization: Improve website ranking and visibility through strategic SEO implementation

Keyword Research: Identify and apply high-converting search terms to maximize organic reach

Content Optimization: Ensure all web content is optimized for search engines and user engagement



Social Media Management



Platform Management: Manage and optimize
, Instagram, and TikTok accounts for maximum engagement

Content Creation: Produce engaging posts, graphics, and short videos that align with brand messaging

Community Management: Respond to comments, inquiries, and messages across all social platforms in a timely and professional manner

Brand Consistency: Ensure consistent messaging and visual identity across all platforms



Digital Advertising & Campaign Management



Paid Advertising: Run targeted ads on Meta 
/Instagram), Google, and TikTok platforms

Campaign Development: Create and manage comprehensive digital marketing campaigns, with particular focus on fitness studio and related sectors

Performance Tracking: Monitor, analyze, and report on campaign performance and conversions

Budget Management: Optimize ad spend and ROI across all advertising platforms



Content Management & Brand Development



Content Upload: Upload creatives, blogs, and campaign updates across digital platforms

Visual Content: Design and produce graphics, videos, and other visual content for marketing campaigns

Brand Messaging: Maintain consistent brand voice and messaging across all marketing materials



Required Skills & Experience

Technical Requirements



Digital Marketing: Proven experience in digital marketing, social media management, and online advertising

title: Growth and Sales Manager
description:
About You 

You want to be part of something with massive potential, there from the ground floor. 

You thrive in environments where the expectations are high, the goal is challenging, the mission is clear, and the team supports each other to get better every day. 

You’re looking for a role with real responsibility, where you feel ownership over what you build. 

You are excited by working directly with a successful entrepreneur who invests in you. 

You want to build something that supports others through stable, dignified, growth-oriented jobs. 

You are a natural closer with a strategist’s mind — equally energized by understanding what makes people say “yes” and building the repeatable systems that turn those yeses into scale. 



Role Overview 

The Growth & Sales Manager is the engine behind Moonlight’s client acquisition strategy. As the Growth & Sales Manager you have a deep instinct for what drives people to say “yes” and the systems-thinking discipline to scale that into a repeatable process. You have a creative and entrepreneurial mind. You are adept at all lead gen tactics — whether it’s cold
, partnerships, webinars, LinkedIn plays, or unconventional outreach strategies. You will work closely with our Digital Marketer to bridge brand and performance — ensuring that outbound efforts are aligned with the broader marketing strategy and that Moonlight is continually being introduced to new audiences in compelling ways. 

Equal parts closer and strategist, this role is responsible for building, refining, and executing our entire outbound and inbound sales funnel — from lead generation through to conversion, onboarding, and renewal. This person is relentlessly outcome-driven, deeply persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, early-stage environment where growth is the mandate.



Qualifications 

? 5-7+ years of experience in a sales, growth, or business development role, ideally in a fast-paced startup or service-based business 

? Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and closing high-value clients through outbound channels 

? Deep understanding of sales psychology, lead qualification, and consultative selling 

? Experience designing or optimizing a high-converting sales funnel — from cold outreach to contract 

? Strong proficiency with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Pipedrive) and sales automation tools ? Excellent verbal and written communication skills — persuasive, clear, and human 

? Highly analytical and data-driven with the ability to identify drop-off points and improve conversion rates 

 Creative thinker who enjoys testing and iterating on outreach strategies, messaging, and formats

? Comfortable collaborating with marketers, operators, and leadership to align growth across functions 

? Thrives in a lean, early-stage environment with high autonomy and a bias toward action 

? Excellent project management and organizational abilities; adept at balancing multiple priorities under tight timelines. 

? Comfort and skill in working remotely with distributed, multicultural teams 

Compensation, Growth, and Benefits 

? Competitive compensation commensurate with experience 

? Opportunity for performance-based bonuses as the company grows 

? Direct mentorship from the founder and CEO 

? 21 days of paid time off 

? Health benefits (in progress) 

? Philippines 13th month end of year bonus

title: Outreach Executive
description:
Outreach Executive

Job Description + Task



ABOUT: 

Northstar Media

Northstar Media is a creative branding & content agency that plans and produces everything from social content systems (research, positioning, ideation, scripting, high-end short/long-form content, publishing, and optimization) for personal brands, to custom animations for startups and companies - including explainer videos, company videos, and VSLs. Built for both organic and paid media.

Learn more > here



THE ROLE

Words are your weapon. As an outreach executive you will be using our proven templates, you'll write and send personalised outreach across Instagram DMs and
, then follow up until you get a reply. Sharp, consistent communication that gets people to respond.

This is a high-output role for someone who thrives on connection, takes pride in personalised communication, and genuinely enjoys the hunt of finding the right client.

Your mission is simple: get potential clients excited enough to reply.

You'll be fully supported in being provided a list of clients then executing our outreach strategy — ultimately helping scale the agency and bringing in clients who benefit from a done-for-you content engine that builds their brand, grows their audience and grows their revenue.

Contract Type: Part-Time, 

Freelance Setup: Remote

Working Hours: 1:00PM - 5:00 PM PHT (Philippine Standard Time)

Working Days: Monday to Friday

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Adapt our templates into personalised IG DMs and cold
s - every message should feel written for that specific person - written by a human.

Send outreach daily and hit your contact targets consistently.

Own the follow-up sequence until the prospect replies or is disqualified.

Report daily - contacts reached, replies received, follow-ups sent - fill out EOD.

Keep the internal CRM system up to date on a daily basis. 



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Strong written English - clear, natural, persuasive

Detail-oriented and self-managed

Comfortable with Instagram and
 as outreach tools

At least 1 year in outreach, sales, or a communications role

An interest and understanding of the content marketing economy. 

Ability to learn and utilise a CRM system - Notion and google sheets. 



WHAT TO EXPECT

A hungry, passionate, and results-driven environment where your work directly impacts the growth of the agency

Full support from day one — you'll never be left figuring things out alone

Clear templates, systems, and processes so you can focus on execution.

A team that's invested in your success - when you win, we all win

Room to grow as the agency scales - we promote from within and reward consistency

HOW TO APPLY

Send your submission to: 

TASK - WRITE THE OUTREACH

Find one potential client online who would be a good fit for Northstar Media's services. Then write the following as if reaching out on their behalf:

A) Instagram DM

Conversational, not salesy

Reference something specific from their account

Provide some value upfront - like what problem Northstar Media would help them solve.

End with one soft question

Max 5 sentences

B) Cold

Subject line 

Opening that proves you looked at their account

One problem or opportunity you spotted

How Northstar Media could help

One soft CTA

PS line: one non-business detail you noticed about them



Send to: 

We read every submission. The ones that stand out get a reply.

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 355 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: Shopify Product Moderator & Lister for GMC Compliance
description:
We are an agency that helps eCommerce brands stay active on Google Merchant Center (GMC) so they can keep running Google Ads. We’re hiring a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant (VA) to review and approve Shopify product listings before submission to Google. Your main goal is to ensure a consistent number of listings are submitted daily for each store, with every listing reviewed in around 4.5 minutes or less, while maintaining GMC compliance. Focus on spotting high-risk issues such as misleading claims, image/logo problems, or prohibited content across your assigned stores.



This role is ideal for someone with strong English comprehension and the ability to quickly skim product descriptions while identifying potential compliance issues. It suits candidates who have experience creating Shopify product listings, especially those familiar with GMC requirements.



Responsibilities:

**Moderate and adjust client product listings across Shopify stores for GMC compliance issues (e.g., image logos, misleading claims, prohibited content); if unable to fix, log findings in the client’s Google Sheet, leave comments on issues, confirm fixes, and submit approved products to GMC.

**Report compliance risks with clear, actionable notes.

**Check the GMC dashboard across clients’ stores daily and resolve any flagged product-listing issues by updating the product in Shopify.

**Review and update product images (remove logos, improve main image appeal, source high-quality alternatives if needed).

**Refine and update clients' product listings when needed



Requirements:

**Ability to quickly skim product descriptions while identifying potential compliance issues, this requires excellent English reading comprehension (to recognize compliance-sensitive wording).

**Proven experience as a product lister for Shopify

**Strong command of English with excellent written and verbal communication skills.

**Ability to manage multiple tasks with attention to detail and deadlines

**Self-motivated with a strong work ethic and the ability to work independently.

**Attention to detail: include the word “PINEAPPLE” when you apply to this role AND tell us how many questions are listed at the end of this job post

**Basic understanding of on-page SEO practices (incorporating provided keywords into descriptions)



Nice to Have:

**Any Google Merchant Center experience/You’ve created product listings for Google

**Have experience optimising product listings for Google Shopping

** Image editing such as text removal, image resizing and resolution upscaling



KPI: Audit and submit XY client product listings to Google Merchant Center per day on each store



How to Apply:



Please submit your resume along with samples of your previous work or portfolio. In your application please answer the following questions:



1) Do you have experience with Shopify?

2) Do you have experience with Simprosys?

3) Have you created product listings with GMC compliance in mind?

4) Do you have image editing experience (e.g., removing logos, text overlays, or improving image quality)? If yes, let us know what tools you use

5) Can you commit to 40 hours per week, Mon–Fri?

6) What is your WPM (words per minute) typing speed? Please obtain it from here:

title: Senior Amazon PPC Manager – Remote (Full-Time)
description:
Senior Amazon PPC Manager – Remote (Full-Time)



You live and breathe Amazon Ads. You've scaled accounts from 6 to 7 and 8 figures. You don't just "manage PPC" – you build strategies that crush the competition.



If that sounds like you, keep reading. If not, this role is not for you.



About Us

We are Fox Performance, an Amazon PPC agency founded in 2018. We work mainly with German clients, but also serve international brands across Europe and the USA. Our clients come from every industry you can imagine – supplements, beauty, home & living, pet, electronics, fashion, baby products, and more.



We are obsessed with Amazon. We test everything, read every update, break down every new beta feature, and push our clients to results they didn't think were possible. No autopilot. No "set and forget". No agency BS.

Now we are looking for a Senior Amazon PPC Manager – someone who can take full ownership of a portfolio of accounts, think strategically, and mentor junior tea
mbers along the way.



Who We Are NOT Looking For

Let's be direct. Do not apply if:



You are looking for a short-term gig or just a "bridge job" until something else comes up.

You are working multiple jobs in parallel and trying to squeeze us in on the side. We need your focus. Period.

You don't want to grow, learn, and push yourself every single week.

You want to clock in, clock out and never go beyond the bare minimum.

You see Amazon PPC as "just a job" instead of a craft you want to master.

You can't take direct, honest feedback without taking it personally.



We're not for everyone – and that's okay.

Who We ARE Looking For

We are looking for a true A-Player. Someone who:



Wants to go full throttle and be one of the best in the game.

Treats client accounts like their own business.

Is hungry, curious, and obsessed with getting better.

Wants to grow with us long-term and build a real career.

Brings energy, ideas, and ownership to the table every single day.



If that's you – we'd love to meet you.



What You'll Own



Full Account Ownership: manage a portfolio of premium client accounts end-to-end – from strategy to execution to client communication.

Advertising Strategy: build PPC strategies across Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display – and where relevant, Amazon DSP and AMC.

Launch & Scale: from new product launches to aggressive scaling of existing winners – you know when to push and when to defend.

Advanced Optimization: bid strategies, placement optimization, SKU-level profitability, TACoS management, dayparting, portfolio structuring – you go way beyond dashboard-level.

Account Audits & Strategic Planning: diagnose weaknesses, identify opportunities, build 30/60/90 day roadmaps for every account.

Client Communication: lead client calls, present results, push back when needed, be the trusted expert clients rely on.

Mentorship: help our Junior PPC Managers and Assistants grow – share your playbook, review their work, develop the next generation.

Process Development: help us build better SOPs, templates and internal tools – your experience shapes how we operate.

Stay Ahead: test new Amazon features, evaluate new tools, and bring fresh ideas to the team.





What You Must Know (Non-Negotiables)

These are the things you absolutely need to have under your belt as a Senior:



Deep mastery of all Sponsored Ads formats: Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands (incl. Video & Brand Store), Sponsored Display (incl. Audiences & Custom Creatives), and how they interact.

Campaign architecture: SKAG, single-keyword, theme-based, performance-based – you know which structure works when and why.

Advanced bidding strategies: dynamic bids, placement modifiers, top-of-search optimization, bid by placement, bid hijacking defense.

Keyword research & targeting: Helium 10 (Cerebro, Magnet, Frankenstein), Brand Analytics, Search Query Performance Report (SQP) – you can pull insights most managers miss.

TACoS vs ACoS: you understand the difference, when to optimize for which, and how to communicate it to clients.

Search Term Reports & Negative Mining: you build clean, performance-focused accounts without keyword cannibalization.

Brand Defense & Conquesting: you protect your client's branded search and attack competitors strategically.

Organic & Paid Synergy: you understand how PPC influences organic ranking (and vice versa) – BSR, indexation, halo effect.

Listing Fundamentals: you know that even the best PPC can't fix a bad listing – and you can identify what needs to change.

Reporting & Storytelling: you don't just deliver numbers – you tell the story behind them.

Bulk File Operations: you can edit, optimize and upload bulk files like a surgeon.

Tool Stack: Helium 10, Brand Analytics, Pacvue / Perpetua / Adtomic / Sellerboard or similar – at least one professional ad management tool you've worked with hands-on.

Bonus (high value): Amazon DSP, AMC (Amazon Marketing Cloud), Vendor Central, international marketplaces (US, UK, DE, FR, IT, ES).



If you read this list and thought "yes, that's me" – continue. If half of these are unfamiliar, this role is not the right fit yet.



What You Bring



4+ years of hands-on Amazon Advertising experience (agency or in-house), ideally managing multiple 6- and 7-figure accounts.

Strong communication – confident in client calls, clear in writing, direct but professional.

Ownership mentality – fully accountable, no excuses.

Stable internet and a professional remote work setup.





What We Offer

Ownership & Growth

Deep Work culture – no unnecessary meetings, no micromanagement.

Real team culture – weekly team calls, virtual coffee, and annual team events.



If you read the full text start your message with "HI WOLF"

title: Remote Productivity Coach - No Experience Needed. Help People Reach Their Goals
description:
*No coaching experience needed- training provided.*



We're a growing productivity coaching app helping people build better habits and reach their goals. We're looking for empathetic, consistent people who genuinely want to help others grow.



Your role:

• Check in daily via text with each client to track progress and keep them accountable

• Proactively encourage, challenge, and guide clients- not just cheer them on, but help them problem-solve and stay on track

• Build genuine connections through consistent, thoughtful communication

• Make occasional short video calls to check in with clients



What you'll be part of:

• A supportive team of 15+ coaches who genuinely care about helping people grow

• Weekly team calls where coaches discuss strategies, share insights, and learn together

• Monthly 20 min reads on coaching and personal development topics that we discuss as a team

• A culture of sharing a bit of who you are- eg: posting a casual photo or a quick life update to build connection with clients (think low-key and natural, not too personal)

• Regular feedback on your coaching to help you keep growing



About training:

Before working with clients, you'll complete a structured 10-day training program. Expect to dedicate approximately 1.5–2 hours per day during training. This includes reading our coaching methodology, completing practical exercises with feedback, live practice sessions, and using the app daily as both a coach and a client. We invest in thorough training because quality matters- coaches who complete it feel confident and well-prepared from day one.



Schedule:

• You choose your working schedule (pick a time block and stick to it)

• Daily check-ins include weekends (workload is lighter on weekends)

• Consistency is key- clients rely on hearing from you at roughly the same time each day



*This is a committed long term role, not a casual freelance gig- we're looking for people who want to stick around and grow with us*



If you enjoy connecting with people and helping them grow, we'd love to hear from you!





?? To apply, please answer these questions in your message:



1. What is your preferred 3-hour work block? (UTC)

• 11AM–2PM UTC (highest priority)

• 8AM–11AM UTC (high priority)

• 8PM–11PM UTC (prioirity)



2. Daily check-ins at the same time every day (incl. weekends — lighter workload) + a 10-day training program (1.5–2 hrs/day) are required. Can you commit to both?



3. Alex, a developer, says: "I'm overwhelmed with client projects, marketing, social media… I get sidetracked easily, and by the time I deal with emails, it's too late for my core work. Staying motivated is getting tough." How would you reply? (Don't use AI)



4. Sam has been checking in with you daily for two weeks and making good progress. Then he goes silent for 3 days — no check-ins, no messages. What do you do? (Don't use AI)



5. Do you have a computer and reliable internet access?



Looking forward to your answers!

description:

Dentistry Support® provides essential services to dental practices, including billing, eligibility verification, and phone support. We help dental offices streamline operations, improve efficiency, and deliver a better patient experience. We are seeking motivated, confident sales professionals who are ready to build long-term income through a residual commission structure.

As an Outbound Sales Representative, you will be responsible for enrolling dental practices into Dentistry Support® services through consistent outreach and follow-up. This is a performance-driven role designed for individuals who are comfortable with high-volume communication and confident in closing deals. This position transitions into a fully commission-based role, offering the opportunity to build recurring monthly income.

- Make outbound calls to dental practices daily

, Instagram, and other social media platforms

- $1.50/hour + commission

- 100% commission-based (no hourly pay)

Requirements:

- Previous sales experience required (outbound preferred)

- Strong communication and closing skills

- Confidence in presenting and selling services

- Experience using social media for lead generation

- Self-motivated and comfortable in a commission-driven role



Additional Expectations:

- High-volume outreach (calls, texts,
s) is required

- Must consistently work toward monthly enrollment goals

- Must submit a voice recording by Month 3 demonstrating sales ability



Who This Role is for:

- Individuals seeking uncapped earning potential

- Sales professionals who want to build residual income

- Self-starters who thrive in a performance-based environment



Why Join Dentistry Support®?

- Build long-term monthly income, not just one-time commissions

- Fully remote position

- Opportunity to grow with a scaling company

- Performance-based earnings with no cap

title: YouTube Explainer Video Edito
description:
Hiring: YouTube Explainer Video Editor



I’m looking for a skilled video editor to help edit 5–10 minute YouTube explainer videos for my GoHighLevel / AI business content.



Style:

Clean, modern, smooth-flowing, engaging, and high-retention editing.



I like the editing style of Sabri Suby, Jasper Aitken, Ed Lawrence, and Greg Edits Video — professional, sharp, and polished without being overly flashy or over the top. The goal is strong viewer retention, smooth pacing, and premium presentation.



Examples include:

Clean talking-head edits

Smooth zoom cuts

Text overlays for key points

Simple motion graphics

Professional captions

Light B-roll where needed

Subtle sound design

Strong hooks and pacing that keep viewers watching



You must understand:

- YouTube retention editing

- Professional business content editing

- Short-form repurposing (bonus)

- Thumbnail understanding (bonus)

- English communication

- Fast turnaround



I do not want:

Overly flashy edits

Excessive memes or distractions

Cheap-looking animations

Too much “TikTok style” editing



Trial Task:

1 x paid test edit for a 5–7 minute video



Please send:

- Portfolio

- Your best YouTube edits

- Your rate per video

- Turnaround time



Looking for long-term work for the right person.

ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.

eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

title: Expert Video Editor (Long-Form Vlogs / Short-Form Content)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a skilled Video Editor to support our content. This role requires someone who can produce polished, professional-quality videos and collaborate closely with our team to bring our creative vision to life. Strong communication is essential. This is not a “just edit and submit” role.



Responsibilities

Edit long-form vlog content as a priority, along with short-form content including Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and short YouTube videos

Edit and structure long-form videos with strong storytelling and audience retention in mind

Work with vlog-style content, ensuring natural flow, engaging pacing, and personality-driven edits

Deliver clean, professional edits aligned with brand guidelines and creative direction

Collaborate closely with our team to understand feedback, vision, and revisions

Manage timelines and deliver projects on schedule

Maintain consistency in style, pacing, and quality across projects



Requirements

At least 5 years of professional video editing experience (Bonus points if you have done travel vlogs)

Proficient in industry-standard editing tools (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve)

Strong understanding of both short-form and long-form content pacing and storytelling

Experience editing vlog-style content and ability to enhance personality-driven narratives

Fluent in spoken and written English

Highly communicative and responsive and clear communication is a must

Able to understand creative direction and translate vision into final output

Strong attention to detail and visual quality



Important Note on Style

We are looking for professional-level editing

Content should not look templated or “CapCut-style”

Editors should demonstrate intentional cuts, clean transitions, and strong visual judgment



Nice to Have

Experience working with brands or content-driven teams

Motion graphics or light animation skills

Strong sense of branding and aesthetics



How to Apply

Please submit:

Your resume

A link to your portfolio or reel (short-form work required)

A short description of your experience and your editing tools of choice
