title: GHL Expert
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, technical, and proactive GoHighLevel Expert to serve as the backbone of our digital operations. Your primary mission will be to transform our CRM into a well-oiled machine by building robust workflows, streamlining lead management, and designing high-converting funnels.



If you speak "GHL" as a second language and get excited about a perfectly mapped-out automation, we want to talk to you.



Key Responsibilities

CRM Architecture & Organization: Audit and overhaul our current CRM structure to ensure data integrity and ease of use for the sales team.



Pipeline Management: Design and implement custom Pipelines that accurately reflect our customer journey, from cold lead to closed-won.



Data Segmentation: Create and maintain a sophisticated Tagging System to ensure leads are properly categorized for targeted marketing.



Workflow Automation: Build complex Triggers and Automations to eliminate manual tasks, including lead nurture sequences, appointment reminders, and internal notifications.



Funnel Building: Design, build, and optimize high-converting Landing Pages and Funnels within the GHL ecosystem.



System Integration: Ensure GHL communicates seamlessly with third-party tools via Webhooks or Zapier where necessary.



Required Skills & Qualifications

GHL Mastery: Proven experience managing GoHighLevel sub-accounts at an advanced level.



Logic-Driven Mindset: Ability to map out "If/Then" scenarios and translate business needs into technical workflows.



Strategic Tagging: Deep understanding of how to use tags to trigger specific actions without creating "automation loops."



Design Sensibility: Ability to build clean, mobile-responsive funnels that align with modern UI/UX standards.



Attention to Detail: You test every link, every trigger, and every
 before going live.

title: AI Video Editor - Marketing Manager  (Performance Pay + Free AI Training)
description:
BOUT US:

 

We're a European DTC brand scaling fast on Meta and TikTok across the Netherlands, Belgium, and Germany. Our creative output is the engine of our growth, and we need a sharp video editor to plug in and ride the wave with us.

 

================================================================

 

THE OPPORTUNITY:

 

This isn't a typical editing gig. It's a long-term play with real upside.

 

We're hiring someone who'll start as our video editor (10-20 hrs/week) and step into a full-time Marketing Manager seat within 6-12 months. If you've got drive, curiosity, and a real interest in performance marketing — keep reading.

 

THE TRAJECTORY:

 

- Months 1-3: Video Editor (10-20 hrs/week) — execute briefs, sharpen your AI workflow

- Months 3-6: Senior Editor + Creative Strategist — pitch concepts, shape hooks, influence direction

- Months 6-12: Marketing Manager (full-time) — run campaigns, lead the creative pipeline, report on results

 

THE PAY:

 

- Base: $4 USD/hour

- Performance bonuses: When your ads deliver strong ROAS, you earn extra. The better your work, the bigger your check. Simple as that.

- Free AI training during the trial: Day one, you get full access to Franky Shaw's paid Instagram content (
) — arguably the sharpest AI video training out there. Whether or not we end up long-term, those skills are yours to keep.

 

If you want to be paid for output, not for clocking hours, this works. Strong editors earn well above the base.

 

================================================================

 

THE WORK:

 

- Short-form video ads (15-60s) for Meta and TikTok

- AI-driven ad creative using Higgsfield, Runway, Kling, ElevenLabs, HeyGen

- Multiple hook variations per video — we test relentlessly

- Localization: ads run in English, Dutch, and German. Translations come with the brief — you handle voice-over, subtitles, and clean delivery using AI tools.

- Quick turnarounds and rapid iteration based on live performance data

 

================================================================

 

WHY THIS ROLE STANDS OUT:

 

- Real growth path: editor today, Marketing Manager in under a year

- Performance bonuses tied directly to your output

- Free Franky Shaw training during the trial — yours regardless of outcome

- Briefs come fully prepped with translations

- Quick feedback loops and live data on what works

- Your edits run on real ad spend — you see exactly what they do

 

================================================================

 

YOU'RE A FIT IF:

 

- You already work with AI video tools (Higgsfield, Runway, Sora, Kling, ElevenLabs, HeyGen, etc.)

- You've cut short-form content for social

- You can find sharp B-roll, stock, and reference material

- Your English is solid

- You can turn a video around in 24-48 hours

- You're okay with $4/hour base + bonuses (this isn't the role if you need a high upfront rate)

- You want to grow, not just clock in

 

If you're reading this and you're NOT an AI type: Pina Colada (in google forms)

 

================================================================

 

HOW TO APPLY — TASK FIRST, RESUME NEVER:

 

We don't read resumes. We judge work. Complete the task below if you want a shot.

 

STEP 1 — Watch and download our winning founder video:

???? 

 

STEP 2 — The Task: 3 Dutch Hook Variations

 

Build 3 fresh Dutch (Netherlands) hook variations for the opening 3 seconds. Text overlays, B-roll cutaways, AI-generated clips, AI voice-over swaps — use whatever stops the scroll.

 

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING AT:

 

- Creativity — Did you bring something genuinely new, or just rewrite the text?

- Sourcing — Where did the visuals come from? Stock? AI? Custom? Quality is the bar.

- Localization — We run ads in English, Dutch, AND German. Show you can handle translations cleanly with AI tools (ElevenLabs, HeyGen, etc.). Translations come with every brief — your job is execution.

 

STEP 3 — Submit here:



 

The form is the only way in. Five minutes to fill out once the task is done. You'll upload your 3 hooks and answer quick questions on experience, availability, and goals.

 

================================================================

 

WHAT'S NEXT:

 

If your task lands, you're in for a paid 2-week trial. From day one of the trial:

 

- Full access to Franky Shaw's paid Instagram training

- Real ad projects on your plate

- Direct feedback and mentorship

- A clear track toward the Marketing Manager seat

 

================================================================

 

DEADLINE: 3 days from today.

 

No task = no reply. If you skipped the task, you didn't read the post.

 

Let's go.

title: Architect / Building Designer – Residential (Concept to Construction)
description:
Architect / Building Designer – Residential (Concept to Construction)



Overview

Build Prestige Homes is an Australian based residential building company specialising in high-end custom homes. We are seeking an experienced Architect or Building Designer to support our projects from initial concept through to working drawings, including high-quality renders and client presentation material.



This role is suited to a designer who can think beyond aesthetics and design with buildability, cost efficiency and construction practicality in mind. You will work closely with the director and project team to deliver well-resolved, high-level residential designs that translate seamlessly from concept to construction.



Projects range from 200m² to 2000m² homes, including both lowset and highset dwellings.



Scope of Services

• Concept design development aligned with client brief and site constraints

• Design refinement and coordination through to working drawings

• Preparation of detailed construction documentation suitable for Australian standards (QLD)

• Production of high-quality renders for client presentations

• Ability to assist with or coordinate walkthroughs and visual presentations where required

• Ongoing collaboration with builder and consultants to ensure design intent is maintained and buildable



Design Requirements

We are specifically looking for a designer with experience in:

• Modern / contemporary residential homes

• Classical American style homes

• New Zealand farmhouse style homes



Design approach must include:

• Strong understanding of construction methods and sequencing

• Practical and efficient design solutions

• Integration of “grand design” features without compromising buildability

• Cost-conscious detailing and material selection

• Ability to design with an engineering mindset, not just conceptual



Position Requirements

• Proven experience in high-end residential design

• Ability to deliver both concept and detailed working drawings

• Proficiency in relevant design software (e.g. ArchiCAD, Revit, AutoCAD or similar)

• Experience producing high-quality renders and presentation material

• Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate with builders and consultants

• High level of attention to detail and documentation accuracy

• Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines



Preferred Experience

• Experience working with custom home builders

• Familiarity with Brisbane City Council and Gold Coast City Council building codes and approval requirements

• Strong understanding of Australian building standards and documentation requirements

• Experience designing homes on complex or sloping sites

• Ability to value engineer designs without compromising quality



Working Relationship

This role can be structured as:

• Ongoing contract work, or

• Project-by-project engagement



We are seeking a long-term working relationship with the right designer who aligns with our standards, systems and approach.



Application Requirements

If interested, please submit:

• A portfolio of relevant residential projects (concept through to completed documentation if possible)

• A brief written application outlining:



Your experience and design approach

Your experience with similar project types and styles

Your availability and preferred working arrangement

Your fee structure or indicative rates

title: Social Media & Marketing Manager
description:
Job Type: Full-Time | Remote

Schedule: Monday – Friday | Hours aligned with US Eastern Time

Compensation: $3.00 – $5.00 USD/hour (based on experience)

Start Date: ASAP



?? READ THIS ENTIRE POST BEFORE APPLYING. Applications that do not follow the instructions at the bottom will NOT be considered.



About STEAMUP Academy

STEAMUP Academy is a fast-growing, mission-driven educational organization that inspires and empowers young thinkers, innovators, and leaders through hands-on programs in Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics (STEAM). Our brand is bold, colorful, and creative and we need a talented creative professional to match that energy and bring our story to life across all platforms.



About This Role

We are looking for a creative powerhouse who can do it all; design stunning visuals, produce engaging videos, write compelling copy, and manage our social media presence end-to-end. You will be the visual voice of STEAMUP Academy and play a major role in growing our brand awareness, attracting new students, and building an engaged online community.



This role is NOT for someone who only schedules posts. We need someone who can create professional-quality content, think strategically about our brand, and deliver scroll-stopping visuals consistently.



Key Responsibilities

Social Media Management

Manage and grow STEAMUP Academy's presence across Instagram,
, TikTok, YouTube, and LinkedIn

Develop and execute a monthly content calendar with consistent, on-brand posting

Write engaging, audience-appropriate captions with strategic hashtags

Monitor comments, DMs, and community engagement, respond and build relationships

Track performance metrics (reach, engagement, follower growth) and provide monthly reports

Stay current with platform trends, algorithm changes, and viral content formats



Video Production & Editing

- Create professional short-form video content for Reels,
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Edit longer-form content such as program highlights, testimonials, and event recaps

- Add captions, graphics, transitions, and music to produce polished, engaging videos

- Create promotional videos and ads for STEAMUP Academy programs and events

- Record and edit basic voiceovers or coordinate with the CEO for video narration



Graphic Design & Visual Content

- Design eye-catching flyers, posters, banners, and promotional materials for programs and events

- Create branded social media graphics, story templates, and carousel posts

- Design
 headers, newsletters, and digital marketing assets

- Produce presentation decks and pitch materials that reflect STEAMUP Academy's brand

- Ensure all visuals maintain consistent branding (colors, fonts, tone)



Marketing & Advertising

- Assist with planning and executing paid ad campaigns 
/Instagram Ads, Google Ads)

- Create content to support student enrollment, event registration, and partnership outreach

- Write basic marketing copy for
s, landing pages, and promotional materials

- Research competitors and emerging trends in STEAM education marketing

- Support community outreach initiatives with digital and print marketing collateral





Required Skills & Experience

Must Have:



- Minimum 2 years of experience in social media management and content creation

- Expert-level proficiency in Canva Pro (portfolio of work required)

- Proficiency in video editing software; CapCut, Adobe Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

- Strong understanding of Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube best practices

- Excellent English writing skills; captions, copy, and communications must be flawless

- An eye for design: you understand composition, color theory, typography, and branding

- Ability to create content that is both visually beautiful AND strategically effective

- Self-motivated, highly organized, and able to hit deadlines without reminders



Preferred / Big Plus:

- Experience with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro)

- Experience running
/Instagram Ads or Google Ads

- Familiarity with
 marketing platforms (Mailchimp, Flodesk, or similar)

- Experience with scheduling tools (Later, Buffer, Hootsuite, Meta Business Suite)

- Video content creation experience using a smartphone or basic camera setup

- Background or interest in education, youth programs, or nonprofits

- Experience with YouTube SEO and growing a YouTube channel



You Are a Great Fit If You...

- Have a portfolio that makes people stop and say "Wow."

- Understand what makes content go viral and can replicate it with purpose.

- Think like a marketer AND an artist at the same time.

- Are organized enough to execute a content calendar without being chased.

- Take feedback well and iterate quickly.

- Are passionate about education, youth development, or community impact.

- Communicate clearly in writing and always keep the CEO informed on progress.



What We Offer

- Competitive pay: 3.00 – $5.00 USD/hour (based on experience and portfolio quality)

- Full-time, stable, long-term position

- Creative freedom within a supportive and collaborative team

- Opportunity to build an impressive portfolio with a mission-driven brand

- Professional growth in a fast-growing educational organization

- Supportive and inspiring work culture



How to Apply

Your application MUST include ALL of the following or it will not be reviewed:



1. Start your message with the phrase: "I Create for STEAM" (confirms you read the full post)

2. A brief introductory video about yourself and your creative background in your own words)

3. A portfolio link or examples of your work; this is REQUIRED. Include:

- At least 2 social media graphics or flyers you have designed

- At least 1 video you have edited or created

- Any social media accounts you have managed (share the handle)



4. The tools and software you use most (be specific; Canva, CapCut, Adobe, etc.)

5. Your availability, time zone, and internet speed (a fast, stable connection is required)

6. Your resume or CV



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. We want to see what you can do; show us your best work!

title: YouTube AI Content Creator and Manager
description:
We are seeking a YouTube AI Content Creator who can leverage AI Agent tools to research, collect data, and transform insights into engaging, high-quality videos. The ideal candidate will have a strong sense of storytelling, visual creativity, and hands-on experience in video editing and channel management.



Key Responsibilities

* Use AI Agent tools to automate workflows, streamline research, and organize data efficiently

* Handle graphic design, scriptwriting, footage collection, AI voiceovers, video editing, and background music integration

* Create eye-catching thumbnails, SEO-optimized descriptions, and tags to boost visibility and engagement

* Set up and manage a YouTube channel, including profile design, cover art, logo, intro/outro, and ongoing content updates

s regarding refunds, tracking numbers, FAQs.

title: Drafting and Estimating Administrator
description:
Remote Drafting & Estimating Administrator (Construction / Structural Steel)

About the Role



We are seeking an experienced Drafting & Estimating Administrator to provide back-end technical and administrative support within the mining and construction industry, specifically in structural steel fabrication and construction.



This role is critical in ensuring accurate technical documentation, cost estimation, compliance alignment, and overall project support.



Role Overview



This is a multi-functional technical and administrative support role. You will work closely with project managers and engineers to ensure project documentation, compliance requirements, and cost estimates are prepared accurately and on time.



1. Compliance Support

Assist with WHS documentation and compliance tracking

Maintain contractor compliance registers

Support project documentation required for mining and construction site entry. Coordinate the creation of MDR (Manufacturer’s Data Record) packages by collating fabrication drawings, ITPs, material traceability records, weld maps, NDT results, and inspection documentation, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and alignment with project and client requirements.

Track certifications, licences, and expiry dates



2. Drafting Support

Prepare and revise technical drawings using AutoCAD, Tekla, or similar drafting software

Interpret structural and fabrication drawings

Assist in producing shop drawings and as-built documentation

Maintain drawing registers and version control

Coordinate revisions based on engineering or project changes

The ability to create and work with DXF files and NC1 Files





3. Estimating Support

Assist in preparing cost estimates for structural steel projects

Perform quantity take-offs from drawings

Support material costing, labour costing, and project budgeting

Prepare tender documentation support

Maintain estimating records and pricing databases

4. Administrative, Data Entry & Filing

Maintain structured digital filing systems

Ensure accurate data entry into project management systems

Support invoice tracking and documentation collation

Assist with reporting and documentation preparation

Required Skills & Experience

Technical Skills

Proven experience in drafting or construction drafting

Experience supporting estimating in construction or fabrication projects

Strong proficiency in AutoCAD or similar CAD software

Ability to interpret engineering drawings

Experience working within mining or construction environments 

Administrative & Compliance Skills

Strong document control experience

Familiarity with construction compliance 

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Strong organisational skills

Systems & Software

Microsoft Office Suite and Microsoft 365 Suite

Project management or construction software

Cloud document management platforms

Soft Skills

Strong written communication skills

Ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously

Proactive and solution-focused mindset

High level of confidentiality and professionalism





Qualifications

Degree in Drafting, Engineering, Construction Management, or a similar field (preferred)

Minimum 3+ years’ experience in structural steel/ mining/construction support roles

Demonstrated experience in drafting and estimating support

title: US Senior Accountant
description:
Role Overview



We are looking for a Senior Accountant with hands-on experience in QuickBooks and full-cycle accounting. This role is responsible for managing the complete accounting process - from transaction recording to financial statement preparation. Experience in property or short-term rental accounting is a plus, but not required.



The ideal candidate has hands-on experience handling end-to-end accounting, reconciliations, and financial reporting, and can work independently with high accuracy.



Key Responsibilities



1. End-to-End Accounting

- Handle full-cycle accounting: journal entries, general ledger, and month-end close

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records

- Ensure proper account classification and chart of accounts management



2. Financial Reporting

- Prepare monthly financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)

- Perform variance analysis and explain key movements

- Ensure reports are accurate, timely, and aligned with management needs



3. Bank & Account Reconciliation

- Perform regular bank, credit card, and clearing account reconciliations

- Identify and resolve discrepancies promptly

- Maintain clean and reconciled books at all times



4. Accounts Payable & Receivable

- Manage vendor bills, payments, and expense tracking

- Monitor receivables and follow up on collections if needed

- Ensure proper documentation and approval processes



5. QuickBooks Management

- Maintain and manage QuickBooks Online (QBO)

- Ensure proper setup, integrations, and data accuracy

- Troubleshoot issues and support improvements in workflows



6. Compliance & Documentation

- Maintain organized records and audit-ready documentation

- Support tax filings and compliance requirements

- Follow and improve accounting processes and SOPs



Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting (CPA is a big plus)

- 5+ years of accounting experience with full-cycle accounting

- Strong experience with QuickBooks Online (QBO)

- Solid understanding of Financial statements, Reconciliations, General ledger and month-end close

- High attention to detail and ability to work independently



Nice to Have (Not Required)

- Experience in property, real estate, or short-term rental accounting

- Familiarity with tools like Guesty, AppFolio, or similar

- Experience with multi-entity accounting



To apply, send a link to your resume and relevant experience.



What We Offer

- 13th month pay

- HMO coverage

- Paid holidays

- Paid time off (PTO)

- Remote setup (US hours)

title: Senior Manual QA Engineer
description:
About Outside Hire



Outside Hire is a growing outsourcing company with over 75 employees, building custom products and solutions for our clients. We're dynamic, fast-paced, and always evolving!







About the Role



JOB DESCRIPTION



The Senior Manual QA Engineer serves as the hands-on quality gatekeeper responsible for comprehensive manual testing of the payment processing platform. This role focuses on end-to-end validation of payment flows, compliance verification, exploratory testing, and ensuring that all features meet acceptance criteria before production release.

Working alongside the Senior Automation QA Engineer, this role owns the manual testing strategy for complex payment scenarios that require human judgment, edge case exploration, and real-world user experience validation. The Senior Manual QA Engineer is critical to ensuring the platform delivers a compliant, reliable, and user-friendly payment experience for partners and their customers.





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



End-to-End Payment Flow Testing

•    Execute comprehensive manual testing of complete payment flows from checkout initiation through settlement confirmation

•    Validate dynamic surcharge calculations across different card types (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover), BIN ranges, and jurisdictions

•    Test split settlement scenarios ensuring accurate distribution to Partners, Merchants, Promoters, and the Platform

•    Verify cost calculation engine including interchange fees, acquirer fees, and platform fees

•    Test Apple Pay and Google Pay wallet integrations including DPAN handling and tokenization

•    Validate refund and chargeback workflows including proportional surcharge reversals



Compliance & Regulatory Testing

•    Validate Durbin Amendment compliance ensuring regulated debit cards are blocked from surcharges

•    Test state-specific surcharge cap enforcement (e.g., 3% Nevada cap, California, Texas Ticketing Act rules)

•    Verify card network surcharge rules (Visa, Mastercard maximum caps) are correctly applied

•    Test PCI-DSS compliance requirements including secure card data handling in hosted payment fields

•    Validate fee transparency requirements ensuring buyers see accurate line-item breakdowns



Integration Testing

•    Test Partner HPP (Hosted Payment Page) integration including API responses, field rendering, and error handling

•    Validate webhook notifications (Transaction Authorized, Declined, Split Completed, Refund Initiated, Payout Settled)

•    Test payment processor integration including authorization, capture, and settlement flows

•    Verify BIN lookup service integration accuracy and fallback handling

•    Test tokenization service integration for payment method tokens



Exploratory & Edge Case Testing

•    Conduct exploratory testing sessions to discover edge cases and unexpected system behaviors

•    Test boundary conditions for surcharge calculations, transaction amounts, and split percentages

•    Validate error handling and graceful degradation when external services fail (BIN lookup, processor timeouts)

•    Test concurrent transaction scenarios and race conditions in split settlement

•    Perform negative testing including invalid card data, expired tokens, and malformed requests



Test Documentation & Management

•    Create and maintain comprehensive test cases for all payment scenarios

•    Document test execution results with clear pass/fail criteria and evidence

•    Write detailed bug reports with reproduction steps, expected vs. actual results, and severity classification

•    Maintain test data sets for different card types, jurisdictions, and merchant configurations

•    Collaborate with Automation QA to identify test cases suitable for automation vs. manual execution



UAT & Stakeholder Coordination

•    Support User Acceptance Testing (UAT) with Partner engineering teams

•    Coordinate testing activities with engineering team during sprint cycles

•    Participate in sprint planning to estimate testing effort and identify risks

•    Communicate test status, blockers, and quality metrics to stakeholders

•    Validate production readiness criteria before pilot launches



WHAT THIS ROLE WILL NOT DO



•    Write or maintain automated test scripts — this is owned by the Senior Automation QA Engineer

•    Configure CI/CD pipeline test integrations — DevOps and Automation QA responsibility

•    Write production code or fix bugs — engineering team responsibility

•    Make architectural or design decisions — owned by Chief Architect and Engineering Manager

•    Conduct performance or load testing — this requires specialized tooling owned by Automation QA

•    Manage production deployments or infrastructure — DevOps responsibility

•    Define product requirements or acceptance criteria — Technical Product Owner responsibility (though will validate against them)



REQUIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE



Experience

•    5+ years of manual software testing experience, with at least 2 years in payment processing, fintech, or financial services

•    Proven track record of testing complex, multi-system integrations

•    Experience with agile development methodologies and sprint-based delivery

•    History of working in regulated environments requiring compliance validation



Technical Skills

•    Strong understanding of REST APIs and ability to test using tools like Postman or Insomnia

•    Proficiency in SQL for database validation and test data management

•    Experience testing webhook integrations and asynchronous event flows

•    Familiarity 
 or Java applications and AWS / Azure cloud services

•    Understanding of payment card data flows (PAN, tokenization, BIN lookup)

•    Experience with test management tools (Jira, TestRail, or similar)



Testing Expertise

•    Expertise in test case design using techniques like equivalence partitioning, boundary value analysis, and decision tables

•    Strong exploratory testing skills with session-based test management experience

•    Ability to perform risk-based testing and prioritize based on business impact

•    Experience with regression testing strategies for high-velocity release cycles

•    Knowledge of UAT facilitation and stakeholder coordination



Soft Skills

•    Excellent written communication for test documentation and bug reports

•    Strong attention to detail and analytical thinking

•    Ability to work collaboratively with developers, product owners, and external stakeholders

•    Proactive communication of risks and blockers

•    Comfortable challenging assumptions and advocating for quality



PREFERRED CAPABILITIES



•    Experience testing payment gateway integrations (Stripe, PayPal, Square, ProPay, or similar)

•    Knowledge of PCI-DSS compliance requirements and security testing

•    Familiarity with surcharge regulations (Durbin Amendment, state-specific caps, card network rules)

•    Experience with ticketing platforms or event management systems

•    Understanding of split payment/settlement systems and multi-party fund distribution

•    Experience testing mobile wallet integrations (Apple Pay, Google Pay)

•    Background in testing reconciliation and financial reporting systems

•    Knowledge of interchange fee structures and card network economics

•    Experience with chargeback and dispute management workflows

•    ISTQB or similar QA certification



SUCCESS PROFILE



The ideal candidate is a meticulous payment testing specialist who combines deep domain knowledge with hands-on testing expertise. They understand that in payment systems, edge cases aren't just edge cases—they're potential compliance violations or financial losses.



You'll thrive in this role if you:

•    Get satisfaction from finding bugs that would have caused real-world payment failures

•    Enjoy the detective work of exploratory testing in complex financial systems

•    Take pride in comprehensive test documentation that enables repeatable quality

•    Value compliance and understand why regulatory requirements matter

•    Collaborate effectively with developers without creating adversarial relationships

•    Stay curious about how payment systems work behind the scenes

•    Can balance thoroughness with sprint delivery timelines





WHY OUTSIDEHIRE?



Inclusive Environment: Dynamic work environment that values creativity and collaboration

Cutting-Edge Projects: Modern, well-architected platform with best-in-class tools

Impact: Build systems that process real financial transactions

Modern Stack: Quarkus, Kotlin, AWS, and AI coding assistants

Competitive Benefits: Competitive salary, remote work, professional development

Growth Culture: Continuous learning, innovation, and recognition

Work-Life Balance: Flexible hours, remote-first, sustainable pace







Outside Hire is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.





Last Updated: January 2026

title: Operations Manager (COO-Level) | E-commerce | Systems, Teams & Execution
description:
IMPORTANT: This is a high-impact, strategic execution role for experienced Operations Managers. This is not a support role. This is ownership.



We are a fast-growing, highly profitable 9-figure e-commerce company operating in a fast-paced environment where execution, structure, and systems are critical.



We move fast, scale aggressively, and need someone who can build order inside complexity.



We are looking for a high-level Operations Manager (COO-type profile) to act as the right hand to the CEO and take ownership of internal operations, systems, and team performance across multiple departments.



This role is about turning strategy into execution, building systems, managing teams, and making sure everything runs efficiently.





What You Will Own



Operations & Systems



Build, improve, and optimize internal processes across teams.

Create systems that allow the company to scale efficiently.

Identify inefficiencies and bottlenecks and solve them proactively.

Implement tracking systems (dashboards, reporting, automations) across our platforms.



Execution & Team Performance



Work across teams and functions to ensure operations run efficiently through systems and structure.

Manage and overview different departments and their managers



Partner Management



Manage relationships with service providers (software, tools, agencies, platforms).

Ensure partners deliver results and meet expectations.

Negotiate, improve, or replace providers when needed.





What We Are Looking For



Strong experience as an Operations Manager, COO, or similar role.

Experience in e-commerce or fast-paced online businesses.

Proven ability to build systems, processes, and teams.

Experience managing teams across different departments (not just individual contributors).

Strong understanding of KPIs and performance tracking.

High ownership and execution mindset.

Ability to operate without constant supervision.





What This Role Is Not



If you:

Need step-by-step instructions

Prefer to “assist” instead of lead

Avoid responsibility or ownership

Focus more on theory than execution



This role is not for you.



We are looking for someone who acts like an owner, not an employee.





Compensation

$5,000–$10,000/month depending on experience

Performance-based bonuses

Long-term growth potential





How to Apply



Complete the application form.



We are not looking for perfect answers. We are looking for how you think, how you solve problems, and how you operate in real-world situations.



We are not looking for perfect answers. We are looking for how you think, how you solve problems, and how you operate in real-world situations.

title: VIRTUAL ADMIN ASSISTANT - UK Real Estate
description:
Hi, thanks for checking out our job posting!





WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING WITH PERDYKE PROPERTY



When you start working with us, you will feel welcomed, supported and valued.



You will be encouraged to develop yourself professionally and contribute to improving our business processes. Once you’re settled in, your responsibilities will grow and your work will become more rewarding and varied.



You will be part of a friendly, supportive environment, and when you show yourself to be a great team member you’ll be promoted to a position worthy of your abilities.



If you want to join my established and growing business I welcome you to apply and show me what you can do.





THE ROLE WE ARE HIRING FOR



This role supports the team by handling key administrative tasks efficiently, helping to ensure the best possible experience for our guests.



In giving the guests the best experience we equally maximise owners revenue and satisfaction.





RECURRING TASKS



This role involves regular data entry - pulling invoices and recording them in a spreadsheet. You’ll also handle guest communications through a platform called Avantio. cdwq In addition, you’ll take on general admin tasks, which may evolve as the role develops.





WHY WE’RE A GREAT PLACE TO WORK



Here is an introduction to who we are and what we do.



Our business does several things: it sources, refurbishes and prepares holiday-let properties for guests.

We then manage the holiday let properties on behalf of the owner and take care of all day-to-day operations.



Our Business Has Two Core Client Groups

We operate a holiday let management company that serves two distinct types of clients:

Holiday Guests – These are individuals or families who book and stay in the holiday properties we manage. We focus on providing them with a smooth, enjoyable, and high-quality experience from booking to check-out.





Property Owners – These are the owners of the holiday lets. We manage their properties on their behalf, handling everything from guest bookings and communication to cleaning, maintenance, and maximizing occupancy and revenue.





By working with both guests and property owners, we ensure a seamless experience on both sides: happy guests and hassle-free property management for owners.





THE VALUES WE STAND BY



We are honest and caring

We never abuse the trust of our team, our customers and our partners

We take pride in our work and own our mistakes'



We ‘Poke the Box’

We are resourceful, proactive, innovative and aren’t afraid to take risks

We understand that mistakes are part of the learning process



Above all, we are a Team

We focus on the success of the team, and enjoy contributing during meetings

We nurture the potential in every individual and value family, health and happiness'



We are Positive

We welcome feedback and use it as a guide for improving future behavior

We provide solutions, we don’t create problems





PAY AND HOURS



- The starting rate for this role will be $6 - $7

- This position is available ASAP

- This is a long-term position

- Provisional Schedule:

Monday-Friday 11-1pm UK time

- You will be available for at least: 10-15 hours per week

- We guarantee 10 hours a week

- We will pay you weekly

- We offer a 13th month bonus





NOW THE IMPORTANT PART - HOW YOU CAN APPLY:



If this role sounds perfect for you then we’d love to hear from you!



Please click this link to complete a short application form to get started. I can’t wait to hear from you! Here’s the link 

https://forms.gle/vM9FRxsgLicM2Cni9





You don’t need to send your CV/Resume or cover letter at this time. We’ll request this from you if required.



Kind regards



Lucy

title: GoHighLevel Virtual Assistant
description:
JOIN OUR INCREDIBLE TEAM!

Roles: GoHighLevel Virtual Assistant



In this dynamic role, you will be undertaking various responsibilities, mainly focusing on supporting our business with GoHighLevel management, contact card organization, system audits, and data analysis for spreadsheets.

You'll play a crucial role in managing our GHL systems, ensuring data accuracy, maintaining contact databases, and supporting our high-ticket business operations in a fast-paced environment.

Yes, this role will be challenging but also incredibly rewarding and manageable. You will need to be proactive, ready to jump in at a 
nt's notice to support our operations, and think strategically and autonomously as you learn our preferred GHL workflows.



Buuut...



This is a golden opportunity to be part of a world-class team and work with cutting-edge GoHighLevel systems. (and you'll have lots of support from the team)



Plus, even if you're not selected for our immediate team, we often have opportunities to connect talented candidates with our network of clients who are actively hiring for similar GHL roles.



Your Key Responsibilities Will Include:

GoHighLevel system management and optimization

Contact card organization and database maintenance

Conducting regular system audits for accuracy and efficiency

Data analysis and spreadsheet management with numbers

Supporting high-ticket business operations and processes

System troubleshooting and workflow improvements

Creating and updating GHL automation sequences

Managing lead data and contact information

Sharing daily check-ins and system reports

Always striving for improvement and excellence in your role

Managing various GHL administrative tasks as required



You don't need to be a GHL expert from day one, but if you are, we're all ears! Share any relevant work experience you have with GoHighLevel, CRM systems, or high-ticket industries.



To Apply:

Change the subject line to "Applying for GHL VA - [Insert Canada's capital city]"

Answer this question: If you could design the perfect GoHighLevel workflow for a high-ticket business, what key elements would you include and why?

Attach any references you have



Role Requirements:

Strong proficiency with GoHighLevel (GHL) - contact management, workflows, and system audits

Experience with data analysis and spreadsheet management

Background or familiarity with high-ticket industry operations

Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills

Ability to thrive in fast-paced environments

Outstanding time management skills

Fast and accurate data entry skills

Professional communication abilities

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Experience with CRM systems and database management



The Hiring Process:

Initial Application Review: If you're moving forward, you'll hear back from us with an application form

Skills Assessment: That form will redirect to a simple GHL-related assignment (30-60 min. max)

Interview Stage: If you're successful on the assignment stage, we'll reach out either with an offer OR for an interview

Final Steps: There may be other steps, but we'll be clear about that too

We believe in transparency and will keep you informed at each stage of the process.



About Our Business:

We operate in the high-ticket space and rely heavily on efficient GoHighLevel systems to manage our operations, client data, and business processes. Our success depends on having organized, accurate, and optimized GHL workflows that support our fast-paced business environment.



Our Values:

Speed is king: Think "I'll do it now" rather than "by later today/this week" for high-priority tasks

Over-deliver value: Strive for excellence in every task

Better every day: A growth mindset is amazing. We embrace improving in our craft every single day



Note: We aim to respond to all applications within 5 business days. If you don't hear from us by then, please feel free to reach out for an update on your application status.



Note: Even if you're not selected for our immediate team, we often have opportunities to connect talented candidates with our network of clients who are actively hiring for similar GHL roles.

We are hiring a part-time remote Social Media Manager / Content Assistant to help manage, create, and support content across LinkedIn, Instagram, and
 for our company.



This role is focused on content creation, profile management, audience engagement, and campaign support. We are looking for someone who is creative, organized, fluent in English, and comfortable following existing brand templates, social media accounts, and content guidelines.



You will not be responsible for creating the brand from scratch. We will provide similar accounts, examples, templates, content direction, and media guidelines that you will be required to follow when creating and managing content.



COMPENSATION: 

Part-time position

21 hours per week

Price is negotiable based on experience

Can work other jobs as long as work is completed properly and on schedule

Work for an American company

Potential for long-term work after a successful trial period



SCHEDUEL:

Part-time remote work

Must be available during U.S. business hours

Must be able to attend occasional check-ins during U.S. time zones

Flexible work schedule may be available as long as deadlines are met

Must be responsive, reliable, and easy to communicate with



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Manage and support our company’s social media presence on:

LinkedIn

Instagram


Create social media content using provided examples, templates, and brand direction

Follow existing media templates and account styles closely

Write captions, post copy, and short promotional content

Help organize and maintain a weekly content calendar

Schedule posts across social media platforms

Repurpose content for different platforms

Create basic graphics, post layouts, and social media visuals

Assist with short-form content ideas for Reels, Stories, and promotional posts

Monitor comments, messages, and profile interactions

Reply to comments and messages professionally using our guidance

Interact with our target market on social media

Like, comment, and engage with relevant accounts

Help nurture profile interactions and turn engagement into stronger audience relationships

Track basic engagement and report what content is performing well

Keep records of completed posts, scheduled posts, and engagement activity

Communicate clearly with our team about what has been completed



KEY SKILLS: 

- Requirements

- Excellent written English

- Strong understanding of LinkedIn, Instagram, and

- Experience creating social media content

- Experience using Canva or similar design tools

- Ability to follow templates and brand guidelines

- Ability to write clean, professional captions

- Comfortable replying to comments and messages

- Comfortable engaging with target accounts and audiences

- Organized and able to manage a weekly content schedule

- Reliable internet connection

- Responsive during agreed U.S. working hours

- Able to work independently after receiving instructions

- Comfortable using Google Sheets, Google Drive, or similar tools

- Must be detail-oriented and consistent

- Comfortable using AI tools.



IMPORTANT: 

This is a social media management and content support role. Success in this role depends on your ability to follow direction, create consistent content, manage profile interactions, and help build engagement over time.



You are not expected to create the entire marketing strategy by yourself. However, you are expected to help execute the strategy, follow our templates, maintain posting consistency, and engage professionally with our target audience.



After a successful trial period, this role may become long-term.



PLEASE SEND: 



To apply, please send:

- Your resume

- Examples of social media accounts, posts, or graphics you have created

- Any Instagram,
, or LinkedIn work samples

- A brief written message explaining your social media experience

- Your expected hourly or monthly rate

- Your availability during U.S. business hours

- Please respond with “I’m READY” to prove you have read through everything.

title: Tech Pack Designer
description:
We’re looking for a Tech Pack Designer who can take direction, references, or rough concepts and turn them into clear, factory-ready tech packs.



This role is not just about making things look good—it’s about accuracy, clarity, and production readiness. You should understand how garments are actually made and be able to communicate that through your work.



Responsibilities



-Create detailed tech packs from concept, references, or sketches

-Develop clean garment flats (front/back + construction details)

Build out:

-Construction pages (stitching, seams, trims, callouts)

-Measurement specs (POMs, grading)

-Bill of Materials (BOM)

-Labeling + packaging details

-Incorporate reference images + annotations for clarity

-Revise tech packs based on feedback and factory notes

-Organize and export final files (PDF + working files)



What We’re Looking For



-Strong experience in Adobe Illustrator (non-negotiable)

-Proven background creating production-ready tech packs

Understanding of:

-Garment construction (seams, stitching, trims)

-Fabrics (woven vs knit, weights, finishes)

-Manufacturing constraints (what factories need vs what’s unnecessary)

-Ability to work from loose direction and fill in gaps intelligently

-High attention to detail—nothing sloppy or ambiguous



Nice to Have

-Experience with denim, outerwear, or workwear

-Familiarity with overseas + domestic production workflows

-Understanding of fit + grading logic

-Experience working with small brands / fast-paced drops



How We Work

Most projects start with:

-Reference images

-A general concept

-Sometimes a rough sketch



You’ll be expected to:



-Interpret direction

-Build clean, organized tech packs

-Ask smart questions when needed—but not over-rely on hand-holding



Deliverables



Each tech pack typically includes:



-Garment flats (front/back)

-Construction details

-Spec sheet (POMs + grading)

-BOM

-Labeling / trims

-Exported, factory-ready PDF

title: GHL Technical Expert (Automations + App Support)
description:
Hey — welcome!



Are you the kind of person who sees a broken automation and immediately wants to fix it, not just flag it? Do you get a quiet thrill from clean workflows, solid schemas, and systems that just... work? Then keep reading — because this might be the role you've been waiting for.



Funnel Futurist is a fast-moving, internationally recognized team helping ambitious entrepreneurs build and scale through world-class funnels, content, and tech infrastructure. We're growing fast — and we need someone who can keep the engine running while we pour fuel on it.



We're looking for a Technical Ops Specialist —  a technically sharp operator who can get their hands dirty with automations, app infrastructure, and real daily problem-solving. If you've ever built a 
 scenario from scratch, troubleshot a GHL workflow at 9pm, or helped someone wrangle a Replit project into shape — we want to hear from you.



What You'll Actually Be Doing

Your job is to make sure things don't break — and when they do, to fix them fast without it landing on the wrong desk.



Automation Management

Build, monitor, and fix automations in 
, GoHighLevel (GHL), and other tools

Proactively spot breakages before they become client problems

Document automations clearly so the team isn't dependent on any one person



App & Dev Support

Support ongoing client app development projects in Replit

Assist with schema work, data structures, and lightweight backend tasks

Contribute to an app consolidation project — helping bring disparate tools under one roof



AI-Powered Ops

Use Claude Code and other AI tools to speed up your work and solve novel problems

Help identify where AI can be applied to reduce manual overhead across the business



General Technical Support

Be the first line of defense when something technical breaks 

Communicate clearly with the team about what broke, why, and what you did to fix it

Create and maintain SOPs for every process you touch



Who You Are

You're a problem-solver first 

You have hands-on experience with at least two of the following: 
, GoHighLevel, Replit, AI tools (Claude/ChatGPT), Google Sheets/Apps Script, or database/schema work

You communicate like a pro — clear, concise, and proactive with updates

You don't wait to be told twice. When something's broken, you're already on it.

You're comfortable working independently but know when to escalate

You've got a growth mindset and want to keep leveling up your technical skills



Role Requirements

Proficiency with 
 (scenario building, error handling, debugging) or other similar tools

Working knowledge of GoHighLevel (workflows, pipelines, automations) and other CRMs

Experience with AI tools — Claude, ChatGPT, or equivalent (daily use, not just dabbling)

Familiarity with Replit or similar lightweight dev environments

Strong async communication skills (Slack-based team)

Ability to write clear, usable SOPs and process documentation

EST-aligned working hours



Perks

???? Fully Remote — work from wherever you do your best thinking

? Performance bonuses — excellence gets rewarded here

???? Real growth opportunity — this role has a long runway for the right person

????? Access to world-class tools, training, and processes

???? Tight-knit team that actually values your contribution



About Our Founders

John & Phoenix have generated millions in direct and indirect revenue through their expertise in copywriting, funnel building, and coaching. They've scaled businesses with proven systems — and now they need a technical right hand to protect and expand that infrastructure. When things work, they can focus on growth. That's where you come in.



Our Values

Speed is king — High-priority tasks get handled now, not "later today"

Over-deliver — Good enough isn't good enough. We aim for excellent.

1?tter every day — We're a team of people who love getting sharper in their craft



How to Apply

We move fast and review applications as they come in. To apply:

Change your subject line to: "Automations Ready — [Insert your country's capital city]"

Answer this question: Describe a time you fixed something technical that was broken and no one else could figure it out. What was it, what did you do, and what was the result?

Attach: Your resume + any relevant work samples (
 scenarios, GHL setups, Replit projects, SOP docs — anything that shows your work)



Note: Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a brief paid trial. We believe in seeing real work in action — and we'll be fair and transparent about every step.

title: Creative Virtual Assistant
description:
About Us:

We are a growing e-commerce company based in Hungary, currently serving customers in three EU countries and actively expanding into new markets. We’re looking for a talented Creative Virtual Assistant to join our team and support our growth journey. Our ideal candidate has a strong passion or interest in ecommerce, digital marketing, direct response creatives, video and photo editing. Please begin your application message with the word “ecom”. Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be considered.



Job Description:

We are seeking a Creative Virtual Assistant who will work closely with our marketing and creative team to support our creative workflows, ads making and various marketing initiatives. Responsibilities include:

• Market, competitor, product, creative research

• Photo and video editing

• Brainstorming ideas with the marketing team

•
 marketing creative templates

• Influencer outreach

• Creating landing pages

• Basic administrative and VA tasks



Requirements:

• Strong photo and video editing skills are essential for this role

• Minimum 1 year of experience in both photo and video editing (e.g., CapCut, Premiere Pro, Canva, Photoshop)

• Suitable computer is required for the role.

• Shifts are based on Hungarian time zone to ensure smooth collaboration with our team.

• Previous experience with Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok, Pinterest, Amazon ads or Shopify is a plus

• Previous research experience is a plus (market, competitor, product, creative, creative asset research)

• A passion or interest in ecommerce, digital marketing, direct response creatives, video and photo editing

• Proficient in spoken and written English

• Self-motivated and proactive, with excellent time management skills, TimeDoctor is required

• Strong attention to detail, able to multitask, and work effectively under pressure

• Problem-solver who thrives in a dynamic environment



To apply, please provide:

1. Your portfolio (specifically Meta/TikTok ads if possible).

2. A short (max 1 min) video introduction about yourself.

3. Your computer specs (to ensure you can handle video editing).

4. Begin your application message with the word “ecom”. Applications that do not follow these instruction will not be considered.

title: Social Media Specialist / Influencer Marketing
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking an Influencer Marketing & Social Media Specialist to expand our online presence and strengthen brand awareness through influencer partnerships and social media management. This role involves sourcing and managing influencers, coordinating content, and tracking performance, while also executing day-to-day social media tasks across
, TikTok, X, Instagram, and YouTube. The ideal candidate is creative, organized, and passionate about digital trends, pop culture, and community engagement.



Key Responsibilities:

A. Influencer Marketing

-Source, vet, and onboard influencers within relevant communities (trading cards, Funko Pop, collectibles, gaming).

-Negotiate collaboration terms and manage influencer partnerships across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

-Provide influencers with briefs and creative guidance to ensure brand alignment.

-Coordinate deliverables and ensure timely publishing of influencer content.

-Track and analyze influencer performance, engagement, and ROI.

-Optimize influencer strategies based on campaign results and industry trends.

-Maintain detailed influencer records, contracts, and communications.

B.Social Media Management

-Execute social media-related tasks across
, TikTok, X, Instagram, and YouTube.

-Schedule and publish posts across platforms in line with marketing campaigns.

-Respond to social media inbox messages and comments in a timely, professional manner.

-Engage with followers and online communities to foster interaction and brand loyalty.

-Support the Marketing Team in executing community engagement and content initiatives.



Qualifications:

-Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Digital Media, or related field (preferred).

-1–3 years of experience in influencer marketing, social media management, or brand partnerships.

-Hands-on experience with influencer campaigns on TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

-Experience managing brand social media pages across
, TikTok, X, Instagram, and YouTube.

-Knowledge of pop culture, collectibles, gaming, and fan communities is a plus.



Skills & Competencies:

-Strong understanding of influencer and social media engagement strategies.

-Excellent communication and negotiation skills.

-Highly organized with the ability to handle multiple campaigns simultaneously.

-Analytical mindset with ability to track KPIs and evaluate campaign performance.

-Creative thinker with a passion for digital storytelling and community building.

-Comfortable working in fast-paced, remote, and collaborative environments.

title: Senior Property Manager
description:

Lead, mentor, and support junior property managers to ensure best practices are consistently followed

Oversee tenant communications, lease renewals, and resolution of escalated tenant concerns

Support leasing activities, including coordinating listings, property showings, applicant screening, and lease documentation

Ensure compliance with lease terms, investigate violations, and handle tenant disputes professionally

Coordinate with vendors for maintenance, repairs, and improvements; support larger renovation projects as needed

Collaborate with leadership on operational improvements and property performance strategies

Monitor property financial performance, including budgeting, tracking actuals vs. budget, and recommending strategies to improve financial outcomes



REQUIREMENTS

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Proven experience in U.S. residential and/or commercial property management

Previous experience leading or supervising a property management team

Experience using AppFolio or similar property management software

Ability to work during U.S. business hours

Can start within 2 weeks of receiving an offer

Personal laptop or desktop computer

Headset and webcam

Stable internet connection

Backup power and internet options

Comfortable using time-tracking tools

Proficiency with Microsoft Office and Google Workspace



COMPENSATION

Salary: Php 70k - 80k

Health insurance

Paid time off



To apply, please send your complete resume:

title: Supply Chain Manager | E-commerce | Inventory Forecasting & 3PL
description:
About the Role



IMPORTANT: This is a high-impact, unique opportunity role for experienced Supply Chain Managers, full ownership, real impact, and direct influence on growth. 



We are a fast-growing, highly profitable 9-figure e-commerce company operating in a fast-paced environment where strong execution truly matters. 

We move quickly, solve problems in real time, and expect a high standard of ownership from the people we bring into the business.



We are looking for a high-level Supply Chain Manager to take full ownership of our supply chain operations. The role is critical to product availability, cash flow, profitability, and operational stability.



You will be responsible for making sure we always have the right amount of stock at the right time without overstocking and without running out. This is a hands-on ownership role for someone who can think independently, make decisions, and execute with precision.



What You Will Own



Inventory Planning & Forecasting



- Forecast demand using sales trends, growth patterns, and seasonality.

- Plan inventory with proper lead times for production, shipping, and replenishment.

- Maintain the right safety buffer without overbuying.

- Prevent both stockouts and excess inventory.

- You must balance availability with capital efficiency ensuring we do not tie up excessive cash in inventory while still maintaining a safe buffer.



Supplier Management



- Manage relationships with suppliers.

- Negotiate pricing, terms, and quantities.

- Place and track purchase orders.

- Ensure production timelines are respected.

- (Bonus) Find, evaluate and choose new suppliers



3PL & Logistics Management



- Manage relationships with 3PLs, warehouses, and fulfillment partners across locations.

- Ensure smooth operations across fulfillment and shipping flows.

- Optimize shipping methods and logistics costs, including air vs. sea decisions.

- Identify and onboard new logistics partners when needed.



Operational Improvement



- Identify bottlenecks and inefficiencies.

- Improve processes, communication, and internal systems.

- Take ownership of problems and solve them proactively.



 What We Are Looking For



- Strong experience in supply chain, logistics, or e-commerce operations.

- Proven ability to manage inventory, forecasting, and replenishment.

- Strong understanding of stock control and cash flow impact.

- Ability to make decisions under uncertainty.

- High ownership, autonomy, and execution speed.

- A real problem-solver, not a task-follower.



 What This Role Is Not



If you need detailed step-by-step instructions, prefer theory over execution, or wait to be told what to do, this role is not for you. We are looking for someone who can take full responsibility and operate with maturity, speed, and judgment.



Compensation



- $5,000–$10,000/month depending on experience. Can grow in the future once you prove your skills and take more responsibilities. 

- Performance-based bonuses.



How to Apply



Complete the application form 
. 



We are not looking for perfect answers, we are looking for how you think, how you solve problems, and how you operate under real-world constraints.

title: Accountant
description:
Hiring – Australian Accounting Firm Experience



We're looking for someone with experience working at an Australian accounting firm. A senior accountant background is preferred, but all levels of experience are welcome to apply.



To apply, please send through your CV along with a 30–60 second intro video telling us a bit about yourself and why you'd be a great fit. Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Tour Operations Analyst (Fluent Japanese Required, Remote)
description:
We’re seeking a highly organized and bilingual Tour Operations Analyst to manage restaurant reservations, partner communications, and shift scheduling for our food and cultural tours in Japan. This is a remote position, but requires fluency in Japanese and proficiency in Microsoft Excel to handle day-to-day coordination tasks effectively.



You’ll work behind the scenes to ensure every tour runs smoothly—from confirming restaurant bookings to tracking partner quality and creating guide shift schedules.



Key Responsibilities:



Communicate daily in native-level Japanese with restaurants and partner vendors to confirm reservations and availability



Ensure restaurant partners meet quality, capacity, and timing standards



Track reservation records, partner performance, and any operational issues



Use Excel to create and update tour guide shift schedules



Troubleshoot last-minute changes and resolve booking conflicts quickly



Collaborate with internal operations and guide teams to align schedules



Research and onboard new restaurant partners when necessary



Requirements:



Fluent in Japanese (business/native level) and strong English skills



Advanced Excel skills (formulas, conditional formatting, schedule creation, etc.)



Strong attention to detail and organizational abilities



Experience in hospitality, reservations, or operations coordination



Ability to work independently in a remote environment



Familiarity with Japan’s dining and service culture



Bonus: Experience with tools like Google Sheets, TableCheck, or similar platforms



Position Details:



Remote / Virtual



Part-time or full-time (depending on your availability)



Working hours aligned with Japan Standard Time preferred

title: Credit repair assistant
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to assist our credit repair company with preparing and submitting dispute documentation for clients. The ideal candidate is highly organized, able to follow structured processes, and comfortable working with official government forms and documentation.



This role involves assembling client credit packets, filing reports with government agencies, and sending dispute letters to credit bureaus.



Responsibilities



• Compile and organize client credit dispute packets

• Review client documents to ensure accuracy and completeness

• File Identity Theft Reports through the FTC website

• Submit complaints and disputes through the CFPB portal

• Prepare and send credit dispute letters to credit bureaus

• Send documentation via digital mail and

• Maintain accurate records of submitted disputes and case updates

• Follow internal step-by-step SOP processes

• Upload and organize files in Google Drive or CRM system

• Track dispute progress and update status reports



Daily Tasks



• Gather client credit reports and supporting documents

• Prepare dispute letters and documentation packages

• File FTC Identity Theft Affidavit reports

• Submit CFPB complaints when required

• Send letters to Experian, TransUnion, and Equifax

• Maintain logs of all disputes sent and responses received



Requirements



• Strong attention to detail

• Excellent written English

• Ability to follow structured instructions and procedures

• Experience with credit repair or credit disputes (preferred but not required)

• Comfortable working with government websites and forms

• Strong organization and file management skills

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Tools You May Use



• Google Docs

• Google Drive

•

• Digital Mail Platforms

• Credit Repair CRM systems (if applicable)



Bonus Skills (Not Required)



• Experience working in the credit repair industry

• Familiarity with FTC Identity Theft Reports

• Experience submitting complaints through CFPB

• Understanding of FCRA dispute processes



Position Details



• Fully Remote

• Flexible Hours

• Training Provided

• Long-Term Opportunity for the Right Candidate



?



Screening Questions (Add to your job post)

 1. Have you worked with credit repair or credit disputes before?

 2. Are you familiar with FTC Identity Theft Reports or CFPB complaints?

 3. How comfortable are you working with structured documentation and legal forms?

 4. What tools do you typically use for document organization and communication?

title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer (High CTR Viral Style)
description:
We are looking for a creative and skilled YouTube Thumbnail Designer who understands how to design high-CTR thumbnails that stop the scroll and get clicks.



Our content is high-energy YouTube entertainment content, and thumbnails must feel dramatic, bold, and viral. The ideal designer understands YouTube psychology, color contrast, facial emphasis, and clickable text design.



Your job will be to create thumbnails that make viewers immediately want to click the video.



Responsibilities include:



• Designing high click-through rate YouTube thumbnails

• Creating bold text overlays and dramatic titles

• Enhancing photos with color grading, lighting, and contrast

• Adding effects like glow, lightning, arrows, circles, emojis, and highlights

• Creating thumbnails that match viral YouTube styles

• Working with provided images while keeping faces unchanged

• Delivering thumbnails quickly (24 hour turnaround preferred)



Our style is similar to MrBeast / viral YouTube thumbnails with strong emotion, dramatic text, and bright engaging visuals.



Consistency and creativity are very important.

title: Remote Video Editor (YouTube & Music Videos)
description:
???? Remote Video Editor (YouTube & Music Videos)



**Location:** Remote (Overseas Preferred)

**Type:** Long-Term Freelance / Virtual Assistant





 About The Role



We are looking for a **creative and skilled video editor** who can produce **engaging, high-energy videos for YouTube and music content**. The ideal candidate understands how to keep viewers hooked with **clean cuts, viral sound effects, dynamic pacing, and attention-grabbing visuals.**



This role will focus on editing **long-form YouTube videos (8+ minutes) and music videos (3–4 minutes)** with intros and outros.



If you understand **YouTube retention editing and viral content pacing**, this role is for you.



---



# Responsibilities



Edit high-energy YouTube videos that keep viewers engaged from start to finish.



Tasks include:



• Clean, professional video cuts

• Adding engaging text overlays and captions

• Incorporating viral sound effects and 
 elements

• Adding motion graphics and effects where needed

• Designing YouTube thumbnails in the provided style

• Color correcting footage for professional quality

• Creating strong YouTube intros and outros

• Adding visual elements that increase viewer retention



Editors should understand how to enhance storytelling and **improve watch time through pacing and visual engagement.**



---



# Requirements



The ideal editor should have:



• Strong video editing skills

• Experience editing **YouTube content**

• Ability to create **engaging and captivating edits**

• Good eye for pacing, cuts, and transitions

• Familiarity with viral editing styles

• Ability to add **text overlays and engaging graphics**

• Experience with **color correction and grading**

• Reliable internet connection

• Ability to meet **fast turnaround deadlines (24–48 hours)**



---



# Preferred Skills (Bonus)



These skills will make you a stronger candidate:



• Experience designing **YouTube thumbnails**

• Knowledge of **VFX or visual effects**

• Motion graphics experience

• Experience editing **music videos**

• Knowledge of **viral YouTube editing styles**



---



# Editing Software (Preferred)



Candidates should be familiar with at least one of the following:



• Adobe Premiere Pro

• After Effects

• Final Cut Pro

• CapCut (advanced users)



---



# Work Expectations



• Fast turnaround time (24–48 hours)

• Strong communication

• Ability to follow editing direction

• Ability to match a consistent editing style



---



# To Apply



Please send:



1. Your **portfolio or editing examples**
